detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way. In plain language: Hackers can chain an AI-tooling bug with a Linux-kernel bug to take over shared AI servers. In plain language: In plain language:

CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way. prediction_summary_locales.en: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年下半期までに、5月1日のCopy Fail(CVE-2026-31431)BOD-22-01の14日期限 + 4月30日のLiteLLM CVE-2026-42208の26時間悪用ウィンドウ + 5月1日まで未パッチのSGLang CVE-2026-5760という3点セットが、「LLMツーリング層CVEのサプライチェーン武器化」を支配的な攻撃パターンにする — 少なくとも1つの大手IRファームが、LLMゲートウェイ/エージェントハーネス/推論ランタイムのCVEとLinuxカーネルLPE(Copy Failまたはその後継)を組み合わせて、マルチテナント推論基盤上でフルチェーンrootを取得した実際の侵入の公開ポストモーテムを発表する;少なくとも1つのCSAI-CNA発行のアドバイザリーが、ATT&CK v19のDefense Impairment内で、LLMツーリング+カーネル連鎖を名前付きテクニックとして明示的に切り出す。** 4月28日のATT&CK v19はすでにエージェント関連テクニック(コンテキストポイズニング、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCPサーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェントデプロイ)を命名している;5月1日のCopy Failの波が、攻撃者にクラウドサービスプロバイダーへの実環境利用が確認された(Microsoft Security Blog開示による)汎用Linux LPEを与えた;LiteLLMのSQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keysの先例が、横展開ベクトルを与える。CSAIの4月29日CNA認可は開示発行側であり、IRファームのQ3インシデントレポートにとって最も抵抗の少ない経路は、まさにこの形で組み立てられた1件のクラウドマルチテナント侵入である。In plain language: ハッカーはAIツーリングのバグとLinuxカーネルのバグを連鎖させて、共有AIサーバーを乗っ取れる。In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el H2 2026, el plazo de 14 días BOD-22-01 del Copy Fail del 1 mayo (CVE-2026-31431) + la ventana de explotación de 26 horas del LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 30 abr + el trío SGLang CVE-2026-5760 sin parchear hasta el 1 mayo convierte la "weaponización de la cadena de suministro de CVEs de la capa de tooling-LLM" en el patrón dominante de los atacantes — al menos una firma importante de respuesta a incidentes publicará un post-mortem público de una intrusión real que combine un CVE de gateway-LLM / agent-harness / inference-runtime con un LPE del kernel Linux (Copy Fail o su sucesor) para obtener root de cadena completa en inferencia multi-inquilino, y al menos un aviso emitido por CSAI-CNA destacará explícitamente la cadena tooling-LLM + kernel como técnica nombrada dentro del Defense Impairment de ATT&CK v19.** ATT&CK v19 del 28 abr ya nombra las técnicas agénticas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue de agente malicioso); la ola Copy Fail del 1 mayo da a los atacantes un LPE Linux universal con uso confirmado en el mundo real contra proveedores de servicios cloud (según divulgación del Microsoft Security Blog); el precedente de SQLi-fuga-de-claves-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock de LiteLLM les da el vector de movimiento lateral. La autorización CNA del 29 abr de CSAI es el lado de emisión de divulgaciones; la ruta de menor resistencia para un informe de incidentes Q3 de una firma IR es una intrusión cloud multi-inquilino unida exactamente de esta forma. En lenguaje claro: Los hackers pueden encadenar un bug de tooling de IA con un bug del kernel Linux para tomar el control de servidores de IA compartidos. En lenguaje claro: En lenguaje claro:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Sa H2 2026 ang trio ng May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + ang unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ay magpapakahulugan sa "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" bilang dominanteng attacker pattern — hindi bababa sa isang major IR firm ang maglalathala ng pampublikong post-mortem ng totoong intrusion na pinagsasama ang LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE sa Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail o ang successor nito) para sa full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, at hindi bababa sa isang CSAI-CNA-issued advisory ang explicitly mag-cha-carve out sa LLM-tooling + kernel chain bilang named technique sa loob ng Defense Impairment ng ATT&CK v19.** Pinangalanan na ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ang agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); ang May 1 Copy Fail wave ay nagbibigay sa attackers ng universal-Linux LPE na may confirmed in-the-wild use laban sa cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); ang LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent ang nagbibigay sa kanila ng lateral-movement vector. Ang Apr 29 CSAI CNA authorization ay ang disclosure-issuance side; ang pinakamadaling daan para sa Q3 incident report ng IR firm ay isang cloud-multi-tenant intrusion na pinagsama-sama nang ganito.

By Q3 2026, individual / SMB coding agents will standardize on "local by default, cloud as overflow." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **Acceleration of the "local-first, cloud-overflow" inversion.** Qwen3.6-35B-A3B's 73.4% on SWE-bench Verified and Bonsai 1.7B's 674 tok/s on CUDA push edge implementations into practical territory. By Q3 2026, individual / SMB coding agents will standardize on "local by default, cloud as overflow." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「ローカルファースト、クラウドはオーバーフロー」逆転の加速。** Qwen3.6-35B-A3BがSWE-bench Verifiedで73.4%、Bonsai 1.7BがCUDA上で674 tok/sを達成し、エッジ実装は実用領域へ押し上げられている。2026年Q3までに、個人/中小企業向けのコーディングエージェントは「ローカルをデフォルト、クラウドはオーバーフロー」へと標準化する。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Aceleración de la inversión "local primero, nube como desbordamiento".** El 73,4% de Qwen3.6-35B-A3B en SWE-bench Verified y los 674 tok/s de Bonsai 1.7B en CUDA llevan las implementaciones en el borde a un terreno práctico. Para el Q3 2026, los agentes de codificación individuales y de pymes se estandarizarán en "local por defecto, nube como desbordamiento". In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Pagbilis ng "local-first, cloud-overflow" na inversion.** Ang 73.4% ng Qwen3.6-35B-A3B sa SWE-bench Verified at ang 674 tok/s ng Bonsai 1.7B sa CUDA ay nagtutulak sa edge implementations papasok sa praktikal na teritoryo. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang individual at SMB coding agents ay magiging standard sa "local by default, cloud as overflow." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

reasoning.because: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B hits 73.4% on SWE-bench Verified and Bonsai 1.7B reaches 674 tok/s on CUDA.
reasoning.given: Edge-runnable models now match useful coding-agent quality bars, while cloud inference stays metered and latency-bound.
reasoning.so_that: Individual and SMB coding-agent stacks default to local execution, with cloud reserved for overflow and hard tasks.
reasoning.landing: By Q3 2026; individual + SMB coding-agent tooling.
reasoning.plain_language: Small coding AIs that run on your own computer are now good and fast enough that most people will use those first and only call the cloud when needed.

because.en: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B hits 73.4% on SWE-bench Verified and Bonsai 1.7B reaches 674 tok/s on CUDA.
because.ja: Qwen3.6-35B-A3BがSWE-bench Verifiedで73.4%、Bonsai 1.7BがCUDA上で674 tok/sに達している。
because.es: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B alcanza el 73,4% en SWE-bench Verified y Bonsai 1.7B llega a 674 tok/s en CUDA.
because.fil: Ang Qwen3.6-35B-A3B ay umaabot sa 73.4% sa SWE-bench Verified at ang Bonsai 1.7B ay umaabot sa 674 tok/s sa CUDA.

given.en: Edge-runnable models now match useful coding-agent quality bars, while cloud inference stays metered and latency-bound.
given.ja: エッジで動作可能なモデルが、有用なコーディングエージェントの品質基準に達した一方、クラウド推論は依然として従量課金かつレイテンシ制約下にある。
given.es: Los modelos ejecutables en el borde ya igualan los umbrales de calidad útiles de los agentes de codificación, mientras que la inferencia en la nube sigue siendo medida y limitada por la latencia.
given.fil: Ang edge-runnable models ngayon ay kapantay na ng useful coding-agent quality bars, habang ang cloud inference ay nananatiling metered at latency-bound.

so_that.en: Individual and SMB coding-agent stacks default to local execution, with cloud reserved for overflow and hard tasks.
so_that.ja: 個人および中小企業向けのコーディングエージェントスタックは、ローカル実行をデフォルトとし、クラウドはオーバーフローと困難なタスク用に確保する。
so_that.es: Las pilas de agentes de codificación de individuos y pymes adoptan por defecto la ejecución local, reservando la nube para el desbordamiento y las tareas difíciles.
so_that.fil: Ang individual at SMB coding-agent stacks ay default na sa local execution, na ang cloud ay nakareserba para sa overflow at sa mahirap na tasks.

landing.en: By Q3 2026; individual + SMB coding-agent tooling.
landing.ja: 2026年Q3まで、個人および中小企業向けコーディングエージェントツール領域で。
landing.es: Para el Q3 2026; herramientas de agentes de codificación para individuos y pymes.
landing.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026; individual + SMB coding-agent tooling.

plain_language.en: Small coding AIs that run on your own computer are now good and fast enough that most people will use those first and only call the cloud when needed.
plain_language.ja: 自分のコンピュータで動く小型のコーディングAIが十分に賢く速くなったため、ほとんどの人はまずローカルを使い、必要なときだけクラウドを呼び出すようになる。
plain_language.es: Las IA de codificación pequeñas que se ejecutan en tu propio ordenador ya son lo suficientemente buenas y rápidas como para que la mayoría de las personas las usen primero y solo recurran a la nube cuando sea necesario.
plain_language.fil: Ang maliliit na coding AIs na tumatakbo sa sarili mong computer ay sapat na magaling at mabilis na ngayon, kaya karamihan ng tao ay gagamitin muna ang mga ito at tatawag lang sa cloud kapag kinakailangan.

detail.summary_short: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B's 73.4% on SWE-bench Verified and Bonsai 1.7B's 674 tok/s on CUDA push edge coding agents into practical territory. By Q3 2026, individual and SMB coding-agent stacks are expected to standardize on local-by-default execution, with cloud reserved for overflow.

summary_short_locales.en: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B's 73.4% on SWE-bench Verified and Bonsai 1.7B's 674 tok/s on CUDA push edge coding agents into practical territory. By Q3 2026, individual and SMB coding-agent stacks are expected to standardize on local-by-default execution, with cloud reserved for overflow.
summary_short_locales.ja: Qwen3.6-35B-A3BがSWE-bench Verifiedで73.4%、Bonsai 1.7BがCUDA上で674 tok/sを達成し、エッジ向けコーディングエージェントが実用領域へ進入した。2026年Q3までに、個人および中小企業向けコーディングエージェントスタックは、ローカルをデフォルト、クラウドはオーバーフローという構成に標準化されると見込まれる。
summary_short_locales.es: El 73,4% de Qwen3.6-35B-A3B en SWE-bench Verified y los 674 tok/s de Bonsai 1.7B en CUDA llevan a los agentes de codificación en el borde a un terreno práctico. Para el Q3 2026, se espera que las pilas de agentes de codificación individuales y de pymes se estandaricen en la ejecución local por defecto, reservando la nube para el desbordamiento.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang 73.4% ng Qwen3.6-35B-A3B sa SWE-bench Verified at ang 674 tok/s ng Bonsai 1.7B sa CUDA ay nagtutulak sa edge coding agents papasok sa praktikal na teritoryo. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang individual at SMB coding-agent stacks ay inaasahang magiging standard sa local-by-default execution, na ang cloud ay nakareserba para sa overflow.

bridges.text: DeepSeek V4 cost-collapse, mature Qwen3.6 family coverage, and on-device Bonsai performance all push the local default deeper into reach — the structural force the prediction relies on is hardening through Apr 25-27, with practitioner reads consolidating around it.

text_locales.en: DeepSeek V4 cost-collapse, mature Qwen3.6 family coverage, and on-device Bonsai performance all push the local default deeper into reach — the structural force the prediction relies on is hardening through Apr 25-27, with practitioner reads consolidating around it.
text_locales.ja: DeepSeek V4 のコスト崩壊、成熟した Qwen3.6 ファミリのカバレッジ、そしてオンデバイスでの Bonsai 性能はいずれも、ローカルデフォルトの射程を一段と深く押し広げている — 予測が依拠する構造的な力は 4/25-27 を通じて硬化しており、実務者の読みもそれを軸に集約しつつある。
text_locales.es: El colapso de costos de DeepSeek V4, la cobertura madura de la familia Qwen3.6 y el rendimiento on-device de Bonsai empujan el default local más profundo al alcance — la fuerza estructural de la que depende la predicción se está endureciendo del 25 al 27 de abril, con las lecturas de los profesionales consolidándose en torno a ella.
text_locales.fil: Ang DeepSeek V4 cost-collapse, mature Qwen3.6 family coverage, at ang on-device Bonsai performance ay lahat nagtutulak sa local default na maging mas malalim na maaabot — ang structural force na inaasa ng prediction ay tumitigas sa kabuuan ng Apr 25-27, kasama ang practitioner reads na nagkokonsolida sa paligid nito.

bridges.text: Qwen3.6-27B's dense Apache 2.0 release beating 397B-A17B MoE on SWE-bench Verified at 40 tok/s on a single RTX 3090, DeepSeek V4-Pro's ~7x cost gap with Opus 4.7 alongside Huawei Ascend tuning, and NVIDIA's Apr 26 open-source LLM speedups on RTX PCs together materialize the precondition that local models clear the agent quality bar at consumer-tier cost.

text_locales.en: Qwen3.6-27B's dense Apache 2.0 release beating 397B-A17B MoE on SWE-bench Verified at 40 tok/s on a single RTX 3090, DeepSeek V4-Pro's ~7x cost gap with Opus 4.7 alongside Huawei Ascend tuning, and NVIDIA's Apr 26 open-source LLM speedups on RTX PCs together materialize the precondition that local models clear the agent quality bar at consumer-tier cost.
text_locales.ja: Qwen3.6-27Bの密Apache 2.0リリースが単一RTX 3090上40 tok/sでSWE-bench Verifiedの397B-A17B MoEを上回ること、DeepSeek V4-ProのOpus 4.7との~7xのコスト差とファーウェイ・アセンドのチューニング、NVIDIAの4月26日のRTX PC上のオープンソースLLMの高速化が共に、コンシューマ層のコストでローカルモデルがエージェント品質バーをクリアするという前提条件を実体化する。
text_locales.es: El lanzamiento denso Apache 2.0 de Qwen3.6-27B superando a 397B-A17B MoE en SWE-bench Verified a 40 tok/s en una sola RTX 3090, la brecha de costo de ~7x de DeepSeek V4-Pro con Opus 4.7 junto al ajuste para Huawei Ascend, y las aceleraciones LLM de código abierto del 26 de abril de NVIDIA en RTX PCs juntas materializan la precondición de que los modelos locales superen el listón de calidad de agente al costo de nivel de consumo.
text_locales.fil: Ang Qwen3.6-27B's dense Apache 2.0 release na lumalampas sa 397B-A17B MoE sa SWE-bench Verified sa 40 tok/s sa isang RTX 3090, ang DeepSeek V4-Pro's ~7x cost gap sa Opus 4.7 katuwang ng Huawei Ascend tuning, at ang NVIDIA's Apr 26 open-source LLM speedups sa RTX PCs ay magkasamang nagma-materialize sa precondition na ang local models ay nakapasa sa agent quality bar sa consumer-tier cost.

bridges.text: DeepSeek V4-Pro's IMOAnswerBench 89.8 above Claude Opus 4.7 and Gemini 3.1-Pro and close to GPT-5.4, plus OfficeChai's $1.74 / $3.48 per M tokens pricing one-seventh of Opus and UCStrategies' 7x-cheaper open-weight 1M-context framing, materialize the precondition that local models clear the agent quality bar at frontier-adjacent cost.

text_locales.en: DeepSeek V4-Pro's IMOAnswerBench 89.8 above Claude Opus 4.7 and Gemini 3.1-Pro and close to GPT-5.4, plus OfficeChai's $1.74 / $3.48 per M tokens pricing one-seventh of Opus and UCStrategies' 7x-cheaper open-weight 1M-context framing, materialize the precondition that local models clear the agent quality bar at frontier-adjacent cost.
text_locales.ja: DeepSeek V4-ProのIMOAnswerBench 89.8がClaude Opus 4.7とGemini 3.1-Proを上回りGPT-5.4に近いこと、OfficeChaiの$1.74 / $3.48 per MトークンというOpusの7分の1の価格設定、UCStrategiesの7倍安価なオープンウェイト1Mコンテキストの枠組みが、ローカル・モデルがフロンティア近接コストでエージェント品質バーをクリアするという前提条件を物質化する。
text_locales.es: El IMOAnswerBench 89.8 de DeepSeek V4-Pro por encima de Claude Opus 4.7 y Gemini 3.1-Pro y cerca de GPT-5.4, más el precio de OfficeChai de $1.74 / $3.48 por M tokens un séptimo de Opus, y el encuadre de UCStrategies de 7x más barato con pesos abiertos y contexto 1M, materializan la precondición de que los modelos locales superan la barra de calidad de agente a un costo adyacente a la frontera.
text_locales.fil: Ang IMOAnswerBench 89.8 ng DeepSeek V4-Pro sa itaas ng Claude Opus 4.7 at Gemini 3.1-Pro at malapit sa GPT-5.4, kasama ang $1.74 / $3.48 per M tokens pricing ng OfficeChai na one-seventh ng Opus at ang 7x-cheaper open-weight 1M-context framing ng UCStrategies, ay nagpapamateryalisa sa precondition na ang local models ay nakapasa sa agent quality bar sa frontier-adjacent cost.

bridges.text: DeepSeek V4 dropping as open weights with native 1M context and Hybrid Attention slashing 1M-context FLOPs to 27% / KV cache to 10%, alongside Qwen3.6-27B's downloadable Claude-Code-grade coding and Ollama v0.21.2's bundled OpenClaw + web search across all desktops, directly materializes the precondition that local models clear the agent quality bar with frontier-adjacent capability.

text_locales.en: DeepSeek V4 dropping as open weights with native 1M context and Hybrid Attention slashing 1M-context FLOPs to 27% / KV cache to 10%, alongside Qwen3.6-27B's downloadable Claude-Code-grade coding and Ollama v0.21.2's bundled OpenClaw + web search across all desktops, directly materializes the precondition that local models clear the agent quality bar with frontier-adjacent capability.
text_locales.ja: DeepSeek V4がネイティブ1Mコンテキストとハイブリッド・アテンションでオープンウェイトとして登場し、1MコンテキストFLOPsを27% / KVキャッシュを10%まで削減したこと、加えてQwen3.6-27Bのダウンロード可能なClaude-Codeグレードのコーディングと、Ollama v0.21.2が全デスクトップにOpenClaw + ウェブ検索をバンドルしたことが、ローカルモデルがフロンティア近接の能力でエージェント品質バーをクリアするという前提条件を直接物質化する。
text_locales.es: DeepSeek V4 cayendo como pesos abiertos con contexto de 1M nativo y Hybrid Attention recortando los FLOPs de contexto de 1M al 27% / caché KV al 10%, junto con la codificación de grado Claude-Code descargable de Qwen3.6-27B y los plugins OpenClaw + búsqueda web incluidos de Ollama v0.21.2 en todos los desktops, materializan directamente la precondición de que los modelos locales superan la barra de calidad de agente con capacidad adyacente a la frontera.
text_locales.fil: Ang pagbagsak ng DeepSeek V4 bilang open weights na may native 1M context at Hybrid Attention na nagbabawas ng 1M-context FLOPs sa 27% / KV cache sa 10%, kasabay ng downloadable Claude-Code-grade coding ng Qwen3.6-27B at ang bundled OpenClaw + web search ng Ollama v0.21.2 sa lahat ng desktops, ay direktang nagma-materialize sa precondition na ang local models ay umaabot sa agent quality bar na may frontier-adjacent capability.

bridges.text: Qwen3.6-27B Apache 2.0 hitting SWE-bench Verified 77.2% on a single RTX 4090 at ~18 GB Q4_K_M, with Simon Willison ranking it flagship-grade coding and GIGAZINE noting Claude Opus 4.5-class performance is now locally downloadable, directly materializes the precondition that local-runnable models clear the agent quality bar.

text_locales.en: Qwen3.6-27B Apache 2.0 hitting SWE-bench Verified 77.2% on a single RTX 4090 at ~18 GB Q4_K_M, with Simon Willison ranking it flagship-grade coding and GIGAZINE noting Claude Opus 4.5-class performance is now locally downloadable, directly materializes the precondition that local-runnable models clear the agent quality bar.
text_locales.ja: Qwen3.6-27B Apache 2.0が単一のRTX 4090上で約18 GBのQ4_K_MでSWE-bench Verified 77.2%に到達し、Simon Willisonがフラッグシップ級コーディングと評価し、GIGAZINEはClaude Opus 4.5級の性能が今やローカルでダウンロード可能だと述べていることは、ローカル実行可能なモデルがエージェントの品質基準をクリアするという前提条件を直接実現している。
text_locales.es: Qwen3.6-27B Apache 2.0 alcanzando SWE-bench Verified 77.2% en una sola RTX 4090 con ~18 GB Q4_K_M, con Simon Willison clasificándolo como codificación de grado insignia y GIGAZINE señalando que el rendimiento de clase Claude Opus 4.5 ahora se puede descargar localmente, materializa directamente la precondición de que los modelos ejecutables localmente superan la barra de calidad del agente.
text_locales.fil: Ang Qwen3.6-27B Apache 2.0 na umaabot sa SWE-bench Verified 77.2% sa iisang RTX 4090 sa ~18 GB Q4_K_M, kasama si Simon Willison na nagrarank dito bilang flagship-grade coding at ang GIGAZINE na nagsasabi na ang Claude Opus 4.5-class performance ay locally-downloadable na ngayon, ay tahasang inaaktwal ang precondition na ang local-runnable models ay pumapasa sa agent quality bar.

bridges.text: ml-intern lifting Qwen3-1.7B GPQA from 8.5% to 32% in under 10 hours and overtaking Claude Code's 22.99% is direct evidence that local post-training now produces credible coding-agent quality, reinforcing the precondition that edge models match useful agent quality bars.

text_locales.en: ml-intern lifting Qwen3-1.7B GPQA from 8.5% to 32% in under 10 hours and overtaking Claude Code's 22.99% is direct evidence that local post-training now produces credible coding-agent quality, reinforcing the precondition that edge models match useful agent quality bars.
text_locales.ja: ml-internが10時間未満でQwen3-1.7BのGPQAを8.5%から32%まで引き上げ、Claude Codeの22.99%を上回ったことは、ローカルなポストトレーニングが信頼できるコーディングエージェント品質を生み出すことの直接的な証拠であり、エッジモデルが実用的なエージェント品質基準に到達するという前提を補強する。
text_locales.es: ml-intern elevando GPQA de Qwen3-1.7B del 8.5% al 32% en menos de 10 horas y superando el 22.99% de Claude Code es evidencia directa de que el post-entrenamiento local ahora produce calidad creible de agente de codificacion, reforzando la precondicion de que los modelos edge igualan los listones utiles de calidad de agente.
text_locales.fil: Ang pagtataas ng ml-intern sa Qwen3-1.7B GPQA mula 8.5% papuntang 32% sa loob ng wala pang 10 oras at ang paglampas sa 22.99% ng Claude Code ay direktang ebidensya na ang local post-training ay nakakagawa na ngayon ng credible coding-agent quality, na nagpapatibay sa precondition na ang edge models ay umaabot sa useful agent quality bars.

detail.description: **Acceleration of the "local-first, cloud-overflow" inversion.** Qwen3.6-35B-A3B's 73.4% on SWE-bench Verified and Bonsai 1.7B's 674 tok/s on CUDA push edge implementations into practical territory. By Q3 2026, individual / SMB coding agents will standardize on "local by default, cloud as overflow." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **Acceleration of the "local-first, cloud-overflow" inversion.** Qwen3.6-35B-A3B's 73.4% on SWE-bench Verified and Bonsai 1.7B's 674 tok/s on CUDA push edge implementations into practical territory. By Q3 2026, individual / SMB coding agents will standardize on "local by default, cloud as overflow." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **Acceleration of the "local-first, cloud-overflow" inversion.** Qwen3.6-35B-A3B's 73.4% on SWE-bench Verified and Bonsai 1.7B's 674 tok/s on CUDA push edge implementations into practical territory. By Q3 2026, individual / SMB coding agents will standardize on "local by default, cloud as overflow." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「ローカルファースト、クラウドはオーバーフロー」逆転の加速。** Qwen3.6-35B-A3BがSWE-bench Verifiedで73.4%、Bonsai 1.7BがCUDA上で674 tok/sを達成し、エッジ実装は実用領域へ押し上げられている。2026年Q3までに、個人/中小企業向けのコーディングエージェントは「ローカルをデフォルト、クラウドはオーバーフロー」へと標準化する。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Aceleración de la inversión "local primero, nube como desbordamiento".** El 73,4% de Qwen3.6-35B-A3B en SWE-bench Verified y los 674 tok/s de Bonsai 1.7B en CUDA llevan las implementaciones en el borde a un terreno práctico. Para el Q3 2026, los agentes de codificación individuales y de pymes se estandarizarán en "local por defecto, nube como desbordamiento". In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang individual at SMB coding agents ay magiging standard sa "local by default, cloud as overflow." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「学習用 vs 推論用のSKU分割」がカスタムAIシリコンの標準仕様になる。** GoogleのTPU 8t / 8i分割は、Trainium-Inferentiaのラインを延伸し、**ハイパースケーラの内製シリコンを学習用と推論用でアーキテクチャ的に分離**することを定着させる。2026年H2 / 2027年H1にかけて、Microsoft MAIAとMeta MTIAも同様のデュアルトラックSKU戦略を採用すると見込まれる — NVIDIA BlackwellやVera Rubinの「単一アーキテクチャで両ワークロード」路線と対立する形になる。推論向けにチューニングされたSKUはネイティブFP4 / MXFP4を前提とし、**$/queryの競争**を2026年Q3にピークへ押し上げる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **La "separacion de SKU entrenamiento-vs-inferencia" se convierte en el estandar para silicio AI personalizado.** La division TPU 8t / 8i de Google extiende la linea Trainium-vs-Inferentia y consolida el **silicio interno de los hyperscalers como arquitectonicamente separado para entrenamiento vs inferencia**. En H2 2026 / H1 2027, se espera que Microsoft MAIA y Meta MTIA adopten la misma estrategia de SKU dual — oponiendose a la "arquitectura unica, ambas cargas de trabajo" de NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin. Los SKU optimizados para inferencia asumen FP4 / MXFP4 nativo e impulsan la **competencia de $/consulta** a un pico en Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang "Training-vs-inference SKU split" ay nagiging pamantayan para sa custom AI silicon.** Ang TPU 8t / 8i split ng Google ay nag-eextend sa Trainium-vs-Inferentia line at nag-lo-lock in sa **hyperscaler in-house silicon bilang architecturally separate para sa training vs inference**. Sa H2 2026 / H1 2027, asahan na ang Microsoft MAIA at Meta MTIA ay magtitibay ng parehong dual-track SKU strategy — laban sa "single architecture, both workloads" ng NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin. Ang inference-tuned SKUs ay nag-aassume ng native FP4 / MXFP4 at nagtutulak ng **$/query competition** sa peak sa Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

reasoning.because: Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends Trainium-vs-Inferentia, codifying separate training vs inference SKUs.
reasoning.given: Inference and training have divergent compute profiles; FP4 / MXFP4 economics reward dedicated inference silicon.
reasoning.so_that: Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA adopt dual-track SKUs and inference-tuned chips drive $/query competition to a peak.
reasoning.landing: H2 2026 / H1 2027; MAIA + MTIA dual-track SKUs visible, $/query peak in Q3 2026.
reasoning.plain_language: Big tech now builds two AI chips: one for training models and one for running them. Cheaper, faster answers will follow soon.

because.en: Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends Trainium-vs-Inferentia, codifying separate training vs inference SKUs.

given.es: La inferencia y el entrenamiento tienen perfiles de computo divergentes; la economia de FP4 / MXFP4 recompensa silicio de inferencia dedicado.
given.fil: Ang inference at training ay may magkaibang compute profiles; ang FP4 / MXFP4 economics ay nagrere-reward sa dedicated inference silicon.

plain_language.en: Big tech now builds two AI chips: one for training models and one for running them. Cheaper, faster answers will follow soon.
plain_language.ja: 大手テックは現在、AIチップを2種類作っている:モデルを訓練するためのものと、実行するためのものだ。より安く、より速い回答がまもなく続くだろう。
plain_language.es: Las grandes tecnologicas ahora construyen dos chips de AI: uno para entrenar modelos y otro para ejecutarlos. Pronto vendran respuestas mas baratas y rapidas.
plain_language.fil: Ang big tech ngayon ay gumagawa ng dalawang AI chips: isa para sa pag-train ng models at isa para sa pagpapatakbo ng mga ito. Mas mura at mas mabilis na sagot ang susunod sa lalong madaling panahon.

detail.summary_short: Google's TPU 8t / 8i announcement extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia split and codifies hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference. By H2 2026 / H1 2027, Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA are expected to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy, with inference SKUs driving $/query competition to a peak.

summary_short_locales.en: Google's TPU 8t / 8i announcement extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia split and codifies hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference. By H2 2026 / H1 2027, Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA are expected to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy, with inference SKUs driving $/query competition to a peak.
summary_short_locales.ja: GoogleのTPU 8t / 8i発表はTrainium-Inferentia型の分割を延伸し、ハイパースケーラの内製シリコンを学習用と推論用でアーキテクチャ的に分離することを定式化する。2026年H2 / 2027年H1までに、Microsoft MAIAとMeta MTIAも同じデュアルトラックSKU戦略を採用すると見込まれ、推論SKUが$/query競争をピークへ押し上げる。
summary_short_locales.es: El anuncio TPU 8t / 8i de Google extiende la division Trainium-vs-Inferentia y codifica el silicio interno de los hyperscalers como arquitectonicamente separado para entrenamiento vs inferencia. Para H2 2026 / H1 2027, se espera que Microsoft MAIA y Meta MTIA adopten la misma estrategia de SKU dual, con SKU de inferencia llevando la competencia de $/consulta a un pico.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang anunsyo ng TPU 8t / 8i ng Google ay nag-eextend sa Trainium-vs-Inferentia split at nag-cocodify ng hyperscaler in-house silicon bilang architecturally separate para sa training vs inference. Sa pamamagitan ng H2 2026 / H1 2027, ang Microsoft MAIA at Meta MTIA ay inaasahang magtitibay ng parehong dual-track SKU strategy, kung saan ang inference SKUs ay nagtutulak ng $/query competition sa peak.

bridges.text: AWS's Apr 27 roundup deepens the Trainium silicon-level co-engineering with Anthropic and Meta-Graviton CPU at scale, reinforcing that hyperscalers continue to architect inference-class silicon distinct from training-class accelerators. The precondition that custom AI silicon splits cleanly along workload lines holds with fresh partnership detail rather than a new tape-out.

text_locales.en: AWS's Apr 27 roundup deepens the Trainium silicon-level co-engineering with Anthropic and Meta-Graviton CPU at scale, reinforcing that hyperscalers continue to architect inference-class silicon distinct from training-class accelerators. The precondition that custom AI silicon splits cleanly along workload lines holds with fresh partnership detail rather than a new tape-out.
text_locales.ja: AWSの4月27日ラウンドアップは、AnthropicとのTrainiumシリコンレベル協調エンジニアリングとMeta-Gravitonの大規模CPUを深化させ、ハイパースケーラーがトレーニング級アクセラレータとは別個に推論級シリコンを設計し続けていることを補強している。カスタムAIシリコンがワークロード・ラインに沿って明確に分かれるという前提条件は、新しいテープアウトではなく新鮮なパートナーシップの詳細とともに維持されている。
text_locales.es: El roundup del 27 de abril de AWS profundiza la co-ingenieria a nivel de silicio Trainium con Anthropic y Meta-Graviton CPU a escala, reforzando que los hyperscalers continuan arquitecturando silicio inference-class distinto de aceleradores training-class. La precondicion de que el silicio personalizado de IA se divide limpiamente por lineas de workload se mantiene con detalle fresco de partnership en lugar de un nuevo tape-out.
text_locales.fil: Ang Apr 27 roundup ng AWS ay pinapalalim ang Trainium silicon-level co-engineering kasama ang Anthropic at Meta-Graviton CPU sa scale, na nagpapatibay na ang hyperscalers ay patuloy na nag-aarchitect ng inference-class silicon na hiwalay sa training-class accelerators. Ang precondition na ang custom AI silicon ay naghahati nang malinis sa workload lines ay nananatili na may sariwang partnership detail sa halip na bagong tape-out.

bridges.text: AWS doubling down on Trainium for training and Graviton for CPU-heavy agentic workloads reinforces the structural force the prediction names — hyperscaler in-house silicon is the differentiation layer, with workload-specialized SKUs increasingly the operative shape.

text_locales.en: AWS doubling down on Trainium for training and Graviton for CPU-heavy agentic workloads reinforces the structural force the prediction names — hyperscaler in-house silicon is the differentiation layer, with workload-specialized SKUs increasingly the operative shape.
text_locales.ja: AWS がトレーニングに Trainium、CPU 重めのエージェンティック ワークロードに Graviton を二重に賭けていくことは、予測が指す構造的力を補強する — ハイパースケーラの自社シリコンが差別化レイヤーであり、ワークロード特化型 SKU が次第にその作動的形状となっている。
text_locales.es: AWS redoblando con Trainium para entrenamiento y Graviton para cargas agentic intensivas en CPU refuerza la fuerza estructural que la predicción nombra — el silicio interno del hyperscaler es la capa de diferenciación, con SKUs especializados por carga de trabajo cada vez más como la forma operativa.
text_locales.fil: Ang AWS na nagdo-doble down sa Trainium para sa training at Graviton para sa CPU-heavy agentic workloads ay pinatatatag ang structural force na pinangalanan ng prediction — ang in-house silicon ng hyperscaler ang differentiation layer, kasama ang workload-specialized SKUs na lalong nagiging operative shape.

bridges.text: Cerebras' IPO filing speaks to inference-tier specialization but does not directly touch the training-vs-inference SKU split inside the hyperscaler in-house silicon roadmap that the prediction concerns.

text_locales.en: Cerebras' IPO filing speaks to inference-tier specialization but does not directly touch the training-vs-inference SKU split inside the hyperscaler in-house silicon roadmap that the prediction concerns.
text_locales.ja: Cerebras の IPO 申請は推論層の専門化に関係するが、予測が扱うハイパースケーラ内製シリコン ロードマップ内部での学習 vs 推論 SKU 分割には直接触れていない。
text_locales.es: La presentación de IPO de Cerebras habla de la especialización de nivel inferencia pero no toca directamente la división de SKU training-vs-inference dentro del roadmap de silicio in-house de hyperscaler que concierne a la predicción.
text_locales.fil: Ang IPO filing ng Cerebras ay tumutukoy sa inference-tier specialization ngunit hindi direktang humihipo sa training-vs-inference SKU split sa loob ng hyperscaler in-house silicon roadmap na sinasaklaw ng prediction.

bridges.text: Robotics & Automation News' Hannover Messe coverage of NVIDIA GB300 plus Jetson Thor in factory deployments under the Industrial AI Cloud reinforces the single-architecture training-and-inference posture rather than the dual-track split, and no Microsoft MAIA or Meta MTIA dual-SKU announcement lands inside the window.

text_locales.en: Robotics & Automation News' Hannover Messe coverage of NVIDIA GB300 plus Jetson Thor in factory deployments under the Industrial AI Cloud reinforces the single-architecture training-and-inference posture rather than the dual-track split, and no Microsoft MAIA or Meta MTIA dual-SKU announcement lands inside the window.
text_locales.ja: Robotics & Automation NewsのHannover Messeカバレッジ(NVIDIA GB300 + Jetson Thor、Industrial AI Cloud下の工場展開)は、二系統分割ではなく単一アーキテクチャの学習・推論姿勢を補強し、Microsoft MAIAやMeta MTIAの二系統SKU発表はウィンドウ内に着地しない。
text_locales.es: La cobertura de Hannover Messe de Robotics & Automation News sobre NVIDIA GB300 más Jetson Thor en despliegues de fábrica bajo la Industrial AI Cloud refuerza la postura de entrenamiento-e-inferencia de arquitectura única en lugar de la división dual, y ningún anuncio de SKU dual Microsoft MAIA o Meta MTIA llega dentro de la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang Robotics & Automation News' Hannover Messe coverage ng NVIDIA GB300 plus Jetson Thor sa factory deployments sa ilalim ng Industrial AI Cloud ay nagpapalakas sa single-architecture training-and-inference posture sa halip na dual-track split, at walang Microsoft MAIA o Meta MTIA dual-SKU announcement na lumapag sa loob ng window.

bridges.text: GPT-5.5's API pricing 2x GPT-5.4 with Codex's 40% output-token reduction sharpens the inference $/query axis, while Anthropic-AWS's 5GW Trainium + 1GW Trainium2/3 simultaneous-run shape locks the training-side dual-track silicon, keeping the structural split intact even as Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA dual-SKU announcements remain pending.

text_locales.en: GPT-5.5's API pricing 2x GPT-5.4 with Codex's 40% output-token reduction sharpens the inference $/query axis, while Anthropic-AWS's 5GW Trainium + 1GW Trainium2/3 simultaneous-run shape locks the training-side dual-track silicon, keeping the structural split intact even as Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA dual-SKU announcements remain pending.
text_locales.ja: GPT-5.5のAPI価格がGPT-5.4の2倍となりCodexの40%出力トークン削減で推論$/クエリ軸が鋭くなる一方、Anthropic-AWSの5GW Trainium + 1GW Trainium2/3同時稼働の形が学習側のデュアルトラック・シリコンをロックし、Microsoft MAIAとMeta MTIAのデュアルSKU発表が保留中であっても構造的分割が無傷のままである。
text_locales.es: El precio API de GPT-5.5 a 2x GPT-5.4 con la reducción del 40% de tokens de output de Codex agudiza el eje $/consulta de inferencia, mientras la forma de corrida simultánea de Anthropic-AWS de 5GW Trainium + 1GW Trainium2/3 bloquea el silicio de doble pista del lado de entrenamiento, manteniendo la división estructural intacta incluso mientras los anuncios de doble SKU de Microsoft MAIA y Meta MTIA permanecen pendientes.
text_locales.fil: Ang API pricing ng GPT-5.5 na 2x GPT-5.4 kasama ang 40% output-token reduction ng Codex ay nagpapatibay sa inference $/query axis, habang ang 5GW Trainium + 1GW Trainium2/3 simultaneous-run shape ng Anthropic-AWS ay nagla-lock sa training-side dual-track silicon, na pinananatiling buo ang structural split kahit pa nakabinbin pa ang Microsoft MAIA at Meta MTIA dual-SKU announcements.

bridges.text: Google Cloud Next '26 Day 3 emphasizing TPU 8i inference-optimization (1,152 TPUs, 3x SRAM) reinforces the dual-track SKU split, while NVIDIA Vera Rubin's 6-chip + Groq 3 LPU single-architecture stack hitting mass production sharpens the structural contrast, keeping the underlying market split intact even as MAIA / MTIA dual-SKU announcements remain pending.

text_locales.en: Google Cloud Next '26 Day 3 emphasizing TPU 8i inference-optimization (1,152 TPUs, 3x SRAM) reinforces the dual-track SKU split, while NVIDIA Vera Rubin's 6-chip + Groq 3 LPU single-architecture stack hitting mass production sharpens the structural contrast, keeping the underlying market split intact even as MAIA / MTIA dual-SKU announcements remain pending.
text_locales.ja: Google Cloud Next '26のDay 3がTPU 8iの推論最適化(1,152 TPU、SRAM 3倍)を強調することがデュアルトラックSKU分裂を補強し、NVIDIA Vera Rubinの6チップ + Groq 3 LPUシングル・アーキテクチャ・スタックが量産入りすることが構造的対比をシャープにし、MAIA / MTIAのデュアルSKU発表が保留中であっても、根底にある市場分裂は無傷のまま保たれている。
text_locales.es: Google Cloud Next '26 Día 3 enfatizando la optimización de inferencia TPU 8i (1,152 TPUs, SRAM 3x) refuerza la división dual-track SKU, mientras que el stack de 6 chips + Groq 3 LPU de arquitectura única de NVIDIA Vera Rubin alcanzando producción en masa agudiza el contraste estructural, manteniendo intacta la división subyacente del mercado incluso mientras los anuncios de SKU dual MAIA / MTIA permanecen pendientes.
text_locales.fil: Ang Google Cloud Next '26 Day 3 na nagdidiin sa TPU 8i inference-optimization (1,152 TPUs, 3x SRAM) ay nagpapatibay sa dual-track SKU split, habang ang NVIDIA Vera Rubin's 6-chip + Groq 3 LPU single-architecture stack na umaabot sa mass production ay pinatatalas ang structural contrast, na pinapanatili ang underlying market split kahit ang MAIA / MTIA dual-SKU announcements ay nananatiling pending.

bridges.text: NVIDIA's Vera Rubin platform shipping a 7-chip single-architecture stack into mass production sharpens the structural contrast that the prediction draws — hyperscaler dual-track SKU on one side, NVIDIA single-architecture on the other — while keeping the underlying market split intact, even as MAIA / MTIA dual-SKU announcements remain pending.

text_locales.en: NVIDIA's Vera Rubin platform shipping a 7-chip single-architecture stack into mass production sharpens the structural contrast that the prediction draws — hyperscaler dual-track SKU on one side, NVIDIA single-architecture on the other — while keeping the underlying market split intact, even as MAIA / MTIA dual-SKU announcements remain pending.
text_locales.ja: NVIDIAのVera Rubinプラットフォームが7チップ単一アーキテクチャスタックを量産にリリースしていることは、予測が描く構造的対比を鮮明にしている ― 一方ではハイパースケーラーのデュアルトラックSKU、他方ではNVIDIAの単一アーキテクチャ ― MAIA / MTIAデュアルSKUの発表が保留中であっても、根本的な市場分裂は維持されている。
text_locales.es: La plataforma Vera Rubin de NVIDIA enviando un stack de 7 chips de arquitectura única a producción en masa agudiza el contraste estructural que dibuja la predicción — SKU dual-track de hyperscaler en un lado, arquitectura única de NVIDIA en el otro — manteniendo intacta la división subyacente del mercado, incluso mientras los anuncios de SKU dual MAIA / MTIA permanecen pendientes.
text_locales.fil: Ang Vera Rubin platform ng NVIDIA na nagpapadala ng 7-chip single-architecture stack sa mass production ay nagpapatalas sa structural contrast na binubuod ng prediction — hyperscaler dual-track SKU sa isang panig, NVIDIA single-architecture sa kabilang panig — habang pinapanatili ang underlying market split, kahit na ang MAIA / MTIA dual-SKU announcements ay nakabinbin pa.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「学習用 vs 推論用のSKU分割」がカスタムAIシリコンの標準仕様になる。** GoogleのTPU 8t / 8i分割は、Trainium-Inferentiaのラインを延伸し、**ハイパースケーラの内製シリコンを学習用と推論用でアーキテクチャ的に分離**することを定着させる。2026年H2 / 2027年H1にかけて、Microsoft MAIAとMeta MTIAも同様のデュアルトラックSKU戦略を採用すると見込まれる — NVIDIA BlackwellやVera Rubinの「単一アーキテクチャで両ワークロード」路線と対立する形になる。推論向けにチューニングされたSKUはネイティブFP4 / MXFP4を前提とし、**$/queryの競争**を2026年Q3にピークへ押し上げる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **La "separacion de SKU entrenamiento-vs-inferencia" se convierte en el estandar para silicio AI personalizado.** La division TPU 8t / 8i de Google extiende la linea Trainium-vs-Inferentia y consolida el **silicio interno de los hyperscalers como arquitectonicamente separado para entrenamiento vs inferencia**. En H2 2026 / H1 2027, se espera que Microsoft MAIA y Meta MTIA adopten la misma estrategia de SKU dual — oponiendose a la "arquitectura unica, ambas cargas de trabajo" de NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin. Los SKU optimizados para inferencia asumen FP4 / MXFP4 nativo e impulsan la **competencia de $/consulta** a un pico en Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang "Training-vs-inference SKU split" ay nagiging pamantayan para sa custom AI silicon.** Ang TPU 8t / 8i split ng Google ay nag-eextend sa Trainium-vs-Inferentia line at nag-lo-lock in sa **hyperscaler in-house silicon bilang architecturally separate para sa training vs inference**. Sa H2 2026 / H1 2027, asahan na ang Microsoft MAIA at Meta MTIA ay magtitibay ng parehong dual-track SKU strategy — laban sa "single architecture, both workloads" ng NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin. Ang inference-tuned SKUs ay nag-aassume ng native FP4 / MXFP4 at nagtutulak ng **$/query competition** sa peak sa Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative
nodes.short_label: Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative
nodes.title: Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative
nodes.description: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative — Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-margin gate.** With combined 2026 capex guidance from Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), and Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) totaling ~$650B-$700B against Wall Street's "AI ROI reality check," the Apr 29-30 prints either validate the **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** thesis or trigger a multiple compression. By Q3 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — the first explicit "AI infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud, ending the 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative — Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-margin gate.** With combined 2026 capex guidance from Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), and Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) totaling ~$650B-$700B against Wall Street's "AI ROI reality check," the Apr 29-30 prints either validate the **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** thesis or trigger a multiple compression. By Q3 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — the first explicit "AI infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud, ending the 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **Mag 7 の Q1 決算 (4/29-30) が AI capex の ROI ナラティブを再設定する — Q3 2026 までに、トークンマージンの閾値で AI capex を公に階層化する最初のハイパースケーラが登場する。** Alphabet ($175B-$185B)、Amazon (約 $200B)、Meta ($115B-$135B)、そして Microsoft (Azure 出遅れによる再評価リスク) を合算した 2026 capex ガイダンスは合計 ~$650B-$700B に達し、ウォール街の「AI ROI リアリティチェック」と対峙する。4/29-30 の決算は、**トークン単位売上のエグジットベロシティ**仮説を裏付けるか、それともマルチプル圧縮を引き起こすかのいずれかとなる。Q3 2026 までに、Big-3 ハイパースケーラの少なくとも 1 社は **Bedrock / Azure / Vertex のトークン単位マージン下限で増分 GPU capex を公にゲーティング** — パブリッククラウドからの初の明示的な「AI インフラ ROI 閾値」が登場し、2024-2025 の「使え、さもなくば死ね」ドクトリンに終止符を打つ。フロンティアラボのアンカーディール (Google $40B / Anthropic、Amazon $25B / Anthropic、OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) が可視的な圧力解放弁になる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Los resultados del Q1 de Mag 7 (29-30 de abril) reinician la narrativa del ROI del capex en IA — el Q3 2026 ve al primer hyperscaler que tiera públicamente el capex de IA por una valla de margen por token.** Con la guía combinada de capex 2026 de Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B) y Microsoft (riesgo de rerating por rezago de Azure) totalizando ~$650B-$700B contra el "AI ROI reality check" de Wall Street, las publicaciones del 29-30 de abril o validan la tesis de **velocidad-de-salida de ingresos por token** o disparan una compresión de múltiplos. Para el Q3 2026, al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers públicamente **gatea el capex incremental de GPU sobre un piso de margen por token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex** — el primer umbral explícito de "ROI de infra de IA" de una nube pública, terminando la doctrina de "gastar o morir" de 2024-2025. Los acuerdos ancla con laboratorios frontier (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) se convierten en la válvula visible de alivio de presión. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) ay magre-reset ng AI-capex ROI narrative — pagsapit ng Q3 2026, makikita ang unang hyperscaler na pampublikong magti-tier ng AI capex sa pamamagitan ng token-margin gate.** Sa pinagsamang 2026 capex guidance mula sa Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), at Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) na umaabot sa ~$650B-$700B laban sa "AI ROI reality check" ng Wall Street, ang Apr 29-30 prints ay magpapatunay sa **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** thesis o magti-trigger ng multiple compression. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, kahit isa sa Big-3 hyperscalers ay pampublikong **maglalagay ng gate sa incremental GPU capex sa pamamagitan ng Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — ang unang tahasang "AI infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud, na nagtatapos sa 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Ang frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) ay magiging visible pressure relief valve. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly tiers incremental GPU spend on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor, ending the 2024-2025 spend-or-die doctrine.

By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly tiers incremental GPU spend on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor, ending the 2024-2025 spend-or-die doctrine.
summary_short_locales.ja: Mag 7 合算の 2026 AI capex ガイダンスは約 $650B-$700B に近く、4/29-30 の決算でウォール街の ROI リアリティチェックと対峙する。Q3 2026 までに、Big-3 ハイパースケーラの少なくとも 1 社が Bedrock / Azure / Vertex のトークン単位マージン下限で増分 GPU 支出を公に階層化し、2024-2025 の「使え、さもなくば死ね」ドクトリンに終止符を打つ。
summary_short_locales.es: La guía combinada de capex de IA 2026 de Mag 7 cerca de $650B-$700B se encuentra con el AI ROI reality check de Wall Street en las publicaciones del 29-30 de abril. Para el Q3 2026 al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers tiera públicamente el gasto incremental en GPU sobre un piso de margen por token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex, terminando la doctrina de gastar o morir de 2024-2025.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang pinagsamang 2026 Mag 7 AI capex guidance na malapit sa $650B-$700B ay sasalubungin ng AI ROI reality check ng Wall Street sa Apr 29-30 prints. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, kahit isa sa Big-3 hyperscalers ay pampublikong magti-tier ng incremental GPU spend sa Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor, na nagtatapos sa 2024-2025 spend-or-die doctrine.

bridges.text: AMD's May 5 print preview tightens the structural force the prediction names: the MI308 China collapse plus the analyst split (Cathie Wood trim, DA Davidson Buy, RBC Hold) shows buyside pressure for explicit AI-capex ROI disclosure is now operative on a per-vendor basis, exactly the precondition for a hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-margin gate.

text_locales.en: AMD's May 5 print preview tightens the structural force the prediction names: the MI308 China collapse plus the analyst split (Cathie Wood trim, DA Davidson Buy, RBC Hold) shows buyside pressure for explicit AI-capex ROI disclosure is now operative on a per-vendor basis, exactly the precondition for a hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-margin gate.
text_locales.ja: AMDの5月5日決算プレビューは、予測が指摘する構造的な強制力を引き締める: MI308中国崩壊 + アナリストの分裂(Cathie Woodの売却、DA DavidsonのBuy、RBCのHold)が、明示的なAI-capex ROI開示に対するバイサイドの圧力がベンダー単位で運用されていることを示しており、これはハイパースケーラーがAI capexをトークン単位マージン・ゲートで公に階層化する前提条件そのものである。
text_locales.es: El avance de la impresión del 5 de mayo de AMD ajusta la fuerza estructural que la predicción nombra: el colapso de MI308 China más la división de analistas (recorte de Cathie Wood, Buy de DA Davidson, Hold de RBC) muestra que la presión del lado comprador para divulgación explícita de ROI de capex de IA ahora opera por proveedor, exactamente la precondición para que un hyperscaler escalone públicamente el capex de IA por puerta de margen por token.
text_locales.fil: Ang AMD May 5 print preview ay nagpapatigas sa structural force na pinangalanan ng prediction: ang MI308 China collapse plus ang analyst split (Cathie Wood trim, DA Davidson Buy, RBC Hold) ay nagpapakita na ang buyside pressure para sa explicit AI-capex ROI disclosure ay aktibo na ngayon sa per-vendor basis, eksaktong precondition para sa isang hyperscaler na pampublikong mag-tier ng AI capex sa pamamagitan ng token-margin gate.

bridges.text: Apple's Q3 guide without an AI-services line, the $700B 2026 capex tape, and Microsoft's $37B run-rate disclosure are exactly the buyside-pressure signals the prediction needed to move from narrative to disclosure-shape. The cohort is now publicly competing on per-token-margin transparency rather than hiding behind aggregate cloud revenue.

text_locales.en: Apple's Q3 guide without an AI-services line, the $700B 2026 capex tape, and Microsoft's $37B run-rate disclosure are exactly the buyside-pressure signals the prediction needed to move from narrative to disclosure-shape. The cohort is now publicly competing on per-token-margin transparency rather than hiding behind aggregate cloud revenue.
text_locales.ja: AppleのQ3ガイダンスがAIサービスラインなし、$700Bの2026年capexテープ、Microsoftの$37B run-rate開示が、予測が物語から開示形へ移るために必要だった買い手側圧力信号そのものだ。コホートは今や、集約クラウド収益の背後に隠れるのではなく、トークン当たりマージンの透明性で公に競争している。
text_locales.es: La guía Q3 de Apple sin línea de servicios de IA, el tape de capex 2026 de $700B y la divulgación de run-rate de $37B de Microsoft son exactamente las señales de presión del lado comprador que la predicción necesitaba para moverse de narrativa a forma de divulgación. El cohorte ahora compite públicamente sobre transparencia de margen por token en lugar de esconderse detrás de ingresos agregados de nube.
text_locales.fil: Ang Q3 guide ng Apple na walang AI-services line, ang $700B 2026 capex tape, at ang $37B run-rate disclosure ng Microsoft ang eksaktong buyside-pressure signals na kinailangan ng prediction upang lumipat mula narrative tungo sa disclosure-shape. Ang cohort ngayon ay pampublikong nagkukumpetensya sa per-token-margin transparency sa halip na magtago sa likod ng aggregate cloud revenue.

bridges.text: Apple's $100B buyback and clean +14-17% guide rebuilt the AI-capex-on-faith tape exactly when the prediction expected the buyside to demand a per-token-margin gate; AMD's May 5 print and the Cerebras IPO are the next pressure points that should produce that disclosure.

text_locales.en: Apple's $100B buyback and clean +14-17% guide rebuilt the AI-capex-on-faith tape exactly when the prediction expected the buyside to demand a per-token-margin gate; AMD's May 5 print and the Cerebras IPO are the next pressure points that should produce that disclosure.
text_locales.ja: Appleの$100B自社株買いとクリーンな+14-17%ガイドが、予測がトークンあたりマージンゲートをバイサイドが要求すると期待したまさにそのとき、AI設備投資オン信仰テープを再構築した;AMDの5月5日決算とCerebras IPOがその開示を生み出すはずの次の圧力点だ。
text_locales.es: La recompra de $100B de Apple y la guía limpia +14-17% reconstruyeron la cinta de capex-IA-por-fe exactamente cuando la predicción esperaba que el lado comprador exigiera una puerta de margen-por-token; la impresión AMD del 5 mayo y la IPO de Cerebras son los siguientes puntos de presión que deberían producir esa divulgación.
text_locales.fil: Ang $100B buyback ng Apple at malinis na +14-17% guide ay muling nagbuo sa AI-capex-on-faith tape eksakto nang hilingin ng buyside ang per-token-margin gate na inaasahan ng prediction; ang May 5 print ng AMD at ang Cerebras IPO ay ang susunod na pressure points na dapat magpoduce ng disclosure na iyon.

bridges.text: Apple's clean Q2 beat plus the $700B 2026 AI-capex tracking number and Apple's $100B buyback land the cohort-side of the Mag 7 super-week reset, but no hyperscaler has yet stated a per-token-margin gate. Microsoft's $37B AI run-rate disclosure remains the closest precedent, one structural step short of the explicit gate the prediction calls for.

text_locales.en: Apple's clean Q2 beat plus the $700B 2026 AI-capex tracking number and Apple's $100B buyback land the cohort-side of the Mag 7 super-week reset, but no hyperscaler has yet stated a per-token-margin gate. Microsoft's $37B AI run-rate disclosure remains the closest precedent, one structural step short of the explicit gate the prediction calls for.
text_locales.ja: AppleのクリーンなQ2 ビートに加え、7,000億ドルの2026年AI設備投資追跡数値とAppleの1,000億ドル自社株買いは、Mag 7スーパーウィークリセットのコホート側を着地させるが、ハイパースケーラーはまだトークンあたりマージンゲートを述べていない。Microsoftの370億ドルAIランレート開示が依然として最も近い前例であり、予測が要求する明示的なゲートよりも構造的に1ステップ短い。
text_locales.es: El beat limpio Q2 de Apple más el número de tracking de capex-IA-2026 de $700B y la recompra de $100B de Apple aterrizan el lado-cohorte del reset de la super-semana Mag 7, pero ningún hyperscaler ha enunciado aún un gate por token-margin. La disclosure del run-rate IA de $37B de Microsoft sigue siendo el precedente más cercano, un paso estructural por debajo del gate explícito que la predicción exige.
text_locales.fil: Ang malinis na Q2 beat ng Apple plus ang $700B 2026 AI-capex tracking number at ang $100B buyback ng Apple ay naghatid ng cohort-side ng Mag 7 super-week reset, ngunit walang hyperscaler na nag-state pa ng per-token-margin gate. Ang $37B AI run-rate disclosure ng Microsoft ay nananatiling pinakamalapit na precedent, isang structural step na kulang sa explicit na gate na hinihingi ng prediction.

bridges.text: The Mag 7 print event landed exactly in the prediction's forecast window with Microsoft posting the first per-AI-business single-line $37B run-rate disclosure. That is one structural step short of an explicit per-token-margin gate but is the closest precedent any hyperscaler has set. META's -7% AH capex-shortfall reset reinforces the disclosure-pressure leg.

text_locales.en: The Mag 7 print event landed exactly in the prediction's forecast window with Microsoft posting the first per-AI-business single-line $37B run-rate disclosure. That is one structural step short of an explicit per-token-margin gate but is the closest precedent any hyperscaler has set. META's -7% AH capex-shortfall reset reinforces the disclosure-pressure leg.
text_locales.ja: Mag 7決算イベントは予測の予測窓内ぴったりに着地し、MicrosoftがAI事業ごと初の単一行$37Bランレート開示を行った。これはトークンあたりマージン明示ゲートに構造的に1ステップ短いが、どのハイパースケーラもこれまで設定したことのない最も近い先例である。METAの-7% AH capex不足リセットが開示圧力脚を強化する。
text_locales.es: El evento de prints Mag 7 aterrizó exactamente en la ventana de pronóstico de la predicción con Microsoft publicando la primera disclosure por-AI-business como sola línea de run-rate de $37B. Eso queda un paso estructural corto frente a un gate explícito de margen-por-token, pero es el precedente más cercano que ha sentado cualquier hyperscaler. El reset de -7% AH de META por shortfall de capex refuerza la pata de presión de disclosure.
text_locales.fil: Ang Mag 7 print event ay lumapag eksakto sa forecast window ng prediction kasama ng Microsoft na nag-post ng unang per-AI-business single-line $37B run-rate disclosure. Iyon ay isang structural step kulang sa explicit per-token-margin gate ngunit ang pinakamalapit na precedent na itinakda ng anumang hyperscaler. Ang -7% AH capex-shortfall reset ng META ay nagpapatibay sa disclosure-pressure leg.

bridges.text: The Apr 29-30 Mag-7 print collision with Powell's final FOMC presser arrives exactly as the prediction projected, on top of Apr 28's WSJ-driven OpenAI-revenue-miss tape crack. The landing window the prediction names - prints + FOMC compressing the AI-capex ROI debate into a single 24-hour tape - is materializing as scripted; what's left to verify is whether at least one Big-3 hyperscaler tiers capex on a per-token-margin floor by Q3 2026.

text_locales.en: The Apr 29-30 Mag-7 print collision with Powell's final FOMC presser arrives exactly as the prediction projected, on top of Apr 28's WSJ-driven OpenAI-revenue-miss tape crack. The landing window the prediction names - prints + FOMC compressing the AI-capex ROI debate into a single 24-hour tape - is materializing as scripted; what's left to verify is whether at least one Big-3 hyperscaler tiers capex on a per-token-margin floor by Q3 2026.
text_locales.ja: 4月29-30日のMag-7プリント衝突がPowellの最終FOMC記者会見と重なり、4月28日のWSJ駆動OpenAI収益ミス・テープ・クラックの上に、まさに予測が投影した通りに到着している。予測が指摘する着地ウィンドウ - プリント + FOMCがAI-capex ROI議論を単一の24時間テープに圧縮 - はスクリプト通りに物質化している。残された検証は、少なくとも1つのBig-3ハイパースケーラーが2026年Q3までにトークン単位マージン・フロアでcapexを階層化するかどうかだ。
text_locales.es: La colision de resultados Mag-7 del 29-30 de abril con la conferencia final FOMC de Powell llega exactamente como la prediccion proyecto, encima de la cinta del fallo-de-ingresos-de-OpenAI impulsada por WSJ del 28 de abril. La ventana de aterrizaje que la prediccion nombra - resultados + FOMC comprimiendo el debate del ROI del capex de IA en una sola cinta de 24-horas - se esta materializando como guion; lo que queda por verificar es si al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 tierara capex sobre un piso de margen-por-token para el Q3 2026.
text_locales.fil: Ang Apr 29-30 Mag-7 print collision kasama ang final FOMC presser ni Powell ay dumarating nang eksakto sa ipino-project ng hula, sa ibabaw ng Apr 28 WSJ-driven OpenAI-revenue-miss tape crack. Ang landing window na pinapangalanan ng hula - prints + FOMC na nag-co-compress ng AI-capex ROI debate sa iisang 24-hour tape - ay nag-mamaterialize gaya ng inilarawan; ang natitira sa pag-verify ay kung kahit isang Big-3 hyperscaler ay mag-tier ng capex sa per-token-margin floor pagsapit ng Q3 2026.

bridges.text: FOMC and Mag 7 prints colliding into the same 48h tape with ~$700B capex on the table is the landing-window the prediction set; Apr 27's contract restructurings give the relief-valve framing and the per-token-margin disclosure setup the thesis expected.

text_locales.en: FOMC and Mag 7 prints colliding into the same 48h tape with ~$700B capex on the table is the landing-window the prediction set; Apr 27's contract restructurings give the relief-valve framing and the per-token-margin disclosure setup the thesis expected.
text_locales.ja: FOMC と Mag 7 決算が同じ 48 時間のテープに衝突し、テーブルに約 $700B の capex が乗ることは、予測が定めたランディング ウィンドウだ; 4/27 の契約再構築が、テーゼが見込んだ圧力解放のフレーミングとトークン単位マージン開示のセットアップを与える。
text_locales.es: FOMC y las publicaciones Mag 7 chocando en la misma cinta de 48h con ~$700B de capex sobre la mesa es la ventana de aterrizaje que estableció la predicción; las reestructuraciones de contratos del 27 de abril dan el marco de válvula de alivio y la configuración de divulgación de margen-por-token que esperaba la tesis.
text_locales.fil: Ang FOMC at Mag 7 prints na kumukolisyon sa parehong 48h tape na may ~$700B capex sa lamesa ay ang landing-window na itinakda ng prediction; ang Apr 27 contract restructurings ay nagbibigay ng relief-valve framing at ang per-token-margin disclosure setup na inaasahan ng thesis.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative — Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-margin gate.** With combined 2026 capex guidance from Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), and Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) totaling ~$650B-$700B against Wall Street's "AI ROI reality check," the Apr 29-30 prints either validate the **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** thesis or trigger a multiple compression. By Q3 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — the first explicit "AI infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud, ending the 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

By Q3 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — the first explicit "AI infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud, ending the 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative — Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-margin gate.** With combined 2026 capex guidance from Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), and Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) totaling ~$650B-$700B against Wall Street's "AI ROI reality check," the Apr 29-30 prints either validate the **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** thesis or trigger a multiple compression. By Q3 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — the first explicit "AI infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud, ending the 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **Mag 7 の Q1 決算 (4/29-30) が AI capex の ROI ナラティブを再設定する — Q3 2026 までに、トークンマージンの閾値で AI capex を公に階層化する最初のハイパースケーラが登場する。** Alphabet ($175B-$185B)、Amazon (約 $200B)、Meta ($115B-$135B)、そして Microsoft (Azure 出遅れによる再評価リスク) を合算した 2026 capex ガイダンスは合計 ~$650B-$700B に達し、ウォール街の「AI ROI リアリティチェック」と対峙する。4/29-30 の決算は、**トークン単位売上のエグジットベロシティ**仮説を裏付けるか、それともマルチプル圧縮を引き起こすかのいずれかとなる。Q3 2026 までに、Big-3 ハイパースケーラの少なくとも 1 社は **Bedrock / Azure / Vertex のトークン単位マージン下限で増分 GPU capex を公にゲーティング** — パブリッククラウドからの初の明示的な「AI インフラ ROI 閾値」が登場し、2024-2025 の「使え、さもなくば死ね」ドクトリンに終止符を打つ。フロンティアラボのアンカーディール (Google $40B / Anthropic、Amazon $25B / Anthropic、OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) が可視的な圧力解放弁になる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Los resultados del Q1 de Mag 7 (29-30 de abril) reinician la narrativa del ROI del capex en IA — el Q3 2026 ve al primer hyperscaler que tiera públicamente el capex de IA por una valla de margen por token.** Con la guía combinada de capex 2026 de Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B) y Microsoft (riesgo de rerating por rezago de Azure) totalizando ~$650B-$700B contra el "AI ROI reality check" de Wall Street, las publicaciones del 29-30 de abril o validan la tesis de **velocidad-de-salida de ingresos por token** o disparan una compresión de múltiplos. Para el Q3 2026, al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers públicamente **gatea el capex incremental de GPU sobre un piso de margen por token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex** — el primer umbral explícito de "ROI de infra de IA" de una nube pública, terminando la doctrina de "gastar o morir" de 2024-2025. Los acuerdos ancla con laboratorios frontier (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) se convierten en la válvula visible de alivio de presión. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) ay magre-reset ng AI-capex ROI narrative — pagsapit ng Q3 2026, makikita ang unang hyperscaler na pampublikong magti-tier ng AI capex sa pamamagitan ng token-margin gate.** Sa pinagsamang 2026 capex guidance mula sa Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), at Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) na umaabot sa ~$650B-$700B laban sa "AI ROI reality check" ng Wall Street, ang Apr 29-30 prints ay magpapatunay sa **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** thesis o magti-trigger ng multiple compression. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, kahit isa sa Big-3 hyperscalers ay pampublikong **maglalagay ng gate sa incremental GPU capex sa pamamagitan ng Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — ang unang tahasang "AI infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud, na nagtatapos sa 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Ang frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) ay magiging visible pressure relief valve. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first
nodes.description: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure from a hyperscaler by Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal anchor the new doctrine.** Combined Mag 7 capex of ~$700B for 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending to ~$170B FY27) lands into a tape that has already shifted from "rewarding capex on faith" to "demanding tangible profit." **Apr 27 contract restructurings explicitly route AI-lab compute through hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton with Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs at scale). By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. NVDA $5T-class market cap and AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory hold; the spend curve doesn't break, but its disclosure language does. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure from a hyperscaler by Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal anchor the new doctrine.** Combined Mag 7 capex of ~$700B for 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending to ~$170B FY27) lands into a tape that has already shifted from "rewarding capex on faith" to "demanding tangible profit." **Apr 27 contract restructurings explicitly route AI-lab compute through hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton with Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs at scale). By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. NVDA $5T-class market cap and AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory hold; the spend curve doesn't break, but its disclosure language does. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **Mag 7 決算 + 4/28-29 FOMC が、Q3 2026 までにハイパースケーラからの初の **トークン単位マージンでゲーティングされた capex** 開示を強要する — 4/27 の OpenAI / Microsoft 協定 + Anthropic / AWS Trainium のシリコンレベル ディールが新ドクトリンを定礎する。** 2026 年の Mag 7 合算 capex 約 $700B (Alphabet $175B-$185B、Amazon 約 $200B、Meta $115B-$135B、Microsoft 約 $146B FY26 から FY27 で約 $170B へトレンド) は、すでに「信仰に基づき capex を報いる」から「具体的な利益を要求する」へとシフトしたテープに着地する。**4/27 の契約再構築は AI ラボの計算リソースをハイパースケーラ自社シリコン経由に明示的にルーティング** している (Anthropic との AWS Trainium / Graviton、スケールでの Meta-Graviton CPU)。Q3 2026 までに Big-3 ハイパースケーラの少なくとも 1 社が **増分 GPU capex を Bedrock / Azure / Vertex のトークン単位マージン下限でゲーティング** する — パブリッククラウドからの初の明示的な「AI インフラ ROI 閾値」となる。NVDA $5T クラスの時価総額と AMD / Cerebras IPO 軌道は維持される。支出曲線は折れないが、その開示言語は折れる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Las publicaciones de Mag 7 + FOMC del 28-29 de abril fuerzan la primera divulgación de **capex con margen-por-token gateado** desde un hyperscaler para Q3 2026 — el pacto OpenAI/Microsoft del 27 de abril + el acuerdo Anthropic/AWS Trainium a nivel de silicio anclan la nueva doctrina.** El capex combinado de Mag 7 de ~$700B para 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 tendiendo a ~$170B FY27) aterriza en una cinta que ya ha pasado de "recompensar el capex con fe" a "exigir ganancia tangible." **Las reestructuraciones de contratos del 27 de abril enrutan explícitamente la computación de los AI-labs a través del silicio propiedad del hyperscaler** (AWS Trainium/Graviton con Anthropic; CPUs Meta-Graviton a escala). Para Q3 2026 al menos un Big-3 hyperscaler **gatea públicamente el capex incremental de GPU sobre un piso de margen-por-token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex** — primer "umbral de ROI de AI-infra" explícito de un cloud público. La capitalización de mercado de NVDA tipo $5T y la trayectoria de IPO AMD/Cerebras se mantienen; la curva de gasto no se rompe, pero su lenguaje de divulgación sí. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 ay magpipilit sa unang **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure mula sa hyperscaler pagsapit ng Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal ang nag-aanchor sa bagong doctrine.** Ang pinagsamang Mag 7 capex na ~$700B para sa 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending sa ~$170B FY27) ay tumatama sa tape na lumipat na mula sa "rewarding capex on faith" patungo sa "demanding tangible profit." **Ang Apr 27 contract restructurings ay tahasang nagru-route ng AI-lab compute sa pamamagitan ng hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton kasama ang Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs sa scale). Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, kahit isa sa Big-3 hyperscaler ay pampublikong **maglalagay ng gate sa incremental GPU capex sa Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — ang unang tahasang "AI-infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud. Ang NVDA $5T-class market cap at AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory ay nananatili; hindi mababasag ang spend curve, ngunit ang disclosure language nito ay babasagin. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

because.en: Combined Mag 7 2026 AI capex near $700B lands into a tape demanding tangible profit, not faith-based capex
because.ja: Mag 7 の 2026 年合算 AI capex が約 $700B に達し、信仰ベースの capex ではなく具体的な利益を要求するテープに着地する
because.es: El capex AI combinado de Mag 7 2026 cerca de $700B aterriza en una cinta que exige ganancia tangible, no capex basado en fe
because.fil: Ang pinagsamang Mag 7 2026 AI capex na malapit sa $700B ay tumatama sa tape na humihingi ng tangible profit, hindi faith-based capex

given.en: Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal route lab compute through hyperscaler silicon

given.es: El pacto OpenAI/Microsoft del 27 de abril + el acuerdo Anthropic/AWS Trainium a nivel de silicio enrutan la computación de los labs a través del silicio del hyperscaler
given.fil: Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal ay nagru-route ng lab compute sa pamamagitan ng hyperscaler silicon

so_that.es: Al menos un Big-3 hyperscaler gatea públicamente el capex incremental de GPU sobre un piso de margen-por-token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex
so_that.fil: Kahit isa sa Big-3 hyperscaler ay pampublikong maglalagay ng gate sa incremental GPU capex sa Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor

landing.en: By Q3 2026; first explicit per-token-margin-gated AI-infra ROI threshold from a public cloud
landing.ja: Q3 2026 までに、パブリッククラウドからの初の明示的な、トークン単位マージンでゲーティングされた AI インフラ ROI 閾値
landing.es: Para Q3 2026; primer umbral de ROI de AI-infra con margen-por-token gateado explícito de un cloud público
landing.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026; unang tahasang per-token-margin-gated AI-infra ROI threshold mula sa public cloud

plain_language.en: Hyperscalers spend roughly $700B on AI in 2026, and after the new Apr 27 contracts one cloud will publicly cap new GPU spend by token-margin.
plain_language.ja: ハイパースケーラは 2026 年に AI へ約 $700B を投じる。新しい 4/27 契約の後、1 社のクラウドはトークン マージンによって新規 GPU 支出を公にキャップすることになる。
plain_language.es: Los hyperscalers gastan aproximadamente $700B en AI en 2026, y después de los nuevos contratos del 27 de abril una nube limitará públicamente el nuevo gasto de GPU por margen-de-token.
plain_language.fil: Hyperscalers spend roughly $700B on AI in 2026, and after the new Apr 27 contracts one cloud will publicly cap new GPU spend by token-margin.

title_locales.en: Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first
