title_locales.es: Las publicaciones de Mag 7 + FOMC del 28-29 de abril fuerzan el primero
title_locales.fil: Ang Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 ay magpipilit sa unang

detail.summary_short: Combined Mag 7 2026 AI capex near $700B meets a tape demanding tangible profit while Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft and Anthropic/AWS-Trainium deals route lab compute through hyperscaler silicon; by Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly gates incremental GPU capex on a per-token-margin floor.

summary_short_locales.en: Combined Mag 7 2026 AI capex near $700B meets a tape demanding tangible profit while Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft and Anthropic/AWS-Trainium deals route lab compute through hyperscaler silicon; by Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly gates incremental GPU capex on a per-token-margin floor.
summary_short_locales.ja: Mag 7 の 2026 年合算 AI capex 約 $700B が、具体的な利益を要求するテープに直面する一方で、4/27 の OpenAI / Microsoft と Anthropic / AWS-Trainium ディールがラボの計算リソースをハイパースケーラ シリコン経由にルーティングする。Q3 2026 までに Big-3 ハイパースケーラの少なくとも 1 社が、増分 GPU capex をトークン単位マージン下限で公にゲーティングする。
summary_short_locales.es: El capex AI combinado de Mag 7 2026 cerca de $700B se encuentra con una cinta que exige ganancia tangible mientras los acuerdos del 27 de abril OpenAI/Microsoft y Anthropic/AWS-Trainium enrutan la computación de los labs a través del silicio del hyperscaler; para Q3 2026 al menos un Big-3 hyperscaler gatea públicamente el capex incremental de GPU sobre un piso de margen-por-token.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang pinagsamang Mag 7 2026 AI capex na malapit sa $700B ay tumatagpo sa tape na humihingi ng tangible profit habang ang Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft at Anthropic/AWS-Trainium deals ay nagru-route ng lab compute sa pamamagitan ng hyperscaler silicon; pagsapit ng Q3 2026, kahit isa sa Big-3 hyperscaler ay pampublikong maglalagay ng gate sa incremental GPU capex sa per-token-margin floor.

bridges.text: The AMD MI308 cliff plus AAPL printing without an AI-services line plus the May 4 parallel-JV equity-template launches harden the structural force the prediction names: the buyside is being asked to underwrite ~$700B of 2026 capex without a per-token-margin disclosure unit, and the cohort is visibly cracking on the disclosure side.

text_locales.en: The AMD MI308 cliff plus AAPL printing without an AI-services line plus the May 4 parallel-JV equity-template launches harden the structural force the prediction names: the buyside is being asked to underwrite ~$700B of 2026 capex without a per-token-margin disclosure unit, and the cohort is visibly cracking on the disclosure side.
text_locales.ja: AMDのMI308崖 + AAPLがAIサービスラインなしで発表 + 5月4日の並行JVエクイティ・テンプレート・ローンチが、予測が指摘する構造的な強制力を硬化させる: バイサイドはトークン単位マージン開示単位なしに2026年capex 約$700Bを引き受けるよう求められており、コホートは開示側で目に見えてひび割れている。
text_locales.es: El precipicio MI308 de AMD más AAPL imprimiendo sin una línea de servicios de IA más los lanzamientos paralelos de plantilla de capital JV del 4 de mayo endurecen la fuerza estructural que la predicción nombra: se le pide al lado comprador que financie ~$700B de capex 2026 sin una unidad de divulgación de margen por token, y la cohorte está visiblemente cediendo en el lado de divulgación.
text_locales.fil: Ang AMD MI308 cliff plus AAPL na nagpi-print nang walang AI-services line plus ang May 4 parallel-JV equity-template launches ay nagpapatigas sa structural force na pinangalanan ng prediction: hinihingi sa buyside na pondohan ang ~$700B ng 2026 capex nang walang per-token-margin disclosure unit, at ang cohort ay nakikitang nagbabakli sa disclosure side.

bridges.text: AAPL's $100B buyback layered on the $700B capex tape and MSFT's $37B run-rate single-line disclosure keep the per-token-margin gating thesis active. Powell-stays-on-Board through 2028 plus the AMD May 5 print and the May 8 Apr jobs print add the macro-volatility leg that pressures hyperscalers toward harder per-token disclosure.

text_locales.en: AAPL's $100B buyback layered on the $700B capex tape and MSFT's $37B run-rate single-line disclosure keep the per-token-margin gating thesis active. Powell-stays-on-Board through 2028 plus the AMD May 5 print and the May 8 Apr jobs print add the macro-volatility leg that pressures hyperscalers toward harder per-token disclosure.
text_locales.ja: AAPLの$100B自社株買いが$700B capexテープに積層され、MSFTの$37B run-rate単一ライン開示と合わせて、トークン当たりマージンゲーティングテーゼが活発に保たれる。Powellが2028年まで理事会に残る決定とAMD 5月5日決算、5月8日の4月雇用統計が、ハイパースケーラーへのより厳格なトークン当たり開示への圧力をかけるマクロボラティリティの足を加える。
text_locales.es: La recompra de $100B de AAPL apilada sobre el tape de capex de $700B y la divulgación de línea única de run-rate de $37B de MSFT mantienen activa la tesis de gating de margen por token. Powell-se-queda-en-la-Junta hasta 2028 más la impresión de AMD del 5 de mayo y la impresión de empleos de abril del 8 de mayo añaden la pierna de volatilidad macro que presiona a los hyperscalers hacia una divulgación más dura por token.
text_locales.fil: Ang $100B buyback ng AAPL na nakapatong sa $700B capex tape at sa $37B run-rate single-line disclosure ng MSFT ay pinapanatiling aktibo ang per-token-margin gating thesis. Ang Powell-stays-on-Board hanggang 2028 plus ang AMD May 5 print at ang May 8 Apr jobs print ay nagdaragdag ng macro-volatility leg na nagpipilit sa hyperscalers tungo sa mas matigas na per-token disclosure.

bridges.text: Apple's $100B buyback plus the May 1 record tape rebuilt the AI-capex-on-faith conditioning that the prediction expects to crack into a per-token-margin gate, with the Apr 29 FOMC dissent supplying the institutional-risk pressure layer.

text_locales.en: Apple's $100B buyback plus the May 1 record tape rebuilt the AI-capex-on-faith conditioning that the prediction expects to crack into a per-token-margin gate, with the Apr 29 FOMC dissent supplying the institutional-risk pressure layer.
text_locales.ja: Appleの$100B自社株買いと5月1日のレコードテープが、予測がトークンあたりマージンゲートに割れると期待するAI設備投資オン信仰のコンディショニングを再構築し、4月29日FOMCの異議が制度的リスク圧力層を供給する。
text_locales.es: La recompra de $100B de Apple más la cinta récord del 1 mayo reconstruyeron el condicionamiento de capex-IA-por-fe que la predicción espera que se rompa en una puerta de margen-por-token, con la disidencia FOMC del 29 abr suministrando la capa de presión de riesgo institucional.
text_locales.fil: Ang $100B buyback ng Apple kasama ang May 1 record tape ay muling nagbuo sa AI-capex-on-faith conditioning na inaasahan ng prediction na bibitak patungo sa per-token-margin gate, kasama ng Apr 29 FOMC dissent na nagbibigay ng institutional-risk pressure layer.

bridges.text: Apple closing the Mag 7 super-week with no separate AI-services line plus the $700B 2026 capex print exactly matches the buyside-pressure setup the prediction depends on. Powell-stays-on-Board reinforces the institutional-risk premium under the entire AI-capex tape. The per-token-margin-gated-capex disclosure itself is still upstream — Microsoft's $37B run-rate is the closest precedent.

text_locales.en: Apple closing the Mag 7 super-week with no separate AI-services line plus the $700B 2026 capex print exactly matches the buyside-pressure setup the prediction depends on. Powell-stays-on-Board reinforces the institutional-risk premium under the entire AI-capex tape. The per-token-margin-gated-capex disclosure itself is still upstream — Microsoft's $37B run-rate is the closest precedent.
text_locales.ja: AppleがMag 7スーパーウィークを別個のAIサービスラインなしで締めくくり、加えて7,000億ドルの2026年設備投資プリントが、予測が依拠する買い手側圧力のセットアップに完全に一致する。Powellの理事会留任は、AI設備投資テープ全体の制度的リスクプレミアムを強化する。トークンあたりマージンゲート設備投資開示自体は依然として上流 ― Microsoftの370億ドルランレートが最も近い前例。
text_locales.es: Apple cerrando la super-semana Mag 7 sin línea separada de AI-services más el print de capex 2026 de $700B coincide exactamente con el setup de presión buyside sobre el cual depende la predicción. Powell-permanece-en-Board refuerza la prima de riesgo institucional bajo todo el tape de capex IA. La disclosure de capex condicionada por per-token-margin en sí misma todavía está upstream — el run-rate de $37B de Microsoft es el precedente más cercano.
text_locales.fil: Ang pag-close ng Apple sa Mag 7 super-week nang walang separate AI-services line plus ang $700B 2026 capex print ay eksaktong tumutugma sa buyside-pressure setup na pinanindigan ng prediction. Ang Powell-stays-on-Board ay nagpapatibay sa institutional-risk premium sa ilalim ng buong AI-capex tape. Ang per-token-margin-gated-capex disclosure mismo ay nasa upstream pa rin — ang $37B run-rate ng Microsoft ay ang pinakamalapit na precedent.

bridges.text: Microsoft's explicit $37B AI run-rate is the first per-AI-business single-line disclosure from a hyperscaler — direct precedent for the per-token-margin-gated-capex thesis the prediction projects. The 8-4 FOMC dissent + Powell-stays-on-Board reinforces the institutional-risk premium under the entire AI-capex tape. Strong reinforcing signal.

text_locales.en: Microsoft's explicit $37B AI run-rate is the first per-AI-business single-line disclosure from a hyperscaler — direct precedent for the per-token-margin-gated-capex thesis the prediction projects. The 8-4 FOMC dissent + Powell-stays-on-Board reinforces the institutional-risk premium under the entire AI-capex tape. Strong reinforcing signal.
text_locales.ja: Microsoftの明示的な$37B AIランレートは、ハイパースケーラからのAI事業ごと初の単一行開示である — 予測が投影するトークンあたりマージンゲート付きcapexテーゼの直接的な先例。8-4のFOMC反対 + Powellが理事会に残ることが、AI capexテープ全体の制度リスクプレミアムを強化する。強い強化シグナル。
text_locales.es: El AI run-rate explícito de $37B de Microsoft es la primera disclosure por-AI-business como una sola línea desde un hyperscaler — precedente directo para la tesis de capex-con-gate-de-margen-por-token que proyecta la predicción. El disenso 8-4 del FOMC + Powell-se-queda-en-la-Junta refuerzan la prima de riesgo institucional bajo todo el tape de capex-IA. Señal de refuerzo fuerte.
text_locales.fil: Ang explicit $37B AI run-rate ng Microsoft ay ang unang per-AI-business single-line disclosure mula sa hyperscaler — direktang precedent para sa per-token-margin-gated-capex thesis na inaasahan ng prediction. Ang 8-4 FOMC dissent + Powell-stays-on-Board ay nagpapatibay sa institutional-risk premium sa ilalim ng buong AI-capex tape. Matibay na nagpapatibay na signal.

bridges.text: Mag-7 prints arrive after close today and FOMC's 2:30 PM ET presser closes Powell's term, exactly the Apr 28-29 landing window the prediction named, on top of Apr 28's chip selloff cracking the AI-capex-on-faith tape. The disclosure-language shift the prediction projects is now under live pressure; the per-token-margin floor itself has not yet appeared in earnings commentary.

text_locales.en: Mag-7 prints arrive after close today and FOMC's 2:30 PM ET presser closes Powell's term, exactly the Apr 28-29 landing window the prediction named, on top of Apr 28's chip selloff cracking the AI-capex-on-faith tape. The disclosure-language shift the prediction projects is now under live pressure; the per-token-margin floor itself has not yet appeared in earnings commentary.
text_locales.ja: Mag-7プリントは本日引け後に到着し、FOMC午後2:30 ET記者会見がPowellの任期を締めくくる。これはまさに予測が指摘した4月28-29日の着地ウィンドウであり、4月28日のチップ売却が信頼に基づくAI-capexテープを割った上に乗っている。予測が投影する開示言語のシフトは今やライブの圧力下にある。トークン単位マージン・フロア自体は決算コメントにまだ現れていない。
text_locales.es: Los resultados Mag-7 llegan despues del cierre hoy y la conferencia FOMC de las 2:30 PM ET cierra el termino de Powell, exactamente la ventana de aterrizaje del 28-29 de abril que la prediccion nombro, encima del selloff de chips del 28 de abril quebrando la cinta de capex-de-IA-por-fe. El cambio de lenguaje de divulgacion que la prediccion proyecta ahora esta bajo presion en vivo; el piso de margen-por-token mismo todavia no ha aparecido en el comentario de resultados.
text_locales.fil: Ang Mag-7 prints ay dumarating pagkatapos ng close ngayon at ang FOMC 2:30 PM ET presser ay nagsasara sa termino ni Powell, eksakto sa Apr 28-29 landing window na pinapangalanan ng hula, sa ibabaw ng Apr 28 chip selloff na bumabasag sa AI-capex-on-faith tape. Ang disclosure-language shift na ipino-project ng hula ay ngayon nasa ilalim ng live pressure; ang per-token-margin floor mismo ay hindi pa lumitaw sa earnings commentary.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure from a hyperscaler by Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal anchor the new doctrine.** Combined Mag 7 capex of ~$700B for 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending to ~$170B FY27) lands into a tape that has already shifted from "rewarding capex on faith" to "demanding tangible profit." **Apr 27 contract restructurings explicitly route AI-lab compute through hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton with Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs at scale). By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. NVDA $5T-class market cap and AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory hold; the spend curve doesn't break, but its disclosure language does. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure from a hyperscaler by Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal anchor the new doctrine.** Combined Mag 7 capex of ~$700B for 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending to ~$170B FY27) lands into a tape that has already shifted from "rewarding capex on faith" to "demanding tangible profit." **Apr 27 contract restructurings explicitly route AI-lab compute through hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton with Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs at scale). By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. NVDA $5T-class market cap and AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory hold; the spend curve doesn't break, but its disclosure language does. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure from a hyperscaler by Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal anchor the new doctrine.** Combined Mag 7 capex of ~$700B for 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending to ~$170B FY27) lands into a tape that has already shifted from "rewarding capex on faith" to "demanding tangible profit." **Apr 27 contract restructurings explicitly route AI-lab compute through hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton with Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs at scale). By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. NVDA $5T-class market cap and AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory hold; the spend curve doesn't break, but its disclosure language does. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **Mag 7 決算 + 4/28-29 FOMC が、Q3 2026 までにハイパースケーラからの初の **トークン単位マージンでゲーティングされた capex** 開示を強要する — 4/27 の OpenAI / Microsoft 協定 + Anthropic / AWS Trainium のシリコンレベル ディールが新ドクトリンを定礎する。** 2026 年の Mag 7 合算 capex 約 $700B (Alphabet $175B-$185B、Amazon 約 $200B、Meta $115B-$135B、Microsoft 約 $146B FY26 から FY27 で約 $170B へトレンド) は、すでに「信仰に基づき capex を報いる」から「具体的な利益を要求する」へとシフトしたテープに着地する。**4/27 の契約再構築は AI ラボの計算リソースをハイパースケーラ自社シリコン経由に明示的にルーティング** している (Anthropic との AWS Trainium / Graviton、スケールでの Meta-Graviton CPU)。Q3 2026 までに Big-3 ハイパースケーラの少なくとも 1 社が **増分 GPU capex を Bedrock / Azure / Vertex のトークン単位マージン下限でゲーティング** する — パブリッククラウドからの初の明示的な「AI インフラ ROI 閾値」となる。NVDA $5T クラスの時価総額と AMD / Cerebras IPO 軌道は維持される。支出曲線は折れないが、その開示言語は折れる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Las publicaciones de Mag 7 + FOMC del 28-29 de abril fuerzan la primera divulgación de **capex con margen-por-token gateado** desde un hyperscaler para Q3 2026 — el pacto OpenAI/Microsoft del 27 de abril + el acuerdo Anthropic/AWS Trainium a nivel de silicio anclan la nueva doctrina.** El capex combinado de Mag 7 de ~$700B para 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 tendiendo a ~$170B FY27) aterriza en una cinta que ya ha pasado de "recompensar el capex con fe" a "exigir ganancia tangible." **Las reestructuraciones de contratos del 27 de abril enrutan explícitamente la computación de los AI-labs a través del silicio propiedad del hyperscaler** (AWS Trainium/Graviton con Anthropic; CPUs Meta-Graviton a escala). Para Q3 2026 al menos un Big-3 hyperscaler **gatea públicamente el capex incremental de GPU sobre un piso de margen-por-token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex** — primer "umbral de ROI de AI-infra" explícito de un cloud público. La capitalización de mercado de NVDA tipo $5T y la trayectoria de IPO AMD/Cerebras se mantienen; la curva de gasto no se rompe, pero su lenguaje de divulgación sí. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 ay magpipilit sa unang **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure mula sa hyperscaler pagsapit ng Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal ang nag-aanchor sa bagong doctrine.** Ang pinagsamang Mag 7 capex na ~$700B para sa 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending sa ~$170B FY27) ay tumatama sa tape na lumipat na mula sa "rewarding capex on faith" patungo sa "demanding tangible profit." **Ang Apr 27 contract restructurings ay tahasang nagru-route ng AI-lab compute sa pamamagitan ng hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton kasama ang Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs sa scale). Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, kahit isa sa Big-3 hyperscaler ay pampublikong **maglalagay ng gate sa incremental GPU capex sa Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — ang unang tahasang "AI-infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud. Ang NVDA $5T-class market cap at AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory ay nananatili; hindi mababasag ang spend curve, ngunit ang disclosure language nito ay babasagin. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiates a 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite"
nodes.description: **The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiates a 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, or xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Mag-7 hyperscaler publishes Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure separated from raw cloud revenue.** WSJ Apr 28 was decisive: a single off-target-leak dropped Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% in one session, on top of the **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (which already removed the discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

title.fil: Ang OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report ay nagpapasimula ng 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite"

description.en: **The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiates a 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, or xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Mag-7 hyperscaler publishes Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure separated from raw cloud revenue.** WSJ Apr 28 was decisive: a single off-target-leak dropped Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% in one session, on top of the **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (which already removed the discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **OpenAIの4月28日WSJレポートが2026年「AI収益開示の書き換え」を始動させる — 2026年Q3までに、少なくとも1つのファウンデーション・ラボ(OpenAI、Anthropic、xAIのいずれか)が監査済み月次収益+WAU開示ケイデンスを出荷し、少なくとも1つのMag-7ハイパースケーラーがBedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertexのトークン単位マージン開示を生のクラウド収益から分離して公表する。** WSJ 4月28日は決定的だった: 単一の目標未達リークが、Oracleを4%、AMDを3%、Broadcomを4%、SoftBankを10%、1セッションで下落させ、これは**4月27日のOpenAI/Microsoft AGI条項のアンワインド**(これにより裁量的な「AGI宣言」のIP取消リスクはすでに除去済み)の上に乗った。本日のMag-7決算衝突 + 約7000億ドルの2026年集約capex + 5月中旬のCerebras IPO 220億〜250億ドル(G42 24% / MBZUAI 62%の収益集中)と組み合わさり、ウォール街は今や**ナラティブではなく具体的なAI経済性開示を明示的に要求している**。2026年Q3までに、SEC + アナリストの圧力により、(a) 少なくとも1つのファウンデーション・ラボが公開月次収益/WAUダッシュボードのケイデンスに移行し、(b) 少なくとも1つのBig-3クラウドが10-Qフットノートでトークン単位AIプラットフォームマージンを分離する。「AGI」という言葉が形而上学的なものから金融商品へと変わり、「DAU/WAU」が製品KPIからMD&Aへと変わる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **El reporte WSJ de OpenAI del 28 de abril inicia una "reescritura de divulgacion de ingresos de IA" en 2026 — para el Q3 2026 al menos un laboratorio fundacional (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) envia una cadencia auditada de divulgacion mensual de ingresos + WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Mag-7 publica una divulgacion de margen por token de Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex separada de los ingresos crudos de nube.** El WSJ del 28 de abril fue decisivo: una sola filtracion fuera-de-objetivo bajo Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% en una sola sesion, encima del **desmontaje de la clausula AGI OpenAI/Microsoft del 27 de abril** (que ya removio el riesgo discrecional de revocacion-de-IP por "declaracion de AGI"). Combinado con la colision de resultados Mag-7 hoy + ~$700B de capex 2026 agregado + la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo a $22B-$25B (concentracion de ingresos 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), Wall Street ahora esta **explicitamente exigiendo divulgacion tangible de economia-de-IA, no narrativa**. Para el Q3 2026 la presion de la SEC + analistas produce (a) al menos un laboratorio fundacional moviendose a una cadencia publica de dashboard de ingresos / WAU mensual, y (b) al menos una nube Big-3 separando el margen por token de la plataforma de IA en las notas al pie del 10-Q. La palabra "AGI" pasa de metafisica a instrumento financiero; "DAU/WAU" pasa de KPI de producto a MD&A. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report ay nagpapasimula ng 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — pagsapit ng Q3 2026, kahit isang foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) ay maglalabas ng audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, at kahit isang Mag-7 hyperscaler ay maglalathala ng Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure na hiwalay sa raw cloud revenue.** Ang WSJ Apr 28 ay mapagpasiya: isang off-target-leak ang nagpababa ng Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% sa isang session, sa ibabaw ng **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (na inalis na ang discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Kasama ang Mag-7 print collision ngayon + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + ang Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), ang Wall Street ay ngayon **lantarang humihingi ng tangible AI-economics disclosure, hindi narrative**. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang SEC + analyst pressure ay magbubunga ng (a) kahit isang foundation lab na lumipat sa public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, at (b) kahit isang Big-3 cloud na maghihiwalay ng per-token AI-platform margin sa 10-Q footnotes. Ang salitang "AGI" ay magiging mula metaphysical patungo sa financial-instrument; ang "DAU/WAU" ay magiging mula product KPI patungo sa MD&A. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

reasoning.because: WSJ Apr 28 OpenAI-miss leak dropped Oracle / AMD / Broadcom / SoftBank in one session and stacks on the Apr 27 AGI-clause unwind.
reasoning.given: ~$700B Mag-7 capex + Cerebras IPO concentration risk + SEC / analyst pressure shifts the bar from narrative to audited AI-economics disclosure.
reasoning.so_that: At least one foundation lab ships audited monthly revenue + WAU and at least one Big-3 cloud breaks out per-token AI-platform margin in 10-Q footnotes.
reasoning.landing: By Q3 2026; foundation-lab dashboard cadence + Big-3 hyperscaler 10-Q per-token margin footnote.
reasoning.plain_language: After a leak knocked AI stocks down hard, regulators and investors will soon force the biggest AI companies to publish real monthly revenue numbers, not just hype.

because.fil: Ang WSJ Apr 28 OpenAI-miss leak ay nagpababa ng Oracle / AMD / Broadcom / SoftBank sa isang session at nagpapatong sa Apr 27 AGI-clause unwind.

given.en: ~$700B Mag-7 capex + Cerebras IPO concentration risk + SEC / analyst pressure shifts the bar from narrative to audited AI-economics disclosure.
given.ja: 約7000億ドルのMag-7 capex + Cerebras IPOの集中リスク + SEC/アナリスト圧力が、基準をナラティブから監査済みAI経済性開示にシフトさせる。
given.es: ~$700B de capex Mag-7 + riesgo de concentracion de IPO de Cerebras + presion de SEC / analistas mueve la barra de narrativa a divulgacion auditada de economia-de-IA.
given.fil: Ang ~$700B Mag-7 capex + Cerebras IPO concentration risk + SEC / analyst pressure ay nagbabago sa bar mula narrative patungo sa audited AI-economics disclosure.

so_that.es: Al menos un laboratorio fundacional envia ingresos mensuales auditados + WAU y al menos una nube Big-3 desglosa el margen por token de plataforma-de-IA en las notas al pie del 10-Q.

plain_language.en: After a leak knocked AI stocks down hard, regulators and investors will soon force the biggest AI companies to publish real monthly revenue numbers, not just hype.
plain_language.ja: リークがAI株を激しく下落させた後、規制当局と投資家はまもなく、最大のAI企業に対し、単なる誇大宣伝ではなく実際の月次収益数値を公表するよう強制する。
plain_language.es: Despues de que una filtracion derribara duramente las acciones de IA, los reguladores e inversores pronto forzaran a las mayores empresas de IA a publicar numeros reales de ingresos mensuales, no solo bombo.
plain_language.fil: Pagkatapos ng leak na nagpababa ng matindi sa AI stocks, ang regulators at investors ay malapit nang pilitin ang pinakamalalaking AI companies na maglathala ng totoong monthly revenue numbers, hindi lang hype.

title_locales.fil: Ang OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report ay nagpapasimula ng 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite"

detail.summary_short: WSJ's Apr 28 OpenAI-revenue-miss report dropped Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% in one session, on top of the Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind. By Q3 2026, SEC + analyst pressure is expected to force at least one foundation lab to ship audited monthly revenue + WAU and at least one Big-3 hyperscaler to break out per-token AI-platform margin in 10-Q footnotes.

summary_short_locales.en: WSJ's Apr 28 OpenAI-revenue-miss report dropped Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% in one session, on top of the Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind. By Q3 2026, SEC + analyst pressure is expected to force at least one foundation lab to ship audited monthly revenue + WAU and at least one Big-3 hyperscaler to break out per-token AI-platform margin in 10-Q footnotes.
summary_short_locales.ja: WSJの4月28日OpenAI収益ミス・レポートは、Oracleを4%、AMDを3%、Broadcomを4%、SoftBankを10%、1セッションで下落させ、4月27日のOpenAI/Microsoft AGI条項アンワインドの上に乗った。2026年Q3までに、SEC + アナリスト圧力が、少なくとも1つのファウンデーション・ラボに監査済み月次収益+WAUの出荷を、少なくとも1つのBig-3ハイパースケーラーに10-Qフットノートでのトークン単位AIプラットフォームマージン切り出しを強制すると予想される。
summary_short_locales.es: El reporte del WSJ del 28 de abril sobre el fallo de ingresos de OpenAI bajo Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% en una sola sesion, encima del desmontaje de la clausula AGI OpenAI/Microsoft del 27 de abril. Para el Q3 2026, se espera que la presion de la SEC + analistas fuerce a al menos un laboratorio fundacional a enviar ingresos mensuales auditados + WAU y al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 a desglosar el margen por token de plataforma-de-IA en las notas al pie del 10-Q.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report ay nagpababa ng Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% sa isang session, sa ibabaw ng Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang SEC + analyst pressure ay inaasahang pipilitin ang kahit isang foundation lab na maglabas ng audited monthly revenue + WAU at kahit isang Big-3 hyperscaler na ihiwalay ang per-token AI-platform margin sa 10-Q footnotes.

bridges.text: The parallel-JV equity-template launches plus AMD's pre-print disclosure-shape pressure plus Anthropic's $50B / OpenAI's $122B fundraising stack tighten the structural force the prediction names: SEC + analyst pressure for audited monthly-revenue and per-token-margin disclosure now has an explicit equity-vehicle anchor.

text_locales.en: The parallel-JV equity-template launches plus AMD's pre-print disclosure-shape pressure plus Anthropic's $50B / OpenAI's $122B fundraising stack tighten the structural force the prediction names: SEC + analyst pressure for audited monthly-revenue and per-token-margin disclosure now has an explicit equity-vehicle anchor.
text_locales.ja: 並行JVエクイティ・テンプレート・ローンチ + AMDの決算前開示形状プレッシャー + Anthropicの$50B / OpenAIの$122B資金調達スタックが、予測が指摘する構造的な強制力を引き締める: 監査済み月次収益とトークン単位マージン開示に対するSEC + アナリストの圧力は、現在明示的なエクイティ・ビークル・アンカーを持つ。
text_locales.es: Los lanzamientos paralelos de plantilla de capital JV más la presión de divulgación previa a la impresión de AMD más la pila de recaudación de fondos de $50B de Anthropic / $122B de OpenAI ajustan la fuerza estructural que la predicción nombra: la presión de SEC + analistas para divulgación auditada de ingresos mensuales y margen por token ahora tiene un ancla explícita de vehículo de capital.
text_locales.fil: Ang parallel-JV equity-template launches plus AMD's pre-print disclosure-shape pressure plus ang Anthropic's $50B / OpenAI's $122B fundraising stack ay nagpapahigpit sa structural force na pinangalanan ng prediction: ang SEC + analyst pressure para sa audited monthly-revenue at per-token-margin disclosure ay mayroon na ngayong explicit equity-vehicle anchor.

bridges.text: OpenAI's $25B annualized run rate plus the $100M ad-pilot opacity and the Cerebras IPO concentration disclosures keep adding pressure for a public foundation-lab disclosure cadence, while AAPL's buyback on the $700B capex tape gives the buyside the leverage to demand it. The Apr 28 WSJ leg keeps tightening rather than fading.

text_locales.en: OpenAI's $25B annualized run rate plus the $100M ad-pilot opacity and the Cerebras IPO concentration disclosures keep adding pressure for a public foundation-lab disclosure cadence, while AAPL's buyback on the $700B capex tape gives the buyside the leverage to demand it. The Apr 28 WSJ leg keeps tightening rather than fading.
text_locales.ja: OpenAIの$25B年換算run rateと$100M広告パイロットの不透明性、Cerebras IPOの集中開示が、公開ファウンデーションラボ開示ケイデンスへの圧力を加え続ける一方、AAPLの自社株買いが$700B capexテープに積層して買い手側がそれを要求するレバレッジを与える。4月28日のWSJの足は、消えていくのではなく引き締まり続けている。
text_locales.es: El run rate anualizado de $25B de OpenAI más la opacidad del piloto de anuncios de $100M y las divulgaciones de concentración del IPO de Cerebras siguen añadiendo presión para una cadencia pública de divulgación de laboratorio fundacional, mientras que la recompra de AAPL sobre el tape de capex de $700B le da al lado comprador el apalancamiento para demandarla. La pierna del WSJ del 28 de abril sigue apretándose en lugar de desvanecerse.
text_locales.fil: Ang $25B annualized run rate ng OpenAI plus ang $100M ad-pilot opacity at ang Cerebras IPO concentration disclosures ay patuloy na nagdaragdag ng pressure para sa public foundation-lab disclosure cadence, habang ang buyback ng AAPL sa $700B capex tape ay nagbibigay sa buyside ng leverage upang hingin ito. Ang Apr 28 WSJ leg ay patuloy na humihigpit sa halip na maglaho.

bridges.text: Apple's clean Q3 guide absorbing the Apr 28 WSJ noise without itself disclosing an AI-services line keeps the asymmetry that drives the predicted disclosure rewrite, even as no foundation lab has yet posted a monthly cadence.

text_locales.en: Apple's clean Q3 guide absorbing the Apr 28 WSJ noise without itself disclosing an AI-services line keeps the asymmetry that drives the predicted disclosure rewrite, even as no foundation lab has yet posted a monthly cadence.
text_locales.ja: AppleのクリーンなQ3ガイドが4月28日WSJノイズを吸収し、それ自身がAIサービス行を開示することなく、予測された開示書き直しを駆動する非対称性を維持している;基盤ラボはまだ月次ケイデンスを投稿していない。
text_locales.es: La guía limpia Q3 de Apple absorbiendo el ruido WSJ del 28 abr sin divulgar ella misma una línea de servicios de IA mantiene la asimetría que impulsa la reescritura predicha de divulgación, aunque ningún laboratorio de fundación haya publicado todavía una cadencia mensual.
text_locales.fil: Ang malinis na Q3 guide ng Apple na sumisipsip ng Apr 28 WSJ noise nang hindi mismo nag-disclose ng AI-services line ay nagpapanatili ng asymmetry na nagpapakilos sa hinulang disclosure rewrite, kahit walang foundation lab ang nagpost pa ng monthly cadence.

bridges.text: Apple's record Services line with no AI-services break plus the $700B 2026 capex tracking number land exactly in the disclosure-pressure setup the prediction depends on, but no fresh foundation-lab monthly-revenue cadence or per-token-margin 10-Q footnote shipped today. The structural pressure is still building toward the Q3 2026 forecast window.

text_locales.en: Apple's record Services line with no AI-services break plus the $700B 2026 capex tracking number land exactly in the disclosure-pressure setup the prediction depends on, but no fresh foundation-lab monthly-revenue cadence or per-token-margin 10-Q footnote shipped today. The structural pressure is still building toward the Q3 2026 forecast window.
text_locales.ja: AppleのAIサービスの内訳のない記録的なサービスラインに加え、7,000億ドルの2026年設備投資追跡数値は、予測が依拠する開示圧力セットアップにまさに着地するが、新鮮なファウンデーションラボ月次収益ケイデンスもトークンあたりマージン10-Qフットノートも本日出荷されなかった。構造的圧力は依然として2026年Q3予測ウィンドウに向けて構築されている。
text_locales.es: La línea récord de Services de Apple sin break de AI-services más el número de tracking de capex 2026 de $700B aterrizan exactamente en el setup de presión-de-disclosure sobre el cual depende la predicción, pero ningún cadencia fresca de revenue-mensual de foundation-lab o nota al pie de 10-Q por per-token-margin envió hoy. La presión estructural sigue construyéndose hacia la ventana de forecast Q3 2026.
text_locales.fil: Ang record Services line ng Apple nang walang AI-services break plus ang $700B 2026 capex tracking number ay umiimpok eksakto sa disclosure-pressure setup na pinanindigan ng prediction, ngunit walang sariwang foundation-lab monthly-revenue cadence o per-token-margin 10-Q footnote na nag-ship ngayon. Ang structural pressure ay tumitindi pa rin patungo sa Q3 2026 forecast window.

bridges.text: Microsoft's $37B run-rate is one structural step short of the per-token-margin 10-Q footnote the prediction calls for, and OpenAI's response cycle is the consumer-facing leg. Today the prediction is no longer forecast on the disclosure-pressure side — it is being absorbed into the disclosure cadence in real time.

text_locales.en: Microsoft's $37B run-rate is one structural step short of the per-token-margin 10-Q footnote the prediction calls for, and OpenAI's response cycle is the consumer-facing leg. Today the prediction is no longer forecast on the disclosure-pressure side — it is being absorbed into the disclosure cadence in real time.
text_locales.ja: Microsoftの$37Bランレートは、予測が求めるトークンあたりマージン10-Q脚注に構造的に1ステップ短く、OpenAIの対応サイクルは消費者向け脚である。本日、予測は開示圧力側ではもはや予測ではない — リアルタイムで開示頻度に吸収されつつある。
text_locales.es: El run-rate de $37B de Microsoft está un paso estructural corto frente a la nota al pie del 10-Q con margen por token que pide la predicción, y el ciclo de respuesta de OpenAI es la pata orientada al consumidor. Hoy la predicción ya no es pronóstico en el lado de la presión de disclosure — está siendo absorbida en la cadencia de disclosure en tiempo real.
text_locales.fil: Ang $37B run-rate ng Microsoft ay isang structural step kulang sa per-token-margin 10-Q footnote na hinihingi ng prediction, at ang response cycle ng OpenAI ay ang consumer-facing leg. Ngayon ang prediction ay hindi na forecast sa disclosure-pressure side — ito ay nasasama sa disclosure cadence sa real time.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: **The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiates a 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, or xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Mag-7 hyperscaler publishes Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure separated from raw cloud revenue.** WSJ Apr 28 was decisive: a single off-target-leak dropped Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% in one session, on top of the **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (which already removed the discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. prediction_summary_locales.ja: **OpenAIの4月28日WSJレポートが2026年「AI収益開示の書き換え」を始動させる — 2026年Q3までに、少なくとも1つのファウンデーション・ラボ(OpenAI、Anthropic、xAIのいずれか)が監査済み月次収益+WAU開示ケイデンスを出荷し、少なくとも1つのMag-7ハイパースケーラーがBedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertexのトークン単位マージン開示を生のクラウド収益から分離して公表する。** WSJ 4月28日は決定的だった: 単一の目標未達リークが、Oracleを4%、AMDを3%、Broadcomを4%、SoftBankを10%、1セッションで下落させ、これは**4月27日のOpenAI/Microsoft AGI条項のアンワインド**(これにより裁量的な「AGI宣言」のIP取消リスクはすでに除去済み)の上に乗った。本日のMag-7決算衝突 + 約7000億ドルの2026年集約capex + 5月中旬のCerebras IPO 220億〜250億ドル(G42 24% / MBZUAI 62%の収益集中)と組み合わさり、ウォール街は今や**ナラティブではなく具体的なAI経済性開示を明示的に要求している**。2026年Q3までに、SEC + アナリストの圧力により、(a) 少なくとも1つのファウンデーション・ラボが公開月次収益/WAUダッシュボードのケイデンスに移行し、(b) 少なくとも1つのBig-3クラウドが10-Qフットノートでトークン単位AIプラットフォームマージンを分離する。「AGI」という言葉が形而上学的なものから金融商品へと変わり、「DAU/WAU」が製品KPIからMD&Aへと変わる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **El reporte WSJ de OpenAI del 28 de abril inicia una "reescritura de divulgacion de ingresos de IA" en 2026 — para el Q3 2026 al menos un laboratorio fundacional (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) envia una cadencia auditada de divulgacion mensual de ingresos + WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Mag-7 publica una divulgacion de margen por token de Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex separada de los ingresos crudos de nube.** El WSJ del 28 de abril fue decisivo: una sola filtracion fuera-de-objetivo bajo Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% en una sola sesion, encima del **desmontaje de la clausula AGI OpenAI/Microsoft del 27 de abril** (que ya removio el riesgo discrecional de revocacion-de-IP por "declaracion de AGI"). Combinado con la colision de resultados Mag-7 hoy + ~$700B de capex 2026 agregado + la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo a $22B-$25B (concentracion de ingresos 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), Wall Street ahora esta **explicitamente exigiendo divulgacion tangible de economia-de-IA, no narrativa**. Para el Q3 2026 la presion de la SEC + analistas produce (a) al menos un laboratorio fundacional moviendose a una cadencia publica de dashboard de ingresos / WAU mensual, y (b) al menos una nube Big-3 separando el margen por token de la plataforma de IA en las notas al pie del 10-Q. La palabra "AGI" pasa de metafisica a instrumento financiero; "DAU/WAU" pasa de KPI de producto a MD&A. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report ay nagpapasimula ng 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — pagsapit ng Q3 2026, kahit isang foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) ay maglalabas ng audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, at kahit isang Mag-7 hyperscaler ay maglalathala ng Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure na hiwalay sa raw cloud revenue.** Ang WSJ Apr 28 ay mapagpasiya: isang off-target-leak ang nagpababa ng Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% sa isang session, sa ibabaw ng **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (na inalis na ang discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Kasama ang Mag-7 print collision ngayon + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + ang Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), ang Wall Street ay ngayon **lantarang humihingi ng tangible AI-economics disclosure, hindi narrative**. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang SEC + analyst pressure ay magbubunga ng (a) kahit isang foundation lab na lumipat sa public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, at (b) kahit isang Big-3 cloud na maghihiwalay ng per-token AI-platform margin sa 10-Q footnotes. Ang salitang "AGI" ay magiging mula metaphysical patungo sa financial-instrument; ang "DAU/WAU" ay magiging mula product KPI patungo sa MD&A. nodes.title: The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewrite
nodes.description: **The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue or WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Big-3 hyperscaler separates Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin in 10-Q footnotes from raw cloud revenue.** Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) was the first material crack in the AI-capex-on-faith tape; Apr 29 prints were a mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL beat hard, META -7% AH); Apr 30 AAPL prints close the Mag 7 cycle. Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly — that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have.

Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly — that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. description.ja: **4月28日のWSJ OpenAI収益未達報告 + 4月29日のMag 7決算の衝突が、2026年のSEC + アナリストによるAI収益開示書き直しを引き起こす — 2026年Q3までに少なくとも1つの基盤研究所(OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI)が監査済み月次収益またはWAU開示頻度を出荷し、少なくとも1つのBig-3ハイパースケーラがBedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertexのトークンあたりマージンを生のクラウド収益から10-Q脚注で分離する。** 4月28日のセルオフ(S&P -0.49%、Nasdaq -0.9%、Oracle -4%、AMD -3%、Broadcom -4%、SoftBank -10%)はAI capex on faithテープにおける最初の物質的なクラックだった。4月29日の決算は混合的なリセットだった(MSFT/GOOGLは大幅に上回り、META -7% AH)。4月30日のAAPLの決算がMag 7サイクルを締めくくる。Microsoftはすでに$37BのAIランレート(+123%)を明示的に引用していた — それが開示先例である。CerebrasのIPOが5月中旬に$22B-$25B(G42 24% / MBZUAI 62%の収益集中)で予定されているなか、明示的なトークンあたりマージン + WAU開示を求めるSEC + バイサイドの圧力が2026年Q2-Q3の決算サイクル周辺で収束する。Powellがトランプ政権のFRB調査に対するチェック役として理事会に残ることを選択したことで、AI capexテープ全体に対する政治リスクプレミアムも上昇する。より厳しい数字を要求することは公開市場が持つレバーである。
description.es: **El reporte del WSJ del 28 abr sobre la falta de revenue de OpenAI + la colisión de prints Mag 7 del 29 abr dispara un push 2026 SEC + analistas para la reescritura de la disclosure de revenue de IA — para Q3 2026 al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) lanza una cadencia auditada de disclosure mensual de revenue o WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 separa el margen por token de Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex en notas al pie del 10-Q frente al revenue cloud crudo.** El selloff del 28 abr (S&P -0,49%, Nasdaq -0,9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) fue la primera grieta material en el tape de capex-IA-por-fe; los prints del 29 abr fueron un reset mixto (MSFT/GOOGL pegaron fuerte, META -7% AH); los prints del 30 abr de AAPL cierran el ciclo Mag 7. Microsoft ya citó un AI run rate de $37B (+123%) explícitamente — ese es el precedente de disclosure. Con el IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo a $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI concentración de revenue), la presión SEC + buyside por divulgación explícita de margen por token + WAU converge en torno a los ciclos de earnings Q2-Q3 2026. La elección de Powell de quedarse en la Junta como contrapeso a la investigación de la Fed por la administración Trump también eleva la prima de riesgo político sobre todo el tape de capex-IA; exigir números más duros es la palanca que tienen los mercados públicos. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision ay magpapasimula ng 2026 SEC + analyst push para sa AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — pagsapit ng Q3 2026 hindi bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ang magpapadala ng audited monthly-revenue o WAU disclosure cadence, at hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang maghihiwalay ng Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin sa 10-Q footnotes mula sa raw cloud revenue.** Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) ang unang materyal na bitak sa AI-capex-on-faith tape; Apr 29 prints ay halo-halong reset (MSFT/GOOGL beat hard, META -7% AH); Apr 30 AAPL prints ay magsasara ng Mag 7 cycle. Tahasang binanggit na ng Microsoft ang $37B AI run rate (+123%) — iyan ang disclosure precedent. Sa Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), ang SEC + buyside pressure para sa explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure ay nagsasama-sama sa paligid ng Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Ang pagpili ni Powell na manatili sa Board bilang check sa Trump-admin Fed investigation ay nagtataas din ng political-risk premium sa buong AI-capex tape; ang paghingi ng mas matitigas na numero ay ang lever na hawak ng public markets.

Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly — that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have.
summary.ja: **4月28日のWSJ OpenAI収益未達報告 + 4月29日のMag 7決算の衝突が、2026年のSEC + アナリストによるAI収益開示書き直しを引き起こす — 2026年Q3までに少なくとも1つの基盤研究所(OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI)が監査済み月次収益またはWAU開示頻度を出荷し、少なくとも1つのBig-3ハイパースケーラがBedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertexのトークンあたりマージンを生のクラウド収益から10-Q脚注で分離する。** 4月28日のセルオフ(S&P -0.49%、Nasdaq -0.9%、Oracle -4%、AMD -3%、Broadcom -4%、SoftBank -10%)はAI capex on faithテープにおける最初の物質的なクラックだった。4月29日の決算は混合的なリセットだった(MSFT/GOOGLは大幅に上回り、META -7% AH)。4月30日のAAPLの決算がMag 7サイクルを締めくくる。Microsoftはすでに$37BのAIランレート(+123%)を明示的に引用していた — それが開示先例である。CerebrasのIPOが5月中旬に$22B-$25B(G42 24% / MBZUAI 62%の収益集中)で予定されているなか、明示的なトークンあたりマージン + WAU開示を求めるSEC + バイサイドの圧力が2026年Q2-Q3の決算サイクル周辺で収束する。Powellがトランプ政権のFRB調査に対するチェック役として理事会に残ることを選択したことで、AI capexテープ全体に対する政治リスクプレミアムも上昇する。より厳しい数字を要求することは公開市場が持つレバーである。
summary.es: **El reporte del WSJ del 28 abr sobre la falta de revenue de OpenAI + la colisión de prints Mag 7 del 29 abr dispara un push 2026 SEC + analistas para la reescritura de la disclosure de revenue de IA — para Q3 2026 al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) lanza una cadencia auditada de disclosure mensual de revenue o WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 separa el margen por token de Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex en notas al pie del 10-Q frente al revenue cloud crudo.** El selloff del 28 abr (S&P -0,49%, Nasdaq -0,9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) fue la primera grieta material en el tape de capex-IA-por-fe; los prints del 29 abr fueron un reset mixto (MSFT/GOOGL pegaron fuerte, META -7% AH); los prints del 30 abr de AAPL cierran el ciclo Mag 7. Microsoft ya citó un AI run rate de $37B (+123%) explícitamente — ese es el precedente de disclosure. Con el IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo a $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI concentración de revenue), la presión SEC + buyside por divulgación explícita de margen por token + WAU converge en torno a los ciclos de earnings Q2-Q3 2026. La elección de Powell de quedarse en la Junta como contrapeso a la investigación de la Fed por la administración Trump también eleva la prima de riesgo político sobre todo el tape de capex-IA; exigir números más duros es la palanca que tienen los mercados públicos. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.fil: **Ang Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision ay magpapasimula ng 2026 SEC + analyst push para sa AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — pagsapit ng Q3 2026 hindi bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ang magpapadala ng audited monthly-revenue o WAU disclosure cadence, at hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang maghihiwalay ng Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin sa 10-Q footnotes mula sa raw cloud revenue.** Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) ang unang materyal na bitak sa AI-capex-on-faith tape; Apr 29 prints ay halo-halong reset (MSFT/GOOGL beat hard, META -7% AH); Apr 30 AAPL prints ay magsasara ng Mag 7 cycle. Tahasang binanggit na ng Microsoft ang $37B AI run rate (+123%) — iyan ang disclosure precedent. Sa Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), ang SEC + buyside pressure para sa explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure ay nagsasama-sama sa paligid ng Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Ang pagpili ni Powell na manatili sa Board bilang check sa Trump-admin Fed investigation ay nagtataas din ng political-risk premium sa buong AI-capex tape; ang paghingi ng mas matitigas na numero ay ang lever na hawak ng public markets.

text_locales.es: La recompra de $100B de AAPL apilada sobre el tape de capex de $700B y la divulgación de run-rate de $37B de MSFT refuerzan la tesis de presión-del-comprador-quiebra-opacidad-de-ingresos-IA que inició la pierna del WSJ del 28 de abril. detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: **The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue or WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Big-3 hyperscaler separates Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin in 10-Q footnotes from raw cloud revenue.** Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) was the first material crack in the AI-capex-on-faith tape; Apr 29 prints were a mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL beat hard, META -7% AH); Apr 30 AAPL prints close the Mag 7 cycle. Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly — that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have.
detail.prediction_summary: **The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue or WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Big-3 hyperscaler separates Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin in 10-Q footnotes from raw cloud revenue.** Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) was the first material crack in the AI-capex-on-faith tape; Apr 29 prints were a mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL beat hard, META -7% AH); Apr 30 AAPL prints close the Mag 7 cycle. Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly — that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue or WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Big-3 hyperscaler separates Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin in 10-Q footnotes from raw cloud revenue.** Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) was the first material crack in the AI-capex-on-faith tape; Apr 29 prints were a mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL beat hard, META -7% AH); Apr 30 AAPL prints close the Mag 7 cycle. Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly — that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **4月28日のWSJ OpenAI収益未達報告 + 4月29日のMag 7決算の衝突が、2026年のSEC + アナリストによるAI収益開示書き直しを引き起こす — 2026年Q3までに少なくとも1つの基盤研究所(OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI)が監査済み月次収益またはWAU開示頻度を出荷し、少なくとも1つのBig-3ハイパースケーラがBedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertexのトークンあたりマージンを生のクラウド収益から10-Q脚注で分離する。** 4月28日のセルオフ(S&P -0.49%、Nasdaq -0.9%、Oracle -4%、AMD -3%、Broadcom -4%、SoftBank -10%)はAI capex on faithテープにおける最初の物質的なクラックだった。4月29日の決算は混合的なリセットだった(MSFT/GOOGLは大幅に上回り、META -7% AH)。4月30日のAAPLの決算がMag 7サイクルを締めくくる。Microsoftはすでに$37BのAIランレート(+123%)を明示的に引用していた — それが開示先例である。CerebrasのIPOが5月中旬に$22B-$25B(G42 24% / MBZUAI 62%の収益集中)で予定されているなか、明示的なトークンあたりマージン + WAU開示を求めるSEC + バイサイドの圧力が2026年Q2-Q3の決算サイクル周辺で収束する。Powellがトランプ政権のFRB調査に対するチェック役として理事会に残ることを選択したことで、AI capexテープ全体に対する政治リスクプレミアムも上昇する。より厳しい数字を要求することは公開市場が持つレバーである。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **El reporte del WSJ del 28 abr sobre la falta de revenue de OpenAI + la colisión de prints Mag 7 del 29 abr dispara un push 2026 SEC + analistas para la reescritura de la disclosure de revenue de IA — para Q3 2026 al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) lanza una cadencia auditada de disclosure mensual de revenue o WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 separa el margen por token de Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex en notas al pie del 10-Q frente al revenue cloud crudo.** El selloff del 28 abr (S&P -0,49%, Nasdaq -0,9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) fue la primera grieta material en el tape de capex-IA-por-fe; los prints del 29 abr fueron un reset mixto (MSFT/GOOGL pegaron fuerte, META -7% AH); los prints del 30 abr de AAPL cierran el ciclo Mag 7. Microsoft ya citó un AI run rate de $37B (+123%) explícitamente — ese es el precedente de disclosure. Con el IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo a $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI concentración de revenue), la presión SEC + buyside por divulgación explícita de margen por token + WAU converge en torno a los ciclos de earnings Q2-Q3 2026. La elección de Powell de quedarse en la Junta como contrapeso a la investigación de la Fed por la administración Trump también eleva la prima de riesgo político sobre todo el tape de capex-IA; exigir números más duros es la palanca que tienen los mercados públicos. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision ay magpapasimula ng 2026 SEC + analyst push para sa AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — pagsapit ng Q3 2026 hindi bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ang magpapadala ng audited monthly-revenue o WAU disclosure cadence, at hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang maghihiwalay ng Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin sa 10-Q footnotes mula sa raw cloud revenue.** Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) ang unang materyal na bitak sa AI-capex-on-faith tape; Apr 29 prints ay halo-halong reset (MSFT/GOOGL beat hard, META -7% AH); Apr 30 AAPL prints ay magsasara ng Mag 7 cycle. Tahasang binanggit na ng Microsoft ang $37B AI run rate (+123%) — iyan ang disclosure precedent. Sa Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), ang SEC + buyside pressure para sa explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure ay nagsasama-sama sa paligid ng Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Ang pagpili ni Powell na manatili sa Board bilang check sa Trump-admin Fed investigation ay nagtataas din ng political-risk premium sa buong AI-capex tape; ang paghingi ng mas matitigas na numero ay ang lever na hawak ng public markets.

nodes.title: The Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination cements 2026 as the year AI-capex disclosure splits into two reporting cadences
nodes.description: The Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination cements 2026 as the year AI-capex disclosure splits into two reporting cadences — by Q4 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (most likely Microsoft, given the Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) publishes audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) as a 10-Q footnote; the broader S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) follows with quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure. Apr 29 Microsoft's $37B AI run-rate (+123%) was the disclosure precedent; Apr 30 Apple's record Services $30.98B (+16%) included no separate AI-services line; Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) on the way to $700B 2026 capex is the buyside-pressure number; mid-May Cerebras IPO at $22-25B with 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration is the disclosure stress-test. Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% on print day) shows public-market price discrimination is already operating on imprecise AI-revenue numbers; the path of least resistance is for the most-disclosing hyperscaler to set the precedent and force the cohort to follow. SEC will not need to act ahead of voluntary disclosure here — the buyside is the forcing function.

description.en: The Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination cements 2026 as the year AI-capex disclosure splits into two reporting cadences — by Q4 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (most likely Microsoft, given the Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) publishes audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) as a 10-Q footnote; the broader S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) follows with quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure. Apr 29 Microsoft's $37B AI run-rate (+123%) was the disclosure precedent; Apr 30 Apple's record Services $30.98B (+16%) included no separate AI-services line; Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) on the way to $700B 2026 capex is the buyside-pressure number; mid-May Cerebras IPO at $22-25B with 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration is the disclosure stress-test. Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% on print day) shows public-market price discrimination is already operating on imprecise AI-revenue numbers; the path of least resistance is for the most-disclosing hyperscaler to set the precedent and force the cohort to follow. SEC will not need to act ahead of voluntary disclosure here — the buyside is the forcing function.
description.ja: Mag 7スーパーウィーク+7,000億ドル-2026年AI設備投資プリント+4月30日のApple +1,000億ドル-自社株買い／4%-配当増の組み合わせは、2026年をAI設備投資開示が2つの報告ケイデンスに分裂する年として確定する ― 2026年Q4までに、少なくとも1つのBig-3ハイパースケーラー(4月29日の370億ドルAIランレート前例を踏まえると、Microsoftの可能性が最も高い)が監査済みの月次AIビジネスKPI(ランレート、有料席、展開済みエージェント)を10-Qフットノートとして公表し、より広範なS&P AIコホート(Apple、IPO後のCerebras、Broadcom)が四半期ごとのAIビジネス別マージン開示で追随する。4月29日のMicrosoftの370億ドルAIランレート(+123%)は開示の前例であり、4月30日のAppleの記録的なサービス収益309.8億ドル(+16%)はAIサービスの個別ラインを含まなかった。4月30日のビッグテックの1,300億ドル超のQ1設備投資(Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon)は2026年の7,000億ドル設備投資への道のりであり、買い手側の圧力数値である。5月中旬のCerebras IPOは220億～250億ドルの評価額で、収益集中度はG42 24%／MBZUAI 62%であり、開示のストレステストである。4月28日のWSJ OpenAI収益不振+4月29日のMag 7混合リセット(プリント当日にMETA -7.5%、MSFT -3.8%)は、公開市場の価格差別が既に不正確なAI収益数値で動いていることを示している。最も抵抗の少ないパスは、最も開示するハイパースケーラーが前例を作り、コホートに追随を強制することである。SECは自主開示に先立って行動する必要はない ― 買い手側がここで強制関数となる。
description.es: La super-semana Mag 7 + el print de capex-IA-2026 de $700B + la combinación recompra de +$100B / alza de dividendo del 4% de Apple del 30 abr cementan 2026 como el año en que la disclosure de capex IA se divide en dos cadencias de reporte — para Q4 2026, al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 (muy probablemente Microsoft, dado el precedente del run-rate IA de $37B del 29 abr) publica KPIs auditados mensuales de AI-business (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) como nota al pie del 10-Q; el cohorte S&P AI más amplio (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) sigue con disclosure trimestral de margen por AI-business. El run-rate IA de $37B (+123%) de Microsoft del 29 abr fue el precedente de disclosure; el récord de Services de $30.98B (+16%) de Apple del 30 abr no incluyó línea separada de AI-services; el capex Q1 de Big Tech de $130B+ del 30 abr (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) en camino a $700B de capex 2026 es el número de presión buyside; el IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo a $22-25B con concentración de revenue 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI es el stress-test de disclosure. El miss de revenue de OpenAI del WSJ del 28 abr + el reset mixto Mag 7 del 29 abr (META -7,5%, MSFT -3,8% en día de print) muestra que la price discrimination de mercado público ya está operando sobre números imprecisos de revenue IA; el camino de menor resistencia es que el hyperscaler más-disclosing fije el precedente y fuerce al cohorte a seguir. La SEC no necesitará actuar antes de la disclosure voluntaria aquí — el buyside es la función forzante.
description.fil: Ang kombinasyon ng Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike ay magpapatatag sa 2026 bilang taon kung kailan ang AI-capex disclosure ay mahahati sa dalawang reporting cadences — pagsapit ng Q4 2026, hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (malamang Microsoft, dahil sa Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) ang maglalathala ng audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) bilang 10-Q footnote; susunod ang mas malawak na S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) na may quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure. Ang Apr 29 Microsoft's $37B AI run-rate (+123%) ang disclosure precedent; ang Apr 30 Apple's record Services $30.98B (+16%) ay hindi naglakip ng hiwalay na AI-services line; ang Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) papunta sa $700B 2026 capex ang buyside-pressure number; ang mid-May Cerebras IPO sa $22-25B na may 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration ay ang disclosure stress-test. Ang Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% sa print day) ay nagpapakita na ang public-market price discrimination ay umaandar na sa imprecise AI-revenue numbers; ang path of least resistance ay para sa pinaka-disclosing hyperscaler na magtakda ng precedent at piliting sundin ng cohort. Hindi na kailangang mag-act ang SEC bago ang voluntary disclosure dito — ang buyside ang forcing function.

detail.summary_short: Microsoft's Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate disclosure precedent plus the $700B 2026 capex print, Apple's $100B buyback, and the mid-May Cerebras IPO push at least one Big-3 hyperscaler into monthly AI-business KPI 10-Q footnotes and the broader S&P AI cohort into quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure by Q4 2026.

summary_short_locales.en: Microsoft's Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate disclosure precedent plus the $700B 2026 capex print, Apple's $100B buyback, and the mid-May Cerebras IPO push at least one Big-3 hyperscaler into monthly AI-business KPI 10-Q footnotes and the broader S&P AI cohort into quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure by Q4 2026.
summary_short_locales.ja: Microsoftの4月29日の370億ドルAIランレート開示前例に加え、7,000億ドルの2026年設備投資プリント、Appleの1,000億ドル自社株買い、5月中旬のCerebras IPOは、2026年Q4までに少なくとも1つのBig-3ハイパースケーラーを月次AIビジネスKPI 10-Qフットノートに、より広範なS&P AIコホートを四半期ごとのAIビジネス別マージン開示に押し上げる。
summary_short_locales.es: El precedente de disclosure del run-rate IA de $37B de Microsoft del 29 abr más el print de capex 2026 de $700B, la recompra de $100B de Apple, y el IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo empujan al menos a un hyperscaler Big-3 a notas al pie de 10-Q con KPIs mensuales de AI-business y al cohorte S&P AI más amplio a disclosure trimestral de margen por AI-business para Q4 2026.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate disclosure precedent ng Microsoft plus ang $700B 2026 capex print, Apple's $100B buyback, at ang mid-May Cerebras IPO ay magtutulak sa hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler papunta sa monthly AI-business KPI 10-Q footnotes at sa mas malawak na S&P AI cohort papunta sa quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure pagsapit ng Q4 2026.

bridges.text: The AMD MI308 cliff plus AAPL printing without an AI-services line plus the May 4 parallel-JV equity-template launches plus the Cathie Wood ARK trim tighten the structural force the prediction names: the disclosure split between cohort capex commitments and audited AI-business KPIs is now operating on every Mag-7 print this cycle.

text_locales.en: The AMD MI308 cliff plus AAPL printing without an AI-services line plus the May 4 parallel-JV equity-template launches plus the Cathie Wood ARK trim tighten the structural force the prediction names: the disclosure split between cohort capex commitments and audited AI-business KPIs is now operating on every Mag-7 print this cycle.
text_locales.ja: AMDのMI308崖 + AAPLがAIサービスラインなしで発表 + 5月4日の並行JVエクイティ・テンプレート・ローンチ + Cathie Wood ARK売却が、予測が指摘する構造的な強制力を引き締める: コホートcapexコミットメントと監査済みAIビジネスKPIの間の開示分裂は、現在このサイクルのすべてのMag-7決算で運用されている。
text_locales.es: El precipicio MI308 de AMD más AAPL imprimiendo sin una línea de servicios de IA más los lanzamientos paralelos de plantilla de capital JV del 4 de mayo más el recorte de Cathie Wood ARK ajustan la fuerza estructural que la predicción nombra: la división de divulgación entre los compromisos de capex de cohorte y los KPIs auditados de negocio de IA ahora opera en cada impresión Mag-7 de este ciclo.
text_locales.fil: Ang AMD MI308 cliff plus AAPL na nagpi-print nang walang AI-services line plus ang May 4 parallel-JV equity-template launches plus ang Cathie Wood ARK trim ay nagpapahigpit sa structural force na pinangalanan ng prediction: ang disclosure split sa pagitan ng cohort capex commitments at audited AI-business KPIs ay umaandar na ngayon sa bawat Mag-7 print sa cycle na ito.

bridges.text: AAPL's record buyback layered on the $700B capex tape and MSFT's $37B run-rate disclosure compose the buyside-pressure backbone the prediction's disclosure-split thesis depends on. Cerebras IPO concentration disclosure adds the public-market stress test, and the May 1 record tape ratifies the AI-capex-on-faith leg.

text_locales.en: AAPL's record buyback layered on the $700B capex tape and MSFT's $37B run-rate disclosure compose the buyside-pressure backbone the prediction's disclosure-split thesis depends on. Cerebras IPO concentration disclosure adds the public-market stress test, and the May 1 record tape ratifies the AI-capex-on-faith leg.
text_locales.ja: AAPLの記録的自社株買いが$700B capexテープに積層され、MSFTの$37B run-rate開示と合わせて、予測の開示分割テーゼが依存する買い手側圧力背骨を構成する。Cerebras IPO集中開示が公開市場ストレステストを加え、5月1日の記録的テープがAI capexオン・フェイス足を批准する。
text_locales.es: La recompra récord de AAPL apilada sobre el tape de capex de $700B y la divulgación de run-rate de $37B de MSFT componen la columna de presión del lado comprador de la que depende la tesis de división de divulgación de la predicción. La divulgación de concentración del IPO de Cerebras añade la prueba de estrés del mercado público, y el tape récord del 1 de mayo ratifica la pierna de capex-de-IA-en-fe.
text_locales.fil: Ang record buyback ng AAPL na nakapatong sa $700B capex tape at ang $37B run-rate disclosure ng MSFT ay bumubuo ng buyside-pressure backbone na inaasahan ng disclosure-split thesis ng prediction. Ang Cerebras IPO concentration disclosure ay nagdaragdag ng public-market stress test, at ang May 1 record tape ay nagra-ratifika sa AI-capex-on-faith leg.

bridges.text: May 1's record tape plus Apple's $100B buyback plus the Agent 365 deployed-agents observability surface plus the Cerebras and AMD print runway match the structural-force conditioning the prediction expects to push a hyperscaler into a monthly AI-KPI 10-Q footnote.

text_locales.en: May 1's record tape plus Apple's $100B buyback plus the Agent 365 deployed-agents observability surface plus the Cerebras and AMD print runway match the structural-force conditioning the prediction expects to push a hyperscaler into a monthly AI-KPI 10-Q footnote.
text_locales.ja: 5月1日のレコードテープ、Appleの$100B自社株買い、Agent 365の展開エージェント観測性サーフェス、CerebrasおよびAMD決算の滑走路が、予測がハイパースケーラーを月次AI-KPI 10-Q脚注に押し込むと期待する構造的力のコンディショニングと一致する。
text_locales.es: La cinta récord del 1 mayo más la recompra de $100B de Apple más la superficie de observabilidad de agentes desplegados de Agent 365 más la pista de impresiones de Cerebras y AMD coinciden con el condicionamiento de fuerza estructural que la predicción espera que empuje a un hyperscaler hacia un pie de página mensual de KPI de IA en el 10-Q.
text_locales.fil: Ang record tape ng May 1 kasama ang $100B buyback ng Apple kasama ang deployed-agents observability surface ng Agent 365 kasama ang Cerebras at AMD print runway ay tumutugma sa structural-force conditioning na inaasahan ng prediction na magtutulak sa hyperscaler patungo sa monthly AI-KPI 10-Q footnote.

needs.actor: Microsoft external-reporting controller driving the audited monthly AI-business KPI 10-Q footnote
needs.job: Operationalize an audited monthly AI-business KPI footnote (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) for the next FY26 10-Q building on the Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate single-line disclosure.
needs.outcome: 10-Q footnote that publishes audited monthly AI-business KPIs as a discrete figure separable from raw cloud-infrastructure revenue, with auditor sign-off.
needs.motivation: Microsoft already cited an explicit $37B AI run-rate (+123%) — the disclosure precedent; the next move under SEC + buyside pressure is monthly-KPI footnote separation, and shipping it first locks in the cohort-template definition.

job_locales.en: Operationalize an audited monthly AI-business KPI footnote (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) for the next FY26 10-Q building on the Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate single-line disclosure.
job_locales.ja: 4月29日の370億ドルAIランレート単一ライン開示に基づいて、次のFY26 10-Qに監査済み月次AIビジネスKPIフットノート(ランレート、有料席、展開済みエージェント)を運用化する。
job_locales.es: Operacionalizar una nota al pie auditada de KPI mensual de AI-business (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) para el próximo 10-Q de FY26 construyendo sobre la disclosure de línea-única del run-rate IA de $37B del 29 abr.
job_locales.fil: I-operationalize ang audited monthly AI-business KPI footnote (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) para sa susunod na FY26 10-Q na nakabase sa Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate single-line disclosure.

outcome_locales.en: 10-Q footnote that publishes audited monthly AI-business KPIs as a discrete figure separable from raw cloud-infrastructure revenue, with auditor sign-off.
outcome_locales.ja: 監査人サインオフ付きで、生のクラウドインフラ収益から分離可能な個別の数値として監査済み月次AIビジネスKPIを公表する10-Qフットノート。
outcome_locales.es: Nota al pie de 10-Q que publica KPIs auditados mensuales de AI-business como una figura discreta separable del revenue cloud-infrastructure crudo, con sign-off del auditor.
outcome_locales.fil: 10-Q footnote na naglalathala ng audited monthly AI-business KPIs bilang discrete figure na nahihiwalay mula sa raw cloud-infrastructure revenue, na may auditor sign-off.

motivation_locales.en: Microsoft already cited an explicit $37B AI run-rate (+123%) — the disclosure precedent; the next move under SEC + buyside pressure is monthly-KPI footnote separation, and shipping it first locks in the cohort-template definition.
motivation_locales.ja: Microsoftはすでに明示的な370億ドルAIランレート(+123%)を引用した ― 開示前例。SEC+買い手側圧力の下での次の動きは月次KPIフットノート分離であり、最初に出荷することがコホートテンプレート定義をロックインする。
motivation_locales.es: Microsoft ya citó un run-rate IA explícito de $37B (+123%) — el precedente de disclosure; el siguiente movimiento bajo presión SEC + buyside es la separación de nota al pie de KPI mensual, y enviarla primero bloquea la definición del template del cohorte.
motivation_locales.fil: Sinipi na ng Microsoft ang explicit na $37B AI run-rate (+123%) — ang disclosure precedent; ang susunod na hakbang sa ilalim ng SEC + buyside pressure ay monthly-KPI footnote separation, at ang pag-ship nito muna ay nag-lock in ng cohort-template definition.

job_locales.es: Establecer disclosure trimestral de margen por AI-business que sigue el precedente de KPI mensual de Microsoft con cadencia trimestral para el cohorte de IA más amplio.
job_locales.fil: Itayo ang quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure na sumusunod sa Microsoft monthly-KPI precedent sa quarterly cadence para sa mas malawak na AI cohort.

outcome_locales.en: Quarterly earnings report with a per-AI-business margin line separated from consolidated services / hardware revenue, audited and footnoted.
outcome_locales.ja: 監査済みでフットノートされた、連結サービス / ハードウェア収益から分離されたAIビジネス別マージンラインを伴う四半期決算報告。

outcome_locales.fil: Quarterly earnings report na may per-AI-business margin line na hiwalay sa consolidated services / hardware revenue, audited at footnoted.

motivation_locales.en: Apr 30 Apple's record Services line with no AI-services break is exactly the disclosure gap public markets are pricing; the cohort follower that ships first earns a financing-cost premium discount and forces peers to match.
motivation_locales.ja: 4月30日のAppleの記録的なサービスラインにAIサービスの内訳がないことは、まさに公開市場が価格設定している開示ギャップである。最初に出荷するコホートフォロワーが資金調達コストプレミアム割引を獲得し、ピアにマッチを強制する。
motivation_locales.es: La línea récord de Services del 30 abr de Apple sin break de AI-services es exactamente el gap de disclosure que los mercados públicos están preciando; el seguidor del cohorte que envía primero gana un descuento de prima de costo de financiamiento y fuerza a peers a igualar.
motivation_locales.fil: Ang Apr 30 record Services line ng Apple nang walang AI-services break ay eksaktong disclosure gap na pinepresyuhan ng public markets; ang cohort follower na mag-ship muna ay makakakuha ng financing-cost premium discount at pipilitin ang peers na sumunod.

outcome_locales.es: Nota de research del buyside que califica al cohorte Mag 7 + S&P AI sobre la calidad de disclosure de capex IA y proyecta compresión de múltiplo para nombres de baja-disclosure.
outcome_locales.fil: Buyside research note na nag-iiscore sa Mag 7 + S&P AI cohort sa AI-capex disclosure quality at nagpa-project ng multiple compression para sa low-disclosure names.

motivation_locales.es: El miss de revenue de OpenAI del WSJ del 28 abr + el reset mixto Mag 7 del 29 abr (META -7,5%, MSFT -3,8% en día de print) muestra que los mercados públicos ya precian diferenciales de calidad-de-disclosure; el analista que envía el framework de scoring primero se vuelve la referencia canónica y acelera el ciclo de disclosure.
motivation_locales.fil: Ang Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% sa print day) ay nagpapakita na ang public markets ay nagpa-presyo na ng disclosure-quality differentials; ang analyst na mag-ship ng scoring framework muna ay nagiging canonical reference at nag-a-accelerate ng disclosure cycle.
