detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: The Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination cements 2026 as the year AI-capex disclosure splits into two reporting cadences — by Q4 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (most likely Microsoft, given the Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) publishes audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) as a 10-Q footnote; the broader S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) follows with quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure. Apr 29 Microsoft's $37B AI run-rate (+123%) was the disclosure precedent; Apr 30 Apple's record Services $30.98B (+16%) included no separate AI-services line; Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) on the way to $700B 2026 capex is the buyside-pressure number; mid-May Cerebras IPO at $22-25B with 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration is the disclosure stress-test. Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% on print day) shows public-market price discrimination is already operating on imprecise AI-revenue numbers; the path of least resistance is for the most-disclosing hyperscaler to set the precedent and force the cohort to follow. SEC will not need to act ahead of voluntary disclosure here — the buyside is the forcing function.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: Mag 7スーパーウィーク+7,000億ドル-2026年AI設備投資プリント+4月30日のApple +1,000億ドル-自社株買い／4%-配当増の組み合わせは、2026年をAI設備投資開示が2つの報告ケイデンスに分裂する年として確定する ― 2026年Q4までに、少なくとも1つのBig-3ハイパースケーラー(4月29日の370億ドルAIランレート前例を踏まえると、Microsoftの可能性が最も高い)が監査済みの月次AIビジネスKPI(ランレート、有料席、展開済みエージェント)を10-Qフットノートとして公表し、より広範なS&P AIコホート(Apple、IPO後のCerebras、Broadcom)が四半期ごとのAIビジネス別マージン開示で追随する。4月29日のMicrosoftの370億ドルAIランレート(+123%)は開示の前例であり、4月30日のAppleの記録的なサービス収益309.8億ドル(+16%)はAIサービスの個別ラインを含まなかった。4月30日のビッグテックの1,300億ドル超のQ1設備投資(Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon)は2026年の7,000億ドル設備投資への道のりであり、買い手側の圧力数値である。5月中旬のCerebras IPOは220億～250億ドルの評価額で、収益集中度はG42 24%／MBZUAI 62%であり、開示のストレステストである。4月28日のWSJ OpenAI収益不振+4月29日のMag 7混合リセット(プリント当日にMETA -7.5%、MSFT -3.8%)は、公開市場の価格差別が既に不正確なAI収益数値で動いていることを示している。最も抵抗の少ないパスは、最も開示するハイパースケーラーが前例を作り、コホートに追随を強制することである。SECは自主開示に先立って行動する必要はない ― 買い手側がここで強制関数となる。
prediction_summary_locales.es: La super-semana Mag 7 + el print de capex-IA-2026 de $700B + la combinación recompra de +$100B / alza de dividendo del 4% de Apple del 30 abr cementan 2026 como el año en que la disclosure de capex IA se divide en dos cadencias de reporte — para Q4 2026, al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 (muy probablemente Microsoft, dado el precedente del run-rate IA de $37B del 29 abr) publica KPIs auditados mensuales de AI-business (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) como nota al pie del 10-Q; el cohorte S&P AI más amplio (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) sigue con disclosure trimestral de margen por AI-business. El run-rate IA de $37B (+123%) de Microsoft del 29 abr fue el precedente de disclosure; el récord de Services de $30.98B (+16%) de Apple del 30 abr no incluyó línea separada de AI-services; el capex Q1 de Big Tech de $130B+ del 30 abr (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) en camino a $700B de capex 2026 es el número de presión buyside; el IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo a $22-25B con concentración de revenue 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI es el stress-test de disclosure. El miss de revenue de OpenAI del WSJ del 28 abr + el reset mixto Mag 7 del 29 abr (META -7,5%, MSFT -3,8% en día de print) muestra que la price discrimination de mercado público ya está operando sobre números imprecisos de revenue IA; el camino de menor resistencia es que el hyperscaler más-disclosing fije el precedente y fuerce al cohorte a seguir. La SEC no necesitará actuar antes de la disclosure voluntaria aquí — el buyside es la función forzante.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: Ang kombinasyon ng Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike ay magpapatatag sa 2026 bilang taon kung kailan ang AI-capex disclosure ay mahahati sa dalawang reporting cadences — pagsapit ng Q4 2026, hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (malamang Microsoft, dahil sa Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) ang maglalathala ng audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) bilang 10-Q footnote; susunod ang mas malawak na S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) na may quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure. Ang Apr 29 Microsoft's $37B AI run-rate (+123%) ang disclosure precedent; ang Apr 30 Apple's record Services $30.98B (+16%) ay hindi naglakip ng hiwalay na AI-services line; ang Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) papunta sa $700B 2026 capex ang buyside-pressure number; ang mid-May Cerebras IPO sa $22-25B na may 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration ay ang disclosure stress-test. Ang Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% sa print day) ay nagpapakita na ang public-market price discrimination ay umaandar na sa imprecise AI-revenue numbers; ang path of least resistance ay para sa pinaka-disclosing hyperscaler na magtakda ng precedent at piliting sundin ng cohort. Hindi na kailangang mag-act ang SEC bago ang voluntary disclosure dito — ang buyside ang forcing function.

nodes.label: Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility
nodes.short_label: Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility
nodes.title: Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility
nodes.description: Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility — by Q4 2026 the FOMC under Warsh as Chair reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2) on rate calls but the Powell-Warsh disagreement on Fed-investigation governance becomes the marginal swing-vote on any Fed-independence question; equity-market AI-capex re-rating events become more sensitive to Fed-Board signaling than to FOMC statement language. Apr 29 was the first 4-dissenter FOMC since 1992; Powell-staying-on-Board is unprecedented since 1948; Warsh confirmed by Senate Banking on Apr 29 with full-Senate vote scheduled before May 15; Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) is partially priced on rate-cut hopes that the FOMC dissent posture has not yet validated; May 1 Apr jobs print at the consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) is the first weakening data into the handoff window. The "Powell as shadow chair" framing was specifically rejected by Powell on Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") but the institutional reality of a 7-member Board with Powell as a dissenting governor under a Warsh chair creates exactly that dynamic on Fed-independence questions, even if not on rates. Markets will compress rate-volatility pricing and inflate institutional-risk pricing through 2026 H2.

label.en: Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility
label.ja: Powellの2028年までの連邦準備制度理事会への留任決定+4月29日の8-4反対票(1992年10月以来最高)+5月15日の議長交代ウィンドウ前面の5月1日4月雇用統計プリントは、2026年の金融政策市場心理を金利ボラティリティから制度的ボラティリティへとシフトさせる
label.es: La decisión de Powell de quedarse en la Federal Reserve Board hasta 2028 + el disenso 8-4 del 29 abr (el más alto desde oct-1992) + el print de empleo de abril del 1 may al frente del ventana de handoff del Chair del 15 may desplaza la psicología de mercado de política monetaria 2026 de rate-volatility a institutional-volatility
label.fil: Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Federal Reserve Board hanggang 2028 + ang Apr 29 8-4 dissent (pinakamataas mula Oct-1992) + ang May 1 Apr-jobs print sa harap ng May 15 Chair handoff window ay maglilipat ng 2026 monetary-policy market psychology mula rate-volatility patungo sa institutional-volatility

description.en: Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility — by Q4 2026 the FOMC under Warsh as Chair reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2) on rate calls but the Powell-Warsh disagreement on Fed-investigation governance becomes the marginal swing-vote on any Fed-independence question; equity-market AI-capex re-rating events become more sensitive to Fed-Board signaling than to FOMC statement language. Apr 29 was the first 4-dissenter FOMC since 1992; Powell-staying-on-Board is unprecedented since 1948; Warsh confirmed by Senate Banking on Apr 29 with full-Senate vote scheduled before May 15; Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) is partially priced on rate-cut hopes that the FOMC dissent posture has not yet validated; May 1 Apr jobs print at the consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) is the first weakening data into the handoff window. The "Powell as shadow chair" framing was specifically rejected by Powell on Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") but the institutional reality of a 7-member Board with Powell as a dissenting governor under a Warsh chair creates exactly that dynamic on Fed-independence questions, even if not on rates. Markets will compress rate-volatility pricing and inflate institutional-risk pricing through 2026 H2.
description.ja: Powellの2028年までの連邦準備制度理事会への留任決定+4月29日の8-4反対票(1992年10月以来最高)+5月15日の議長交代ウィンドウ前面の5月1日4月雇用統計プリントは、2026年の金融政策市場心理を金利ボラティリティから制度的ボラティリティへとシフトさせる ― 2026年Q4までにWarsh議長下のFOMCは金利決定で小規模な反対票標準(2票以下)に戻るが、Fed調査ガバナンスに関するPowell-Warshの不一致が連邦準備制度の独立性に関する問題での限界スイング票となり、株式市場のAI設備投資再評価イベントはFOMC声明の文言よりも理事会のシグナリングに敏感になる。4月29日は1992年以来初の4反対票FOMCであり、Powellの理事会留任は1948年以来前例がなく、Warshは4月29日に上院銀行委員会で承認され、5月15日前に上院本会議投票が予定されている。4月30日のMag-7月次テープ(2020年以来最高の月)はFOMC反対姿勢がまだ検証していない利下げ期待で部分的に価格設定されている。5月1日の4月雇用統計プリントはコンセンサス13.5万件(3月17.8万件比)で、交代ウィンドウへの最初の弱含みデータである。「シャドウ議長としてのPowell」フレーミングは4月29日にPowellによって明確に拒否された(「私はシャドウ議長にはならない」)が、Warsh議長下で反対票理事としてのPowellを伴う7名理事会の制度的現実は、金利ではないにせよ、Fed独立性の問題でまさにそのダイナミクスを生み出す。市場は2026年下半期を通じて金利ボラティリティ価格を圧縮し、制度的リスク価格を膨張させるだろう。
description.es: La decisión de Powell de quedarse en la Federal Reserve Board hasta 2028 + el disenso 8-4 del 29 abr (el más alto desde oct-1992) + el print de empleo de abril del 1 may al frente del ventana de handoff del Chair del 15 may desplaza la psicología de mercado de política monetaria 2026 de rate-volatility a institutional-volatility — para Q4 2026 el FOMC bajo Warsh como Chair revierte a una norma de menor disenso (≤2) en decisiones de tasas pero el desacuerdo Powell-Warsh sobre gobernanza de la investigación a la Fed se vuelve el voto bisagra marginal en cualquier cuestión de Fed-independence; los eventos de re-rating de capex IA del mercado equity se vuelven más sensibles al señaling de la Fed-Board que al lenguaje del statement del FOMC. El 29 abr fue el primer FOMC con 4 disidentes desde 1992; Powell-quedarse-en-Board no tiene precedente desde 1948; Warsh confirmado por Senate Banking el 29 abr con voto del Senado completo programado antes del 15 may; el tape mensual Mag-7 del 30 abr (mejor mes desde 2020) está parcialmente preciado sobre esperanzas de rate-cut que la postura de disenso del FOMC aún no ha validado; el print de empleo de abril del 1 may al consenso de 135K (vs 178K de marzo) es la primera data de debilitamiento dentro de la ventana de handoff. El framing de "Powell como shadow chair" fue específicamente rechazado por Powell el 29 abr ("No seré un shadow chair") pero la realidad institucional de una Board de 7 miembros con Powell como gobernador disidente bajo un Chair Warsh crea exactamente esa dinámica en cuestiones de Fed-independence, aunque no en tasas. Los mercados comprimirán el pricing de rate-volatility e inflarán el pricing de institutional-risk a través del H2 2026.
description.fil: Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Federal Reserve Board hanggang 2028 + ang Apr 29 8-4 dissent (pinakamataas mula Oct-1992) + ang May 1 Apr-jobs print sa harap ng May 15 Chair handoff window ay maglilipat ng 2026 monetary-policy market psychology mula rate-volatility patungo sa institutional-volatility — pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ang FOMC sa ilalim ni Warsh bilang Chair ay babalik sa smaller-dissent norm (≤2) sa rate calls ngunit ang Powell-Warsh disagreement sa Fed-investigation governance ay magiging marginal swing-vote sa anumang Fed-independence question; ang equity-market AI-capex re-rating events ay magiging mas sensitibo sa Fed-Board signaling kaysa sa FOMC statement language. Ang Apr 29 ang unang 4-dissenter FOMC mula 1992; ang Powell-staying-on-Board ay walang pang precedent mula 1948; kinumpirma si Warsh ng Senate Banking noong Apr 29 na may full-Senate vote na nakaiskedyul bago ang May 15; ang Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) ay bahagyang naka-price sa rate-cut hopes na hindi pa na-validate ng FOMC dissent posture; ang May 1 Apr jobs print sa consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) ang unang weakening data papasok sa handoff window. Ang "Powell as shadow chair" framing ay partikular na tinanggihan ni Powell noong Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") ngunit ang institutional reality ng 7-member Board kasama si Powell bilang dissenting governor sa ilalim ng Warsh chair ay lumilikha mismo ng dynamic na iyon sa mga Fed-independence questions, kahit na hindi sa rates. Mag-co-compress ang markets ng rate-volatility pricing at mag-iinflate ng institutional-risk pricing hanggang 2026 H2.

summary.en: Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility — by Q4 2026 the FOMC under Warsh as Chair reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2) on rate calls but the Powell-Warsh disagreement on Fed-investigation governance becomes the marginal swing-vote on any Fed-independence question; equity-market AI-capex re-rating events become more sensitive to Fed-Board signaling than to FOMC statement language. Apr 29 was the first 4-dissenter FOMC since 1992; Powell-staying-on-Board is unprecedented since 1948; Warsh confirmed by Senate Banking on Apr 29 with full-Senate vote scheduled before May 15; Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) is partially priced on rate-cut hopes that the FOMC dissent posture has not yet validated; May 1 Apr jobs print at the consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) is the first weakening data into the handoff window. The "Powell as shadow chair" framing was specifically rejected by Powell on Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") but the institutional reality of a 7-member Board with Powell as a dissenting governor under a Warsh chair creates exactly that dynamic on Fed-independence questions, even if not on rates. Markets will compress rate-volatility pricing and inflate institutional-risk pricing through 2026 H2.

detail.summary_short: Powell's choice to stay on the Board through 2028 plus the Apr 29 8-4 FOMC dissent, Warsh's pending Chair confirmation, and the May 1 Apr jobs print compress rate-volatility pricing while inflating institutional-risk pricing — by Q4 2026 FOMC dissent reverts to ≤2 on rates while Powell's Board vote becomes the marginal signal on Fed-independence questions.

summary_short_locales.en: Powell's choice to stay on the Board through 2028 plus the Apr 29 8-4 FOMC dissent, Warsh's pending Chair confirmation, and the May 1 Apr jobs print compress rate-volatility pricing while inflating institutional-risk pricing — by Q4 2026 FOMC dissent reverts to ≤2 on rates while Powell's Board vote becomes the marginal signal on Fed-independence questions.
summary_short_locales.ja: Powellの2028年までの理事会留任の選択に加え、4月29日の8-4 FOMC反対票、Warshの議長承認待ち、5月1日の4月雇用統計プリントは、金利ボラティリティ価格を圧縮しつつ制度的リスク価格を膨張させる ― 2026年Q4までにFOMC反対票は金利で2票以下に戻る一方で、Powellの理事会票はFed独立性の問題に関する限界シグナルとなる。
summary_short_locales.es: La elección de Powell de quedarse en la Board hasta 2028 más el disenso FOMC 8-4 del 29 abr, la confirmación pendiente de Warsh como Chair, y el print de empleo de abril del 1 may comprimen el pricing de rate-volatility mientras inflan el pricing de institutional-risk — para Q4 2026 el disenso del FOMC revierte a ≤2 en tasas mientras que el voto de Powell en la Board se vuelve la señal marginal en cuestiones de Fed-independence.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang pagpili ni Powell na manatili sa Board hanggang 2028 plus ang Apr 29 8-4 FOMC dissent, ang nakabinbing confirmation ni Warsh bilang Chair, at ang May 1 Apr jobs print ay nag-co-compress ng rate-volatility pricing habang nag-iinflate ng institutional-risk pricing — pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ang FOMC dissent ay babalik sa ≤2 sa rates habang ang Board vote ni Powell ang magiging marginal signal sa Fed-independence questions.

bridges.text: Powell's stay-through-2028 plus Warsh's pending full-Senate vote plus the May 1 jobs print into the Chair-handoff window are the institutional configuration the prediction's rate-to-institutional-volatility migration depends on. The May 1 record tape adds the equity sensitivity layer that turns Fed-Board signaling into a re-rating lever.

text_locales.en: Powell's stay-through-2028 plus Warsh's pending full-Senate vote plus the May 1 jobs print into the Chair-handoff window are the institutional configuration the prediction's rate-to-institutional-volatility migration depends on. The May 1 record tape adds the equity sensitivity layer that turns Fed-Board signaling into a re-rating lever.
text_locales.ja: Powellの2028年までの残留、Warshの保留中の全院投票、5月1日の雇用統計が議長交代ウィンドウに向かうことが、予測の金利から制度ボラティリティへの移行が依存する制度配置だ。5月1日の記録的テープは、連邦理事会シグナリングを再格付けレバーに変える株式感応度層を加える。
text_locales.es: La permanencia de Powell hasta 2028 más el voto pendiente del Senado completo de Warsh más la impresión de empleos del 1 de mayo hacia la ventana de transferencia de Presidencia son la configuración institucional de la que depende la migración de tasas a volatilidad institucional de la predicción. El tape récord del 1 de mayo añade la capa de sensibilidad de renta variable que convierte las señales de la Junta de la Fed en una palanca de re-rating.
text_locales.fil: Ang stay-through-2028 ni Powell plus ang nakabinbing full-Senate vote ni Warsh plus ang May 1 jobs print papasok sa Chair-handoff window ang institutional configuration na inaasahan ng rate-to-institutional-volatility migration ng prediction. Ang May 1 record tape ay nagdaragdag ng equity sensitivity layer na nagpapalit sa Fed-Board signaling tungo sa re-rating lever.

bridges.text: The BLS clarification that the Apr employment print actually lands May 8 shifts the original timing arc by one week; Powell's announced Board posture stays intact, so the institutional-volatility regime remains the structurally-favored landing.

text_locales.en: The BLS clarification that the Apr employment print actually lands May 8 shifts the original timing arc by one week; Powell's announced Board posture stays intact, so the institutional-volatility regime remains the structurally-favored landing.
text_locales.ja: 4月雇用統計が実際には5月8日に着地するというBLSの明確化が、当初のタイミングアークを1週間ずらす;Powellの発表されたBoard姿勢は無傷のままであり、制度的ボラティリティ体制は構造的に好まれる着地のままである。
text_locales.es: La aclaración del BLS de que la impresión de empleo de abril realmente aterriza el 8 mayo desplaza el arco de tiempo original en una semana; la postura de la Junta anunciada por Powell se mantiene intacta, así que el régimen de volatilidad institucional sigue siendo el aterrizaje estructuralmente favorecido.
text_locales.fil: Ang BLS clarification na ang Apr employment print ay aktwal na lumalapag noong May 8 ay naglilipat ng original timing arc nang isang linggo; nananatili ang inanunsyong Board posture ni Powell, kaya nananatili ang institutional-volatility regime bilang structurally-favored landing.

outcome_locales.fil: Unang Warsh-led FOMC press conference + statement na nag-re-anchor ng dissent norm at explicit na naghihiwalay sa rate framing mula sa governance posture.

motivation_locales.en: The Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) is unsustainable as a steady-state framing; the incoming Chair must compress rate-call dissent to restore forward-guidance volatility to a normal envelope before the May 1 jobs print and into Q3-Q4 2026.
motivation_locales.ja: 4月29日の8-4反対票(1992年10月以来最高)は定常状態フレーミングとして持続不可能である。新議長は、5月1日の雇用統計プリント前および2026年Q3-Q4にわたって、フォワードガイダンスボラティリティを通常範囲に戻すために金利決定の反対票を圧縮しなければならない。
motivation_locales.es: El disenso 8-4 del 29 abr (el más alto desde oct-1992) es insostenible como framing steady-state; el Chair entrante debe comprimir el disenso de decisiones de tasas para restaurar la volatilidad de forward-guidance a un envelope normal antes del print de empleo del 1 may y dentro de Q3-Q4 2026.
motivation_locales.fil: Ang Apr 29 8-4 dissent (pinakamataas mula Oct-1992) ay hindi sustainable bilang steady-state framing; ang incoming Chair ay dapat mag-compress ng rate-call dissent upang maibalik ang forward-guidance volatility sa normal envelope bago ang May 1 jobs print at papasok sa Q3-Q4 2026.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility — by Q4 2026 the FOMC under Warsh as Chair reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2) on rate calls but the Powell-Warsh disagreement on Fed-investigation governance becomes the marginal swing-vote on any Fed-independence question; equity-market AI-capex re-rating events become more sensitive to Fed-Board signaling than to FOMC statement language. Apr 29 was the first 4-dissenter FOMC since 1992; Powell-staying-on-Board is unprecedented since 1948; Warsh confirmed by Senate Banking on Apr 29 with full-Senate vote scheduled before May 15; Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) is partially priced on rate-cut hopes that the FOMC dissent posture has not yet validated; May 1 Apr jobs print at the consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) is the first weakening data into the handoff window. The "Powell as shadow chair" framing was specifically rejected by Powell on Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") but the institutional reality of a 7-member Board with Powell as a dissenting governor under a Warsh chair creates exactly that dynamic on Fed-independence questions, even if not on rates. Markets will compress rate-volatility pricing and inflate institutional-risk pricing through 2026 H2.

Apr 29 was the first 4-dissenter FOMC since 1992; Powell-staying-on-Board is unprecedented since 1948; Warsh confirmed by Senate Banking on Apr 29 with full-Senate vote scheduled before May 15; Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) is partially priced on rate-cut hopes that the FOMC dissent posture has not yet validated; May 1 Apr jobs print at the consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) is the first weakening data into the handoff window. The "Powell as shadow chair" framing was specifically rejected by Powell on Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") but the institutional reality of a 7-member Board with Powell as a dissenting governor under a Warsh chair creates exactly that dynamic on Fed-independence questions, even if not on rates. Markets will compress rate-volatility pricing and inflate institutional-risk pricing through 2026 H2.

prediction_summary_locales.en: Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility — by Q4 2026 the FOMC under Warsh as Chair reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2) on rate calls but the Powell-Warsh disagreement on Fed-investigation governance becomes the marginal swing-vote on any Fed-independence question; equity-market AI-capex re-rating events become more sensitive to Fed-Board signaling than to FOMC statement language. Apr 29 was the first 4-dissenter FOMC since 1992; Powell-staying-on-Board is unprecedented since 1948; Warsh confirmed by Senate Banking on Apr 29 with full-Senate vote scheduled before May 15; Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) is partially priced on rate-cut hopes that the FOMC dissent posture has not yet validated; May 1 Apr jobs print at the consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) is the first weakening data into the handoff window. The "Powell as shadow chair" framing was specifically rejected by Powell on Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") but the institutional reality of a 7-member Board with Powell as a dissenting governor under a Warsh chair creates exactly that dynamic on Fed-independence questions, even if not on rates. Markets will compress rate-volatility pricing and inflate institutional-risk pricing through 2026 H2.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: Powellの2028年までの連邦準備制度理事会への留任決定+4月29日の8-4反対票(1992年10月以来最高)+5月15日の議長交代ウィンドウ前面の5月1日4月雇用統計プリントは、2026年の金融政策市場心理を金利ボラティリティから制度的ボラティリティへとシフトさせる ― 2026年Q4までにWarsh議長下のFOMCは金利決定で小規模な反対票標準(2票以下)に戻るが、Fed調査ガバナンスに関するPowell-Warshの不一致が連邦準備制度の独立性に関する問題での限界スイング票となり、株式市場のAI設備投資再評価イベントはFOMC声明の文言よりも理事会のシグナリングに敏感になる。4月29日は1992年以来初の4反対票FOMCであり、Powellの理事会留任は1948年以来前例がなく、Warshは4月29日に上院銀行委員会で承認され、5月15日前に上院本会議投票が予定されている。4月30日のMag-7月次テープ(2020年以来最高の月)はFOMC反対姿勢がまだ検証していない利下げ期待で部分的に価格設定されている。5月1日の4月雇用統計プリントはコンセンサス13.5万件(3月17.8万件比)で、交代ウィンドウへの最初の弱含みデータである。「シャドウ議長としてのPowell」フレーミングは4月29日にPowellによって明確に拒否された(「私はシャドウ議長にはならない」)が、Warsh議長下で反対票理事としてのPowellを伴う7名理事会の制度的現実は、金利ではないにせよ、Fed独立性の問題でまさにそのダイナミクスを生み出す。市場は2026年下半期を通じて金利ボラティリティ価格を圧縮し、制度的リスク価格を膨張させるだろう。
prediction_summary_locales.es: La decisión de Powell de quedarse en la Federal Reserve Board hasta 2028 + el disenso 8-4 del 29 abr (el más alto desde oct-1992) + el print de empleo de abril del 1 may al frente del ventana de handoff del Chair del 15 may desplaza la psicología de mercado de política monetaria 2026 de rate-volatility a institutional-volatility — para Q4 2026 el FOMC bajo Warsh como Chair revierte a una norma de menor disenso (≤2) en decisiones de tasas pero el desacuerdo Powell-Warsh sobre gobernanza de la investigación a la Fed se vuelve el voto bisagra marginal en cualquier cuestión de Fed-independence; los eventos de re-rating de capex IA del mercado equity se vuelven más sensibles al señaling de la Fed-Board que al lenguaje del statement del FOMC. El 29 abr fue el primer FOMC con 4 disidentes desde 1992; Powell-quedarse-en-Board no tiene precedente desde 1948; Warsh confirmado por Senate Banking el 29 abr con voto del Senado completo programado antes del 15 may; el tape mensual Mag-7 del 30 abr (mejor mes desde 2020) está parcialmente preciado sobre esperanzas de rate-cut que la postura de disenso del FOMC aún no ha validado; el print de empleo de abril del 1 may al consenso de 135K (vs 178K de marzo) es la primera data de debilitamiento dentro de la ventana de handoff. El framing de "Powell como shadow chair" fue específicamente rechazado por Powell el 29 abr ("No seré un shadow chair") pero la realidad institucional de una Board de 7 miembros con Powell como gobernador disidente bajo un Chair Warsh crea exactamente esa dinámica en cuestiones de Fed-independence, aunque no en tasas. Los mercados comprimirán el pricing de rate-volatility e inflarán el pricing de institutional-risk a través del H2 2026.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Federal Reserve Board hanggang 2028 + ang Apr 29 8-4 dissent (pinakamataas mula Oct-1992) + ang May 1 Apr-jobs print sa harap ng May 15 Chair handoff window ay maglilipat ng 2026 monetary-policy market psychology mula rate-volatility patungo sa institutional-volatility — pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ang FOMC sa ilalim ni Warsh bilang Chair ay babalik sa smaller-dissent norm (≤2) sa rate calls ngunit ang Powell-Warsh disagreement sa Fed-investigation governance ay magiging marginal swing-vote sa anumang Fed-independence question; ang equity-market AI-capex re-rating events ay magiging mas sensitibo sa Fed-Board signaling kaysa sa FOMC statement language. Ang Apr 29 ang unang 4-dissenter FOMC mula 1992; ang Powell-staying-on-Board ay walang pang precedent mula 1948; kinumpirma si Warsh ng Senate Banking noong Apr 29 na may full-Senate vote na nakaiskedyul bago ang May 15; ang Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) ay bahagyang naka-price sa rate-cut hopes na hindi pa na-validate ng FOMC dissent posture; ang May 1 Apr jobs print sa consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) ang unang weakening data papasok sa handoff window. Ang "Powell as shadow chair" framing ay partikular na tinanggihan ni Powell noong Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") ngunit ang institutional reality ng 7-member Board kasama si Powell bilang dissenting governor sa ilalim ng Warsh chair ay lumilikha mismo ng dynamic na iyon sa mga Fed-independence questions, kahit na hindi sa rates. Mag-co-compress ang markets ng rate-volatility pricing at mag-iinflate ng institutional-risk pricing hanggang 2026 H2.

plain_language.en: AI coding helpers can be tricked into leaking passwords from build servers. Soon, security guides will list this as a top risk to fix.
plain_language.ja: AIコーディングアシスタントは、ビルドサーバーからパスワードを漏洩させるよう仕向けられる可能性がある。近いうちに、セキュリティガイドはこれを最優先で対処すべきリスクとして掲載するだろう。
plain_language.es: Los asistentes de codificación con IA pueden ser engañados para filtrar contraseñas de los servidores de compilación. Pronto, las guías de seguridad listarán esto como un riesgo prioritario a corregir.
plain_language.fil: Ang AI coding helpers ay maaaring linlangin upang magpalabas ng mga password mula sa build servers. Sa lalong madaling panahon, ililista ito ng security guides bilang isang top risk na kailangang ayusin.

detail.summary_short: GitHub Actions indirect prompt injection proofs-of-concept reproduce across Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Copilot in the same window. Through Q2-Q3 2026, a new supply-chain category, Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration, is expected to rise to the top of CIS and OWASP risk lists.

summary_short_locales.en: GitHub Actions indirect prompt injection proofs-of-concept reproduce across Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Copilot in the same window. Through Q2-Q3 2026, a new supply-chain category, Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration, is expected to rise to the top of CIS and OWASP risk lists.
summary_short_locales.ja: GitHub Actionsを介した間接プロンプトインジェクションのPoCが、同時期にClaude Code、Gemini CLI、Copilotで再現されている。2026年Q2-Q3にかけて、新たなサプライチェーンカテゴリ「Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration」がCISおよびOWASPのリスクリスト上位に台頭すると見込まれる。
summary_short_locales.es: Las pruebas de concepto de inyección indirecta de prompts en GitHub Actions se reproducen en Claude Code, Gemini CLI y Copilot en la misma ventana. Durante el Q2-Q3 2026, se espera que una nueva categoría de cadena de suministro, Exfiltración de Secretos con Agente en el Bucle, ascienda a la cima de las listas de riesgos de CIS y OWASP.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang GitHub Actions indirect prompt injection proofs-of-concept ay reproducible sa Claude Code, Gemini CLI, at Copilot sa parehong window. Sa loob ng Q2-Q3 2026, isang bagong supply-chain category, ang Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration, ay inaasahang aakyat sa tuktok ng CIS at OWASP risk lists.

bridges.text: Antigravity sandbox-escape and the rising indirect-prompt-injection prevalence are exactly the underlying-cause primitives for an Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration class to surface — the supporting evidence is good but doesn't yet show OWASP movement.

text_locales.en: Antigravity sandbox-escape and the rising indirect-prompt-injection prevalence are exactly the underlying-cause primitives for an Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration class to surface — the supporting evidence is good but doesn't yet show OWASP movement.
text_locales.ja: Antigravity のサンドボックス エスケープと間接プロンプトインジェクション拡散の上昇は、まさに「Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration」クラスを浮上させる根底原因のプリミティブそのものだ — 支持エビデンスは良好だが、まだ OWASP の動きを示してはいない。
text_locales.es: El escape de sandbox de Antigravity y la creciente prevalencia de prompt-injection indirecto son exactamente las primitivas de causa subyacente para que aflore una clase de Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration — la evidencia de apoyo es buena pero aún no muestra movimiento en OWASP.
text_locales.fil: Ang Antigravity sandbox-escape at ang tumataas na indirect-prompt-injection prevalence ay eksaktong underlying-cause primitives para sa Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration class na lumitaw — ang supporting evidence ay maganda ngunit hindi pa nagpapakita ng OWASP movement.

bridges.text: Pillar Security's Antigravity walkthrough showing the `find_by_name -X` flag insertion bypassing Secure Mode, CSO Online's framing of the same path as file-search-to-RCE, and the Cloud Security Alliance research note on agentic-IDE sandbox escape together confirm a third agentic-CI vendor exposed to the comment-style class, but no OWASP / CIS top-list category named for the pattern lands inside the window.

text_locales.en: Pillar Security's Antigravity walkthrough showing the `find_by_name -X` flag insertion bypassing Secure Mode, CSO Online's framing of the same path as file-search-to-RCE, and the Cloud Security Alliance research note on agentic-IDE sandbox escape together confirm a third agentic-CI vendor exposed to the comment-style class, but no OWASP / CIS top-list category named for the pattern lands inside the window.
text_locales.ja: Pillar SecurityのAntigravityウォークスルー(`find_by_name -X`フラグ挿入によるSecure Modeバイパス)、CSO Onlineの同じパスをファイル検索からRCEへとフレーミング、Cloud Security Allianceのエージェンティック・IDEサンドボックス・エスケープに関するリサーチノートが共に、コメント・スタイルクラスにさらされる第3のエージェンティックCIベンダーを確認するが、パターンを名指しするOWASP / CIS上位リストカテゴリーはウィンドウ内に着地しない。
text_locales.es: El walkthrough de Antigravity de Pillar Security mostrando la inserción del flag `find_by_name -X` evadiendo Secure Mode, el encuadre de CSO Online de la misma vía como búsqueda-de-archivos-a-RCE, y la nota de investigación de Cloud Security Alliance sobre el escape de sandbox en IDE agéntico juntos confirman un tercer vendor de CI agéntico expuesto a la clase de estilo comentario, pero ninguna categoría top-list de OWASP / CIS nombrada para el patrón llega dentro de la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang Pillar Security's Antigravity walkthrough na nagpapakita ng `find_by_name -X` flag insertion na nilalampasan ang Secure Mode, ang CSO Online's framing ng parehong path bilang file-search-to-RCE, at ang Cloud Security Alliance research note sa agentic-IDE sandbox escape ay magkasamang nagkukumpirma ng pangatlong agentic-CI vendor na na-expose sa comment-style class, ngunit walang OWASP / CIS top-list category na pinangalanan para sa pattern ang lumapag sa loob ng window.

bridges.text: The Hacker News' Nginx UI MCPwn writeup confirming a 2-request takeover via an empty default IP allowlist exposing 12 unauthenticated MCP tool calls reinforces the agent-credential-reachable precondition, but no OWASP / CIS top-list entry naming Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration as a category lands inside the window.

text_locales.en: The Hacker News' Nginx UI MCPwn writeup confirming a 2-request takeover via an empty default IP allowlist exposing 12 unauthenticated MCP tool calls reinforces the agent-credential-reachable precondition, but no OWASP / CIS top-list entry naming Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration as a category lands inside the window.
text_locales.ja: The Hacker NewsのNginx UI MCPwn分析が、12個の認証なしMCPツール・コールを公開する空のデフォルトIPアロウリスト経由の2リクエスト乗っ取りを確認し、エージェント認証情報到達可能の前提条件を補強しているが、ウィンドウ内ではAgent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltrationをカテゴリとして名指しするOWASP / CISトップリスト・エントリは登場していない。
text_locales.es: El writeup MCPwn de Nginx UI de The Hacker News confirmando una toma de control de 2 solicitudes vía una lista de IPs permitidas vacía por defecto exponiendo 12 llamadas a herramientas MCP no autenticadas refuerza la precondición agent-credential-reachable, pero ninguna entrada de top-list OWASP / CIS que nombre Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration como categoría aterriza dentro de la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang Nginx UI MCPwn writeup ng The Hacker News na nagpapatunay ng 2-request takeover sa pamamagitan ng empty default IP allowlist na naglalantad ng 12 unauthenticated MCP tool calls ay nagpapatibay sa agent-credential-reachable precondition, ngunit walang OWASP / CIS top-list entry na nagpapangalan sa Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration bilang category na lumilitaw sa loob ng window.

bridges.text: Proofpoint's Mercor-to-Mythos connection — 4TB of credentials, biometrics, and API keys leaked through LiteLLM CI/CD becoming the entry path for a frontier-lab breach — plus Exabeam's ABA extension covering all 10 OWASP Agentic Top 10 categories and the formalized AI Insider Threat category across ChatGPT / Copilot / Gemini directly materialize the agent-in-the-loop credential-exfil precondition.

text_locales.en: Proofpoint's Mercor-to-Mythos connection — 4TB of credentials, biometrics, and API keys leaked through LiteLLM CI/CD becoming the entry path for a frontier-lab breach — plus Exabeam's ABA extension covering all 10 OWASP Agentic Top 10 categories and the formalized AI Insider Threat category across ChatGPT / Copilot / Gemini directly materialize the agent-in-the-loop credential-exfil precondition.
text_locales.ja: ProofpointのMercor-Mythos接続 ― LiteLLM CI/CDを通じて流出した4TBのクレデンシャル、バイオメトリクス、APIキーがフロンティア・ラボ侵害の侵入経路となった ― さらにOWASP Agentic Top 10の10カテゴリ全てをカバーするExabeamのABA拡張、ChatGPT / Copilot / Gemini横断で正式化されたAI Insider Threatカテゴリが、エージェント・イン・ザ・ループのクレデンシャル流出の前提条件を直接物質化する。
text_locales.es: La conexión Mercor-a-Mythos de Proofpoint — 4TB de credenciales, biometría y claves API filtrados a través del CI/CD de LiteLLM convirtiéndose en la ruta de entrada para una brecha de laboratorio de frontera — más la extensión de ABA de Exabeam cubriendo las 10 categorías del OWASP Agentic Top 10 y la categoría formalizada de AI Insider Threat en ChatGPT / Copilot / Gemini materializan directamente la precondición de exfil de credenciales agent-in-the-loop.
text_locales.fil: Ang Mercor-to-Mythos connection ng Proofpoint — 4TB ng credentials, biometrics, at API keys na nakaleak sa pamamagitan ng LiteLLM CI/CD na naging entry path para sa frontier-lab breach — kasama ang ABA extension ng Exabeam na sumasaklaw sa lahat ng 10 OWASP Agentic Top 10 categories at ang pormal na AI Insider Threat category sa ChatGPT / Copilot / Gemini ay direktang nagma-materialize sa agent-in-the-loop credential-exfil precondition.

bridges.text: The Mythos Preview day-one breach via contractor credentials + Mercor leak + naming reconstruction, alongside OAuth2 Proxy CVE-2026-40575's X-Forwarded-Uri auth bypass, both materialize the agent-in-the-loop credential-exfil shape with concrete real-world incidents reinforcing the precondition.

text_locales.en: The Mythos Preview day-one breach via contractor credentials + Mercor leak + naming reconstruction, alongside OAuth2 Proxy CVE-2026-40575's X-Forwarded-Uri auth bypass, both materialize the agent-in-the-loop credential-exfil shape with concrete real-world incidents reinforcing the precondition.
text_locales.ja: 契約者の認証情報 + Mercorのリーク + 命名再構築によるMythos Previewの初日侵害と、OAuth2 Proxy CVE-2026-40575のX-Forwarded-Uri認証バイパスは、いずれもエージェント・イン・ザ・ループの認証情報窃取の形を、前提条件を強化する具体的な実世界のインシデントで実現している。
text_locales.es: La brecha del día uno de Mythos Preview vía credenciales de contratista + filtración de Mercor + reconstrucción de nomenclatura, junto con el bypass de autenticación X-Forwarded-Uri de OAuth2 Proxy CVE-2026-40575, ambos materializan la forma de exfiltración de credenciales agent-in-the-loop con incidentes concretos del mundo real reforzando la precondición.
text_locales.fil: Ang day-one breach ng Mythos Preview sa pamamagitan ng contractor credentials + Mercor leak + naming reconstruction, kasama ang X-Forwarded-Uri auth bypass ng OAuth2 Proxy CVE-2026-40575, ay parehong nag-aaktwal sa agent-in-the-loop credential-exfil shape gamit ang konkretong real-world incidents na nagpapatibay sa precondition.

bridges.text: Vercel's confirmed supply-chain breach via Context.ai OAuth tokens — with the CEO pointing to AI-assisted attacker speed — and Antigravity's prompt-injection-to-RCE both materialize the agent-in-the-loop exfil shape, putting concrete real-world breaches behind the precondition that ties CI / agents to leaked secrets.

text_locales.en: Vercel's confirmed supply-chain breach via Context.ai OAuth tokens — with the CEO pointing to AI-assisted attacker speed — and Antigravity's prompt-injection-to-RCE both materialize the agent-in-the-loop exfil shape, putting concrete real-world breaches behind the precondition that ties CI / agents to leaked secrets.
text_locales.ja: Context.aiのOAuthトークン経由でVercelが確認したサプライチェーン侵害 — CEOがAI支援による攻撃者の速度を指摘 — と、AntigravityのプロンプトインジェクションからRCEへの転化のいずれもがagent-in-the-loop型の窃取形を実体化させ、CI / エージェントを漏洩した認証情報に結び付ける前提に具体的な現実世界の侵害事例を与えている。
text_locales.es: La brecha confirmada de cadena de suministro de Vercel via tokens OAuth de Context.ai — con el CEO senalando velocidad de atacante asistida por AI — y la RCE por inyeccion de prompt de Antigravity ambas materializan la forma de exfiltracion agente-en-el-loop, poniendo brechas reales concretas detras de la precondicion que ata CI / agentes a secretos filtrados.
text_locales.fil: Ang confirmed supply-chain breach ng Vercel sa pamamagitan ng Context.ai OAuth tokens — kung saan ang CEO ay tumuturo sa AI-assisted attacker speed — at ang prompt-injection-to-RCE ng Antigravity ay parehong nagma-materialize ng agent-in-the-loop exfil shape, naglalagay ng kongkretong real-world breaches sa likod ng precondition na nag-uugnay sa CI / agents sa leaked secrets.

actor_locales.fil: AI coding-agent vendor security team (Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot)

job_locales.en: Harden agent CLIs against indirect prompt injection so untrusted PR / issue text cannot coerce secret exfiltration in CI.
job_locales.ja: 間接プロンプトインジェクションに対してエージェントCLIを堅牢化し、信頼できないPR / IssueテキストがCI内でシークレット抜き出しを強要できないようにする。
job_locales.es: Endurecer las CLIs de agentes contra la inyección indirecta de prompts para que el texto no confiable de PR / issues no pueda forzar la exfiltración de secretos en CI.
job_locales.fil: Patatagin ang agent CLIs laban sa indirect prompt injection upang ang untrusted PR / issue text ay hindi makapwersa ng secret exfiltration sa CI.

outcome_locales.en: Released agent versions with prompt-injection guardrails, secret-redaction defaults, and documented threat model citing the CI scenario.
outcome_locales.ja: プロンプトインジェクションのガードレール、シークレット秘匿化のデフォルト、CIシナリオを引用した文書化された脅威モデルを備えたエージェントの新バージョンをリリースする。
outcome_locales.es: Versiones de agentes lanzadas con guardrails contra inyección de prompts, valores por defecto de redacción de secretos y modelo de amenaza documentado citando el escenario de CI.
outcome_locales.fil: Released agent versions na may prompt-injection guardrails, secret-redaction defaults, at documented threat model na bumabanggit sa CI scenario.

motivation_locales.en: Avoid being the named exfiltration vector in CIS / OWASP entries; protect enterprise CI deals tied to procurement security review.
motivation_locales.ja: CIS / OWASPエントリで名指しの抜き出しベクトルとなることを避け、調達セキュリティレビューに紐づくエンタープライズCI契約を保護する。
motivation_locales.es: Evitar ser el vector de exfiltración nombrado en las entradas de CIS / OWASP; proteger los acuerdos de CI empresariales vinculados a la revisión de seguridad de aprovisionamiento.
motivation_locales.fil: Iwasan na maging named exfiltration vector sa CIS / OWASP entries; protektahan ang enterprise CI deals na nakatali sa procurement security review.

detail.description: **Secret leakage through CI / agents becomes the next battleground.** GitHub Actions indirect prompt injection PoCs reproduce across Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Copilot — three vendors at once. Through Q2-Q3 2026, a new supply-chain security category, "Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration," will rise to the top of CIS / OWASP risk lists. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Through Q2-Q3 2026, a new supply-chain security category, "Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration," will rise to the top of CIS / OWASP risk lists. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **Secret leakage through CI / agents becomes the next battleground.** GitHub Actions indirect prompt injection PoCs reproduce across Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Copilot — three vendors at once. Through Q2-Q3 2026, a new supply-chain security category, "Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration," will rise to the top of CIS / OWASP risk lists. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **CI / エージェント経由のシークレット漏洩が次の主戦場となる。** GitHub Actionsを介した間接プロンプトインジェクションのPoCが、Claude Code、Gemini CLI、Copilotの3ベンダーで同時期に再現されている。2026年Q2-Q3にかけて、新たなサプライチェーンセキュリティのカテゴリ「Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration」がCIS / OWASPのリスクリストの上位に台頭する。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **La fuga de secretos a través de CI / agentes se convierte en el siguiente campo de batalla.** Los PoCs de inyección indirecta de prompts en GitHub Actions se reproducen en Claude Code, Gemini CLI y Copilot — tres proveedores a la vez. Durante el Q2-Q3 2026, una nueva categoría de seguridad de la cadena de suministro, "Exfiltración de Secretos con Agente en el Bucle", ascenderá a la cima de las listas de riesgos de CIS / OWASP. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang secret leakage sa pamamagitan ng CI / agents ay magiging susunod na battleground.** Ang GitHub Actions indirect prompt injection PoCs ay reproducible sa Claude Code, Gemini CLI, at Copilot — tatlong vendors nang sabay-sabay. Sa loob ng Q2-Q3 2026, isang bagong supply-chain security category, "Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration," ang aakyat sa tuktok ng CIS / OWASP risk lists. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.
nodes.description: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's new Managed Harness / CLI / skills, and OpenAI's Workspace Agents all converge on the same strategy: **bind the agent lifecycle, audit, and governance into a single control plane.** By Q3 2026, Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSO layers will treat agent identifiers as first-class objects alongside humans and service accounts. CASB / SSPM vendors will measure "API calls touched by AI agents" with a separate SLO / risk score from human-user baselines. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's new Managed Harness / CLI / skills, and OpenAI's Workspace Agents all converge on the same strategy: **bind the agent lifecycle, audit, and governance into a single control plane.** By Q3 2026, Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSO layers will treat agent identifiers as first-class objects alongside humans and service accounts. CASB / SSPM vendors will measure "API calls touched by AI agents" with a separate SLO / risk score from human-user baselines. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「エージェント・コントロールプレーン」がハイパースケーラー競争の新たな主戦場となる。** GoogleのGemini Enterprise Agent Platform、AWS Bedrock AgentCoreの新Managed Harness / CLI / skills、そしてOpenAIのWorkspace Agentsはすべて同じ戦略に収斂している。**エージェントのライフサイクル、監査、ガバナンスを単一のコントロールプレーンに統合する**ことだ。2026年Q3までに、Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSOレイヤーは、エージェント識別子を人間やサービスアカウントと並ぶファーストクラスのオブジェクトとして扱うようになる。CASB / SSPMベンダーは「AIエージェントが触れたAPIコール」を、人間ユーザーのベースラインとは別のSLO / リスクスコアで測定するようになる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **El "Plano de Control de Agentes" se convierte en el nuevo campo de batalla en la competencia entre hyperscalers.** Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform de Google, el nuevo Managed Harness / CLI / skills de AWS Bedrock AgentCore y Workspace Agents de OpenAI convergen todos en la misma estrategia: **integrar el ciclo de vida del agente, la auditoría y la gobernanza en un único plano de control.** Para el Q3 2026, las capas de SSO de Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace tratarán los identificadores de agente como objetos de primera clase junto con humanos y cuentas de servicio. Los proveedores de CASB / SSPM medirán las "llamadas a API tocadas por agentes de IA" con un SLO / puntuación de riesgo separado de las líneas base de usuarios humanos. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang "Agent Control Plane" ay nagiging bagong larangan ng laban sa kompetisyon ng mga hyperscaler.** Ang Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform ng Google, ang bagong Managed Harness / CLI / skills ng AWS Bedrock AgentCore, at ang Workspace Agents ng OpenAI ay lahat nag-uumpisang nagsasama-sama sa parehong estratehiya: **i-bind ang agent lifecycle, audit, at governance sa iisang control plane.** Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang mga SSO layer ng Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace ay ituturing ang mga agent identifier bilang first-class object kasabay ng mga tao at service account. Ang mga vendor ng CASB / SSPM ay susukatin ang "API calls touched by AI agents" gamit ang hiwalay na SLO / risk score mula sa baseline ng human-user. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

reasoning.because: Google Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore, and OpenAI Workspace Agents land in the same window with one control-plane shape.
reasoning.given: Enterprises need a single place to govern agent lifecycle, audit, and identity as agents proliferate across SaaS and infrastructure.
reasoning.so_that: SSO providers treat agent IDs as first-class principals and CASB / SSPM vendors track AI-agent API calls under a separate risk score.
reasoning.landing: By Q3 2026; Okta / Entra ID / Workspace agent-ID category + CASB / SSPM AI-agent metric live.
reasoning.plain_language: Three big clouds all built one place to manage AI agents this week. Soon login systems will treat agents like users with their own permissions.

because.en: Google Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore, and OpenAI Workspace Agents land in the same window with one control-plane shape.
because.ja: Google Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform、AWS Bedrock AgentCore、OpenAI Workspace Agentsが同じ時期に同じコントロールプレーンの形で着地した。
because.es: Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform de Google, AWS Bedrock AgentCore y Workspace Agents de OpenAI aterrizan en la misma ventana con una sola forma de plano de control.
because.fil: Ang Google Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore, at OpenAI Workspace Agents ay sabay-sabay na bumagsak sa parehong window na may iisang hugis ng control-plane.

given.en: Enterprises need a single place to govern agent lifecycle, audit, and identity as agents proliferate across SaaS and infrastructure.
given.ja: エージェントがSaaSとインフラ全体に拡散する中、企業はエージェントのライフサイクル、監査、アイデンティティを統治する単一の場所を必要としている。
given.es: Las empresas necesitan un único lugar para gobernar el ciclo de vida del agente, la auditoría y la identidad a medida que los agentes proliferan en SaaS e infraestructura.
given.fil: Kailangan ng mga enterprise ng iisang lugar para pamahalaan ang agent lifecycle, audit, at identity habang dumadami ang mga agent sa kabuuan ng SaaS at infrastructure.

so_that.en: SSO providers treat agent IDs as first-class principals and CASB / SSPM vendors track AI-agent API calls under a separate risk score.
so_that.ja: SSOプロバイダがエージェントIDをファーストクラスのプリンシパルとして扱い、CASB / SSPMベンダーがAIエージェントのAPIコールを別のリスクスコアで追跡するようになる。
so_that.es: Los proveedores de SSO tratan los IDs de agentes como principales de primera clase y los proveedores de CASB / SSPM rastrean las llamadas a API de agentes de IA bajo una puntuación de riesgo separada.
so_that.fil: Ituturing ng mga SSO provider ang agent IDs bilang first-class principals at susubaybayan ng mga vendor ng CASB / SSPM ang AI-agent API calls sa ilalim ng hiwalay na risk score.

landing.en: By Q3 2026; Okta / Entra ID / Workspace agent-ID category + CASB / SSPM AI-agent metric live.
landing.ja: 2026年Q3までに、Okta / Entra ID / WorkspaceのエージェントIDカテゴリ + CASB / SSPMのAIエージェント指標が稼働する。
landing.es: Para el Q3 2026; categoría de agent-ID en Okta / Entra ID / Workspace + métrica de agente de IA en CASB / SSPM activa.
landing.fil: Pagsapit ng Q3 2026; live na ang Okta / Entra ID / Workspace agent-ID category + CASB / SSPM AI-agent metric.

plain_language.en: Three big clouds all built one place to manage AI agents this week. Soon login systems will treat agents like users with their own permissions.
plain_language.ja: 今週、3大クラウドがすべてAIエージェントを管理する場所を構築した。まもなくログインシステムはエージェントを独自の権限を持つユーザーのように扱うようになる。
plain_language.es: Tres grandes nubes construyeron esta semana un lugar para gestionar agentes de IA. Pronto los sistemas de inicio de sesión tratarán a los agentes como usuarios con sus propios permisos.
plain_language.fil: Tatlong malalaking cloud ang gumawa ng iisang lugar para pamahalaan ang AI agents ngayong linggo. Hindi magtatagal, ituturing ng mga login system ang mga agent na parang gumagamit na may sariling permission.

detail.summary_short: Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore, and OpenAI Workspace Agents converge on a single agent-lifecycle control plane. By Q3 2026, Okta / Entra ID / Google Workspace are expected to treat agent IDs as first-class principals while CASB / SSPM vendors carve out a separate risk metric for AI-agent API calls.

summary_short_locales.en: Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore, and OpenAI Workspace Agents converge on a single agent-lifecycle control plane. By Q3 2026, Okta / Entra ID / Google Workspace are expected to treat agent IDs as first-class principals while CASB / SSPM vendors carve out a separate risk metric for AI-agent API calls.
summary_short_locales.ja: GoogleのGemini Enterprise Agent Platform、AWS Bedrock AgentCore、OpenAI Workspace Agentsが、単一のエージェントライフサイクル・コントロールプレーンに収斂した。2026年Q3までに、Okta / Entra ID / Google WorkspaceがエージェントIDをファーストクラスのプリンシパルとして扱い、CASB / SSPMベンダーがAIエージェントのAPIコールに対して別のリスク指標を切り出すと予想される。
summary_short_locales.es: Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform de Google, AWS Bedrock AgentCore y Workspace Agents de OpenAI convergen en un único plano de control de ciclo de vida de agentes. Para el Q3 2026, se espera que Okta / Entra ID / Google Workspace traten los IDs de agentes como principales de primera clase mientras los proveedores de CASB / SSPM destacan una métrica de riesgo separada para las llamadas a API de agentes de IA.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform ng Google, AWS Bedrock AgentCore, at OpenAI Workspace Agents ay nagsasama-sama sa iisang agent-lifecycle control plane. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, inaasahang ituturing ng Okta / Entra ID / Google Workspace ang agent IDs bilang first-class principals habang ang mga vendor ng CASB / SSPM ay maglilihis ng hiwalay na risk metric para sa AI-agent API calls.

bridges.text: Today's parallel shipments — Novita Sandbox, Bedrock AgentCore Runtime Node.js, and Oracle's SuiteCloud Agent Skills — all reinforce the structural premise that the agent-runtime layer is hardening into a single control plane category. The signal is moderate: vendors are shipping mitigation and packaging primitives, but the SSO-treats-agents-as-first-class step the prediction calls for is not yet visible in any identity provider's release notes.

text_locales.en: Today's parallel shipments — Novita Sandbox, Bedrock AgentCore Runtime Node.js, and Oracle's SuiteCloud Agent Skills — all reinforce the structural premise that the agent-runtime layer is hardening into a single control plane category. The signal is moderate: vendors are shipping mitigation and packaging primitives, but the SSO-treats-agents-as-first-class step the prediction calls for is not yet visible in any identity provider's release notes.
text_locales.ja: 本日の並行出荷 — Novita Sandbox、Bedrock AgentCore Runtime Node.js、OracleのSuiteCloud Agent Skills — はすべて、エージェントランタイムレイヤーが単一のコントロールプレーンカテゴリーへと硬化しているという構造的前提を強化する。シグナルは中程度である:ベンダーは緩和とパッケージングのプリミティブを出荷しているが、予測が求めるSSOがエージェントを第一級として扱うステップは、まだどのIDプロバイダのリリースノートにも見られない。
text_locales.es: Los lanzamientos paralelos de hoy — Novita Sandbox, Bedrock AgentCore Runtime Node.js y SuiteCloud Agent Skills de Oracle — refuerzan la premisa estructural de que la capa de runtime de agentes se está consolidando en una sola categoría de control plane. La señal es moderada: los vendors están enviando primitivas de mitigación y empaquetado, pero el paso de SSO-trata-agentes-como-primera-clase que pide la predicción aún no es visible en las release notes de ningún proveedor de identidad.
text_locales.fil: Ang magkakatabing shipment ngayon — Novita Sandbox, Bedrock AgentCore Runtime Node.js, at SuiteCloud Agent Skills ng Oracle — ay lahat nagpapatibay sa structural premise na ang agent-runtime layer ay tumitigas tungo sa isang control plane category. Katamtaman ang signal: nagpapadala ang vendors ng mitigation at packaging primitives, ngunit ang SSO-treats-agents-as-first-class na hakbang na hinihingi ng prediction ay hindi pa nakikita sa anumang release notes ng identity provider.

bridges.text: AgentCore Managed Harness + CLI + Skills on Kiro Power, Multica v0.2.18, and Apr 28's Novita Sandbox land in a single window: three independent agent-runtime tracks all converging on lifecycle, audit, and governance as a single control plane. That directly materializes the consequence the prediction projects, with Novita explicitly aiming at the marketplace-grade governance gap.

text_locales.en: AgentCore Managed Harness + CLI + Skills on Kiro Power, Multica v0.2.18, and Apr 28's Novita Sandbox land in a single window: three independent agent-runtime tracks all converging on lifecycle, audit, and governance as a single control plane. That directly materializes the consequence the prediction projects, with Novita explicitly aiming at the marketplace-grade governance gap.
text_locales.ja: Kiro Power上のAgentCore Managed Harness + CLI + Skills、Multica v0.2.18、4月28日のNovita Sandboxが単一ウィンドウに上陸: 3つの独立したエージェント・ランタイム・トラックが、ライフサイクル、監査、ガバナンスを単一のコントロールプレーンとして収束させている。これは予測が投影する結果を直接物質化させ、Novitaは特にマーケットプレイス級ガバナンス・ギャップを明示的に狙っている。
text_locales.es: AgentCore Managed Harness + CLI + Skills en Kiro Power, Multica v0.2.18, y el Novita Sandbox del 28 de abril aterrizan en una sola ventana: tres tracks independientes de agent-runtime convergiendo en lifecycle, audit, y gobernanza como un solo control plane. Eso materializa directamente la consecuencia que la prediccion proyecta, con Novita apuntando explicitamente a la brecha de gobernanza de grado-mercado.
text_locales.fil: Ang AgentCore Managed Harness + CLI + Skills sa Kiro Power, Multica v0.2.18, at ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ay lumalapag sa iisang window: tatlong independent agent-runtime tracks na lahat ay nagsasama-sama sa lifecycle, audit, at governance bilang iisang control plane. Iyon ay direktang nagma-materialize sa konsekwensyang ipino-project ng hula, kasama ang Novita na tahasang nakatuon sa marketplace-grade governance gap.

bridges.text: AgentCore CLI/Managed Harness expansion plus Claude Cowork inside Bedrock and a vendor-neutral orchestrator at Multica converge on the agent-control-plane shape the prediction names — the consequence side is materializing across hyperscalers and the open layer in the same window.

text_locales.en: AgentCore CLI/Managed Harness expansion plus Claude Cowork inside Bedrock and a vendor-neutral orchestrator at Multica converge on the agent-control-plane shape the prediction names — the consequence side is materializing across hyperscalers and the open layer in the same window.
text_locales.ja: AgentCore CLI / Managed Harness の拡大に Bedrock 内部の Claude Cowork、そして Multica のベンダー中立オーケストレータが加わることで、予測が指すエージェント コントロール プレーンの形状へと収束している — 帰結側はハイパースケーラとオープン層の両方で同じウィンドウ内に実体化しつつある。
text_locales.es: La expansión de AgentCore CLI/Managed Harness más Claude Cowork dentro de Bedrock y un orquestador vendor-neutral en Multica convergen en la forma de agent-control-plane que la predicción nombra — el lado de consecuencia se está materializando en los hyperscalers y la capa abierta en la misma ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang AgentCore CLI/Managed Harness expansion plus ang Claude Cowork sa loob ng Bedrock at vendor-neutral orchestrator sa Multica ay nagsa-converge sa agent-control-plane shape na pinangalanan ng prediction — nagma-materialize ang consequence side sa mga hyperscalers at sa open layer sa parehong window.

bridges.text: All three cloud arenas — Okta SSO, Google Cloud agentic-defence, AWS Bedrock AgentCore — converge on the agent-control-plane shape the prediction names; the consequence side is materializing across hyperscalers in the same window.

text_locales.en: All three cloud arenas — Okta SSO, Google Cloud agentic-defence, AWS Bedrock AgentCore — converge on the agent-control-plane shape the prediction names; the consequence side is materializing across hyperscalers in the same window.
text_locales.ja: 3 つのクラウドアリーナ — Okta SSO、Google Cloud のエージェンティック ディフェンス、AWS Bedrock AgentCore — がいずれも予測が名指すエージェント コントロール プレーンの形状に収斂する; 帰結側が同じウィンドウ内でハイパースケーラをまたいで具現化している。
text_locales.es: Las tres arenas de la nube — Okta SSO, defensa agéntica de Google Cloud, AWS Bedrock AgentCore — convergen en la forma de plano-de-control-de-agente que nombra la predicción; el lado de consecuencia se está materializando entre hyperscalers en la misma ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang lahat ng tatlong cloud arenas — Okta SSO, Google Cloud agentic-defence, AWS Bedrock AgentCore — ay nag-co-converge sa agent-control-plane shape na pinangalanan ng prediction; ang consequence side ay nagma-materialize sa kabuuan ng hyperscalers sa parehong window.

bridges.text: Okta's Showcase 2026 blueprint pairing Agent Gateway as central MCP control plane with first-class agent identities and universal logout and AWS Bedrock AgentCore's Managed Harness with CDK-native CLI plus Coding Skills staging across Kiro Power, Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor converge on the lifecycle-and-governance control plane the prediction projects.

text_locales.en: Okta's Showcase 2026 blueprint pairing Agent Gateway as central MCP control plane with first-class agent identities and universal logout and AWS Bedrock AgentCore's Managed Harness with CDK-native CLI plus Coding Skills staging across Kiro Power, Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor converge on the lifecycle-and-governance control plane the prediction projects.
text_locales.ja: OktaのShowcase 2026ブループリント(Agent Gatewayを中央MCPコントロールプレーンとして第一級エージェント・アイデンティティと統一ログアウトとペアにする)とAWS Bedrock AgentCoreのManaged Harness(CDKネイティブCLIとKiro Power、Claude Code、Codex、Cursorにわたる Coding Skillsステージング付き)が、予測が射影するライフサイクル・ガバナンス・コントロールプレーンに収束する。
text_locales.es: El blueprint Showcase 2026 de Okta emparejando Agent Gateway como plano de control central MCP con identidades de agente de primera clase y logout universal y el Managed Harness de AWS Bedrock AgentCore con CLI nativa CDK más Coding Skills preparándose a través de Kiro Power, Claude Code, Codex y Cursor convergen en el plano de control de ciclo-de-vida-y-gobernanza que la predicción proyecta.
text_locales.fil: Ang Okta's Showcase 2026 blueprint na nagpapares sa Agent Gateway bilang central MCP control plane sa first-class agent identities at universal logout at ang AWS Bedrock AgentCore's Managed Harness na may CDK-native CLI plus Coding Skills na nag-stage sa Kiro Power, Claude Code, Codex, at Cursor ay nag-converge sa lifecycle-and-governance control plane na pinagpapalagay ng prediction.

bridges.text: AWS Bedrock AgentCore Browser's OS-level interaction plus the Managed Harness with CDK-native CLI and staged Coding Skills, HyperFRAME's framing of Okta's first-class AI-agent identity, and Salesforce's Agentforce ARR $800M / 29,000 deals (+50% QoQ) earnings print converge on the same lifecycle-and-governance control plane the prediction projects.

text_locales.en: AWS Bedrock AgentCore Browser's OS-level interaction plus the Managed Harness with CDK-native CLI and staged Coding Skills, HyperFRAME's framing of Okta's first-class AI-agent identity, and Salesforce's Agentforce ARR $800M / 29,000 deals (+50% QoQ) earnings print converge on the same lifecycle-and-governance control plane the prediction projects.
text_locales.ja: AWS Bedrock AgentCore BrowserのOSレベル・インタラクションとManaged Harness、CDKネイティブCLIとステージングされたCoding Skills、HyperFRAMEのOktaのファースト・クラスAIエージェント・アイデンティティの枠組み、SalesforceのAgentforce ARR $800M / 29,000件取引(+50% QoQ)決算プリントが、予測が想定する同じライフサイクル+ガバナンス・コントロールプレーンに収束する。
text_locales.es: La interacción a nivel de SO de AWS Bedrock AgentCore Browser más el Managed Harness con CDK-native CLI y Coding Skills preparados, el encuadre de HyperFRAME de la identidad de agente de IA de primera clase de Okta, y el print de ganancias Agentforce ARR $800M / 29,000 acuerdos (+50% QoQ) de Salesforce convergen en el mismo plano de control de ciclo-de-vida-y-gobernanza que la predicción proyecta.
text_locales.fil: Ang OS-level interaction ng AWS Bedrock AgentCore Browser kasama ang Managed Harness na may CDK-native CLI at staged Coding Skills, ang framing ng HyperFRAME sa first-class AI-agent identity ng Okta, at ang Agentforce ARR $800M / 29,000 deals (+50% QoQ) earnings print ng Salesforce ay nagsasama-sama sa parehong lifecycle-and-governance control plane na inaasahan ng prediction.

bridges.text: AWS Bedrock AgentCore's 3-API-call runtime and AgentCore CLI, Google Cloud Next '26's Agentic Data Cloud + Defense + Workspace Skills layered on Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, Okta's GA first-class AI-agent identity, and Keycard's task-scoped revocable tokens converge on the same lifecycle-and-governance control plane the prediction projects, with VentureBeat's agent-telemetry-gap framing supplying the underlying motivation.

text_locales.en: AWS Bedrock AgentCore's 3-API-call runtime and AgentCore CLI, Google Cloud Next '26's Agentic Data Cloud + Defense + Workspace Skills layered on Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, Okta's GA first-class AI-agent identity, and Keycard's task-scoped revocable tokens converge on the same lifecycle-and-governance control plane the prediction projects, with VentureBeat's agent-telemetry-gap framing supplying the underlying motivation.
text_locales.ja: AWS Bedrock AgentCoreの3 APIコール・ランタイムとAgentCore CLI、Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform上にレイヤ化されたGoogle Cloud Next '26のAgentic Data Cloud + Defense + Workspace Skills、OktaのGAファースト・クラスAIエージェント・アイデンティティ、Keycardのタスク・スコープの取消可能トークンが、予測が想定する同じライフサイクル+ガバナンス・コントロールプレーンに収束し、VentureBeatのエージェント・テレメトリ・ギャップの枠組みが根底にある動機を提供している。
text_locales.es: El runtime de 3 llamadas a API y AgentCore CLI de AWS Bedrock AgentCore, el Agentic Data Cloud + Defense + Workspace Skills de Google Cloud Next '26 superpuesto en la Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, la identidad de primera clase de agente de IA en GA de Okta, y los tokens revocables con alcance de tarea de Keycard convergen en el mismo plano de control de ciclo-de-vida-y-gobernanza que la predicción proyecta, con el encuadre de brecha de telemetría de agentes de VentureBeat suministrando la motivación subyacente.
text_locales.fil: Ang 3-API-call runtime at AgentCore CLI ng AWS Bedrock AgentCore, ang Agentic Data Cloud + Defense + Workspace Skills ng Google Cloud Next '26 na inilatag sa Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, ang GA first-class AI-agent identity ng Okta, at ang task-scoped revocable tokens ng Keycard ay nagsasama-sama sa parehong lifecycle-and-governance control plane na ipinroprojeto ng prediksyon, na ang agent-telemetry-gap framing ng VentureBeat ay nagbibigay ng underlying motivation.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's new Managed Harness / CLI / skills, and OpenAI's Workspace Agents all converge on the same strategy: **bind the agent lifecycle, audit, and governance into a single control plane.** By Q3 2026, Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSO layers will treat agent identifiers as first-class objects alongside humans and service accounts. CASB / SSPM vendors will measure "API calls touched by AI agents" with a separate SLO / risk score from human-user baselines. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's new Managed Harness / CLI / skills, and OpenAI's Workspace Agents all converge on the same strategy: **bind the agent lifecycle, audit, and governance into a single control plane.** By Q3 2026, Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSO layers will treat agent identifiers as first-class objects alongside humans and service accounts. CASB / SSPM vendors will measure "API calls touched by AI agents" with a separate SLO / risk score from human-user baselines. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's new Managed Harness / CLI / skills, and OpenAI's Workspace Agents all converge on the same strategy: **bind the agent lifecycle, audit, and governance into a single control plane.** By Q3 2026, Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSO layers will treat agent identifiers as first-class objects alongside humans and service accounts. CASB / SSPM vendors will measure "API calls touched by AI agents" with a separate SLO / risk score from human-user baselines. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「エージェント・コントロールプレーン」がハイパースケーラー競争の新たな主戦場となる。** GoogleのGemini Enterprise Agent Platform、AWS Bedrock AgentCoreの新Managed Harness / CLI / skills、そしてOpenAIのWorkspace Agentsはすべて同じ戦略に収斂している。**エージェントのライフサイクル、監査、ガバナンスを単一のコントロールプレーンに統合する**ことだ。2026年Q3までに、Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSOレイヤーは、エージェント識別子を人間やサービスアカウントと並ぶファーストクラスのオブジェクトとして扱うようになる。CASB / SSPMベンダーは「AIエージェントが触れたAPIコール」を、人間ユーザーのベースラインとは別のSLO / リスクスコアで測定するようになる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **El "Plano de Control de Agentes" se convierte en el nuevo campo de batalla en la competencia entre hyperscalers.** Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform de Google, el nuevo Managed Harness / CLI / skills de AWS Bedrock AgentCore y Workspace Agents de OpenAI convergen todos en la misma estrategia: **integrar el ciclo de vida del agente, la auditoría y la gobernanza en un único plano de control.** Para el Q3 2026, las capas de SSO de Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace tratarán los identificadores de agente como objetos de primera clase junto con humanos y cuentas de servicio. Los proveedores de CASB / SSPM medirán las "llamadas a API tocadas por agentes de IA" con un SLO / puntuación de riesgo separado de las líneas base de usuarios humanos. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang "Agent Control Plane" ay nagiging bagong larangan ng laban sa kompetisyon ng mga hyperscaler.** Ang Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform ng Google, ang bagong Managed Harness / CLI / skills ng AWS Bedrock AgentCore, at ang Workspace Agents ng OpenAI ay lahat nag-uumpisang nagsasama-sama sa parehong estratehiya: **i-bind ang agent lifecycle, audit, at governance sa iisang control plane.** Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang mga SSO layer ng Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace ay ituturing ang mga agent identifier bilang first-class object kasabay ng mga tao at service account. Ang mga vendor ng CASB / SSPM ay susukatin ang "API calls touched by AI agents" gamit ang hiwalay na SLO / risk score mula sa baseline ng human-user. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.
nodes.short_label: The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.
nodes.title: The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.
nodes.description: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
