description.en: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「コンシューマGPUコーディング・エージェント」がQ3 2026までに開発者ワークロードの30%以上でクラウド専用コーディングAPIを置き換える。** 4月22日のQwen3.6-27B(密、SWE-bench Verifiedで397B-A17Bに勝利、**RTX 3090上Q4_K_M ~16.8 GBで40 tok/s**) + 4月23日のOllama MLXプレビュー(M5 Max上でQwen3.5-35B-A3Bが1.57x プリフィル / 1.93x デコード) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%オフAPI(**実質的にClaude Opus 4.7より~28x安い**)が、プロプライエタリ・フロンティアAPIのSaaSモデルに対する**3角圧搾**を構成する。Q3 2026までに、**企業の開発ツールはハイブリッド・ハーネスをデフォルトとする** ― 「コーディング、リファクタ、リント、テスト」にはローカルのQwen 3.6クラスを、「長期計画 / 多ツール推論」にはリモート・フロンティアAPIのみ ― そしてビッグ3 IDE(Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power)はすべて**ローカル・ファースト・トグル**をデフォルトで出荷する。「クラウド専用コーディング・エージェント」は2024年代の遺物となる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **El "agente de codificación con GPU de consumo" desplaza a la API de codificación solo en la nube para ≥30% de las cargas de desarrollo para Q3 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B del 22 de abril (denso, supera a 397B-A17B en SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s en RTX 3090 a Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + el preview de Ollama MLX del 23 de abril (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode en M5 Max para Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro con API 75% de descuento (**efectivamente ~28x más barato que Claude Opus 4.7**) componen un **apretón de 3 esquinas** sobre el modelo SaaS de API de frontera propietaria. Para Q3 2026, **las herramientas de desarrollo empresariales adoptan por defecto un harness híbrido** — Qwen 3.6-class local para "codificación, refactor, lint, test" + API de frontera remota solo para "planificación de largo horizonte / razonamiento multi-herramienta" — y todos los IDE Big-3 (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) lanzan un **conmutador local-first** por defecto. "Agente de codificación solo en la nube" se convierte en un artefacto de la era de 2024. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang "consumer-GPU coding agent" ay magpapalit sa cloud-only coding API para sa ≥30% ng dev workloads pagsapit ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 22 Qwen3.6-27B (dense, lumalampas sa 397B-A17B sa SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s sa RTX 3090 sa Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode sa M5 Max para sa Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x mas mura kaysa Claude Opus 4.7**) ay bumubuo ng **3-corner squeeze** sa proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang **enterprise dev tools ay default na sa hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class para sa "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API lamang para sa "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — at lahat ng Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ay magpapadala ng **local-first toggle** by default. Ang "Cloud-only coding agent" ay nagiging 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

summary.en: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.ja: **「コンシューマGPUコーディング・エージェント」がQ3 2026までに開発者ワークロードの30%以上でクラウド専用コーディングAPIを置き換える。** 4月22日のQwen3.6-27B(密、SWE-bench Verifiedで397B-A17Bに勝利、**RTX 3090上Q4_K_M ~16.8 GBで40 tok/s**) + 4月23日のOllama MLXプレビュー(M5 Max上でQwen3.5-35B-A3Bが1.57x プリフィル / 1.93x デコード) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%オフAPI(**実質的にClaude Opus 4.7より~28x安い**)が、プロプライエタリ・フロンティアAPIのSaaSモデルに対する**3角圧搾**を構成する。Q3 2026までに、**企業の開発ツールはハイブリッド・ハーネスをデフォルトとする** ― 「コーディング、リファクタ、リント、テスト」にはローカルのQwen 3.6クラスを、「長期計画 / 多ツール推論」にはリモート・フロンティアAPIのみ ― そしてビッグ3 IDE(Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power)はすべて**ローカル・ファースト・トグル**をデフォルトで出荷する。「クラウド専用コーディング・エージェント」は2024年代の遺物となる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.es: **El "agente de codificación con GPU de consumo" desplaza a la API de codificación solo en la nube para ≥30% de las cargas de desarrollo para Q3 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B del 22 de abril (denso, supera a 397B-A17B en SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s en RTX 3090 a Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + el preview de Ollama MLX del 23 de abril (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode en M5 Max para Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro con API 75% de descuento (**efectivamente ~28x más barato que Claude Opus 4.7**) componen un **apretón de 3 esquinas** sobre el modelo SaaS de API de frontera propietaria. Para Q3 2026, **las herramientas de desarrollo empresariales adoptan por defecto un harness híbrido** — Qwen 3.6-class local para "codificación, refactor, lint, test" + API de frontera remota solo para "planificación de largo horizonte / razonamiento multi-herramienta" — y todos los IDE Big-3 (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) lanzan un **conmutador local-first** por defecto. "Agente de codificación solo en la nube" se convierte en un artefacto de la era de 2024. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang **enterprise dev tools ay default na sa hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class para sa "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API lamang para sa "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — at lahat ng Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ay magpapadala ng **local-first toggle** by default. detail.summary_short: Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B beating 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified at 40 tok/s on RTX 3090, Apr 23's Ollama MLX preview hitting 1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max, and DeepSeek V4-Pro at ~28x cheaper than Opus 4.7 squeeze the cloud-only coding API. By Q3 2026, enterprise dev tools are expected to default to a hybrid harness and Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power are expected to ship local-first toggles.

summary_short_locales.en: Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B beating 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified at 40 tok/s on RTX 3090, Apr 23's Ollama MLX preview hitting 1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max, and DeepSeek V4-Pro at ~28x cheaper than Opus 4.7 squeeze the cloud-only coding API. By Q3 2026, enterprise dev tools are expected to default to a hybrid harness and Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power are expected to ship local-first toggles.
summary_short_locales.ja: 4月22日のQwen3.6-27BがRTX 3090上40 tok/sでSWE-bench Verifiedの397B-A17Bを上回り、4月23日のOllama MLXプレビューがM5 Max上で1.57x プリフィル / 1.93x デコードに達し、DeepSeek V4-ProがOpus 4.7より~28x安いことが、クラウド専用コーディングAPIを圧搾する。Q3 2026までに、企業の開発ツールはハイブリッド・ハーネスをデフォルトとし、Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Powerがローカル・ファースト・トグルを出荷することが予想される。
summary_short_locales.es: Qwen3.6-27B del 22 de abril superando a 397B-A17B en SWE-bench Verified a 40 tok/s en RTX 3090, el preview de Ollama MLX del 23 de abril alcanzando 1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode en M5 Max, y DeepSeek V4-Pro a ~28x más barato que Opus 4.7 aprietan a la API de codificación solo en la nube. Para Q3 2026, se espera que las herramientas de desarrollo empresariales adopten por defecto un harness híbrido y que Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power lancen conmutadores local-first.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Apr 22 Qwen3.6-27B na lumalampas sa 397B-A17B sa SWE-bench Verified sa 40 tok/s sa RTX 3090, ang Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview na umaabot sa 1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode sa M5 Max, at ang DeepSeek V4-Pro sa ~28x mas mura kaysa Opus 4.7 ay sumisikip sa cloud-only coding API. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, inaasahan na ang enterprise dev tools ay magde-default sa hybrid harness at inaasahang ang Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power ay magpapadala ng local-first toggles.

bridges.text: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite at $0.25 per million tokens stacks with DeepSeek V4 Pro and Qwen 3.6 to keep the three-corner cost squeeze on cloud-only coding APIs alive into May. Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference parity and Bonsai-8B at 1.15 GB keep the on-device side of the hybrid harness moving in step with the price compression.

text_locales.en: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite at $0.25 per million tokens stacks with DeepSeek V4 Pro and Qwen 3.6 to keep the three-corner cost squeeze on cloud-only coding APIs alive into May. Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference parity and Bonsai-8B at 1.15 GB keep the on-device side of the hybrid harness moving in step with the price compression.
text_locales.ja: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Liteの$0.25/百万トークンが、DeepSeek V4 ProとQwen 3.6と積層して、5月までクラウド専用コーディングAPIへの三角コスト圧迫を維持する。Unsloth 2026.4.8の推論パリティとBonsai-8Bの1.15 GBが、価格圧縮と歩調を合わせてハイブリッドハーネスのオンデバイス側を動かし続ける。
text_locales.es: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite a $0.25 por millón de tokens se apila con DeepSeek V4 Pro y Qwen 3.6 para mantener vivo el apretón de costos de tres esquinas sobre las APIs de coding solo-nube hasta mayo. La paridad de inferencia de Unsloth 2026.4.8 y Bonsai-8B a 1.15 GB mantienen el lado on-device del harness híbrido moviéndose en sincronía con la compresión de precios.
text_locales.fil: Ang Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite sa $0.25 kada milyong tokens ay pinapatong sa DeepSeek V4 Pro at Qwen 3.6 upang panatilihin ang three-corner cost squeeze sa cloud-only coding APIs hanggang Mayo. Ang Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference parity at Bonsai-8B sa 1.15 GB ay nagpapanatili sa on-device side ng hybrid harness na kasabay ng price compression.

bridges.text: Foundry Local's Windows-native runtime, Unsloth's 20-30% inference speedup, and the Chinese open-weight stack together keep the consumer-GPU coding ceiling rising fast enough to ratify the predicted hybrid-harness shift inside enterprise IDEs.

text_locales.en: Foundry Local's Windows-native runtime, Unsloth's 20-30% inference speedup, and the Chinese open-weight stack together keep the consumer-GPU coding ceiling rising fast enough to ratify the predicted hybrid-harness shift inside enterprise IDEs.
text_locales.ja: Foundry LocalのWindowsネイティブランタイム、Unslothの20-30%推論高速化、中国のオープンウェイトスタックが、エンタープライズIDE内で予測されたハイブリッドハーネスシフトを批准するのに十分な速度でコンシューマーGPUコーディング天井を上げ続けている。
text_locales.es: El runtime nativo de Windows de Foundry Local, la aceleración de inferencia 20-30% de Unsloth, y la pila open-weight china juntos mantienen el techo de codificación de GPU de consumidor subiendo lo bastante rápido para ratificar el cambio predicho de harness híbrido dentro de los IDE empresariales.
text_locales.fil: Ang Windows-native runtime ng Foundry Local, ang 20-30% inference speedup ng Unsloth, at ang Chinese open-weight stack ay magkakasamang nagpapanatili ng pataas na consumer-GPU coding ceiling nang sapat na bilis upang i-ratify ang hinulang hybrid-harness shift sa loob ng enterprise IDEs.

bridges.text: Bonsai-8B at iPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090 throughput plus Foundry Local's WinML execution-provider integration sustains the consumer-GPU-coding-agent thesis on the local side, while Codex CLI 0.128.0's model-provider-owned discovery pulls in the opposite direction by binding tooling more tightly to cloud accounts. Mixed signal — the local stack is densifying but the cloud stack is also defending.

text_locales.en: Bonsai-8B at iPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090 throughput plus Foundry Local's WinML execution-provider integration sustains the consumer-GPU-coding-agent thesis on the local side, while Codex CLI 0.128.0's model-provider-owned discovery pulls in the opposite direction by binding tooling more tightly to cloud accounts. Mixed signal — the local stack is densifying but the cloud stack is also defending.
text_locales.ja: Bonsai-8BのiPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090スループットに加え、Foundry LocalのWinML実行プロバイダー統合は、ローカル側でコンシューマーGPUコーディングエージェントテーゼを支えるが、Codex CLI 0.128.0のモデルプロバイダー所有のディスカバリーは、ツールをクラウドアカウントにより緊密に結合することで反対方向に引っ張る。混合シグナル ― ローカルスタックは高密度化しているが、クラウドスタックも防衛している。
text_locales.es: Bonsai-8B con throughput en iPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090 más la integración del execution-provider WinML de Foundry Local sostiene la tesis de consumer-GPU-coding-agent en el lado local, mientras que el discovery model-provider-owned de Codex CLI 0.128.0 tira en dirección opuesta atando el tooling más fuertemente a las cuentas cloud. Señal mixta — el stack local se está densificando pero el stack cloud también se está defendiendo.
text_locales.fil: Ang Bonsai-8B sa iPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090 throughput plus ang WinML execution-provider integration ng Foundry Local ay sumusuporta sa consumer-GPU-coding-agent thesis sa local side, habang ang model-provider-owned discovery ng Codex CLI 0.128.0 ay humahatak sa kabilang direksyon sa pamamagitan ng pagbubuklod ng tooling nang mas mahigpit sa cloud accounts. Mixed signal — ang local stack ay tumitindi ngunit ang cloud stack ay nagde-defend din.

bridges.text: Bonsai-8B 1-bit at iPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090 throughput plus Foundry Local's ~20MB native library on WinML execution providers and vLLM v0.19.0 land the consumer-GPU coding-agent stack densely enough to support the 30%-displacement framing the prediction calls for. The cost-per-token squeeze is real and Windows-default integration is now in reach.

text_locales.en: Bonsai-8B 1-bit at iPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090 throughput plus Foundry Local's ~20MB native library on WinML execution providers and vLLM v0.19.0 land the consumer-GPU coding-agent stack densely enough to support the 30%-displacement framing the prediction calls for. The cost-per-token squeeze is real and Windows-default integration is now in reach.
text_locales.ja: iPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090スループットでのBonsai-8B 1ビットに加え、WinML実行プロバイダ上のFoundry Localの約20MBネイティブライブラリとvLLM v0.19.0は、予測が求める30%置換枠組みを支えるのに十分密に消費者向けGPUコーディングエージェントスタックを着地させる。トークンあたりコストの圧縮は本物であり、Windowsデフォルト統合は今や手の届く範囲にある。
text_locales.es: Bonsai-8B 1-bit a throughput de iPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090 más la librería nativa de ~20MB de Foundry Local sobre execution providers de WinML y vLLM v0.19.0 aterrizan el stack de coding-agent en GPU-de-consumidor lo suficientemente densamente como para soportar el encuadre de 30%-de-desplazamiento que pide la predicción. La compresión de costo-por-token es real y la integración por defecto en Windows está ahora al alcance.
text_locales.fil: Ang Bonsai-8B 1-bit sa iPhone / M4 Pro / RTX 4090 throughput kasama ang ~20MB native library ng Foundry Local sa WinML execution providers at ang vLLM v0.19.0 ay naglalapag ng consumer-GPU coding-agent stack na sapat ang lapot upang suportahan ang 30%-displacement framing na hinihingi ng prediction. Tunay ang cost-per-token squeeze at ang Windows-default integration ay malapit na.

bridges.text: Bonsai-8B's 1.15 GB single-file deployment at 368 tok/s on RTX 4090, Unsloth's Gemma-4-E2B 8 GB VRAM training path, and Multica v0.2.18's vendor-neutral orchestrator deepen the on-device coding-agent stack the prediction stitches together. The 3-corner squeeze on cloud-only coding APIs continues to materialize on consumer hardware.

text_locales.en: Bonsai-8B's 1.15 GB single-file deployment at 368 tok/s on RTX 4090, Unsloth's Gemma-4-E2B 8 GB VRAM training path, and Multica v0.2.18's vendor-neutral orchestrator deepen the on-device coding-agent stack the prediction stitches together. The 3-corner squeeze on cloud-only coding APIs continues to materialize on consumer hardware.
text_locales.ja: Bonsai-8BのRTX 4090上1.15 GBシングルファイル・デプロイメント(368 tok/s)、UnslothのGemma-4-E2B 8 GB VRAMトレーニング・パス、Multica v0.2.18のベンダー中立オーケストレーターが、予測が縫い合わせるオンデバイス・コーディング・エージェント・スタックを深化させる。クラウド限定コーディングAPIに対する3コーナー・スクイーズが、コンシューマー・ハードウェア上で物質化し続けている。
text_locales.es: El despliegue de archivo-unico de 1.15 GB de Bonsai-8B a 368 tok/s en RTX 4090, el path de entrenamiento Gemma-4-E2B 8 GB VRAM de Unsloth, y el orchestrator vendor-neutral de Multica v0.2.18 profundizan el stack de coding-agent on-device que la prediccion une. La presion de 3-esquinas sobre las APIs de codificacion solo-nube continua materializandose en hardware consumer.
text_locales.fil: Ang 1.15 GB single-file deployment ng Bonsai-8B sa 368 tok/s sa RTX 4090, ang Gemma-4-E2B 8 GB VRAM training path ng Unsloth, at ang vendor-neutral orchestrator ng Multica v0.2.18 ay nagpapalalim sa on-device coding-agent stack na pinagsasama-sama ng hula. Ang 3-corner squeeze sa cloud-only coding APIs ay patuloy na nag-mamaterialize sa consumer hardware.

bridges.text: Bonsai-8B's on-device throughput, Unsloth's consumer-GPU fine-tuning maturation, and Multica's vendor-neutral orchestration all reinforce the structural conditions the displacement thesis depends on, with the local stack hardening in the same window the prediction expected.

text_locales.en: Bonsai-8B's on-device throughput, Unsloth's consumer-GPU fine-tuning maturation, and Multica's vendor-neutral orchestration all reinforce the structural conditions the displacement thesis depends on, with the local stack hardening in the same window the prediction expected.
text_locales.ja: Bonsai-8B のオンデバイス スループット、Unsloth のコンシューマ GPU ファインチューニング成熟、Multica のベンダー中立オーケストレーションはいずれも、置換テーゼが依拠する構造的条件を補強する — ローカル スタックは予測が見込んだ同じウィンドウで硬化している。
text_locales.es: El throughput on-device de Bonsai-8B, la maduración de fine-tuning consumer-GPU de Unsloth, y la orquestación vendor-neutral de Multica refuerzan las condiciones estructurales en las que depende la tesis de desplazamiento, con el local stack endureciéndose en la misma ventana que esperaba la predicción.
text_locales.fil: Ang on-device throughput ng Bonsai-8B, ang consumer-GPU fine-tuning maturation ng Unsloth, at ang vendor-neutral orchestration ng Multica ay lahat nagpapatatag sa structural conditions na inaasahan ng displacement thesis, kasama ang local stack na tumitibay sa parehong window na inaasahan ng prediction.

bridges.text: Practitioner momentum (Willison on V4 + SwiftUI), Bonsai's on-device performance, and Foundry Local's developer-path messaging all reinforce the structural conditions the displacement thesis depends on through Apr 25-27.

text_locales.en: Practitioner momentum (Willison on V4 + SwiftUI), Bonsai's on-device performance, and Foundry Local's developer-path messaging all reinforce the structural conditions the displacement thesis depends on through Apr 25-27.
text_locales.ja: 実務者のモメンタム (Willison の V4 + SwiftUI)、Bonsai のオンデバイス性能、そして Foundry Local の開発者パス メッセージングは、いずれも 4/25-27 を通じて置き換え仮説が依存する構造的な条件を補強している。
text_locales.es: El impulso de los profesionales (Willison sobre V4 + SwiftUI), el rendimiento on-device de Bonsai, y el mensaje de camino-de-desarrollador de Foundry Local refuerzan todos las condiciones estructurales de las que depende la tesis del desplazamiento del 25 al 27 de abril.
text_locales.fil: Ang practitioner momentum (Willison sa V4 + SwiftUI), ang on-device performance ng Bonsai, at ang developer-path messaging ng Foundry Local ay lahat nagpapatibay sa structural conditions na inaasa ng displacement thesis sa kabuuan ng Apr 25-27.

outcome_locales.en: GA IDE release shipping a local-first toggle as default with documented routing rules sending coding / refactor / lint / test to Qwen 3.6-class local and long-horizon planning to remote frontier API

motivation_locales.en: whichever IDE ships local-first as default first captures the dev-workload share shift; cloud-only stays the 2024-era artifact only if a credible toggle exists for everyone else

motivation_locales.fil: alinmang IDE ang unang magpapadala ng local-first bilang default ay kumukuha sa dev-workload share shift; ang cloud-only ay nananatiling 2024-era artifact lamang kung mayroong credible toggle para sa lahat

needs.actor: consumer-GPU coding-model release lead at Alibaba Qwen, DeepSeek, and Apple-Silicon ecosystem teams
needs.job: ship Qwen 3.6-class flagship coding releases with documented consumer-GPU and Apple-Silicon throughput plus lifecycle governance through Q3 2026
needs.outcome: GA flagship coding releases with audited SWE-bench Verified scores, throughput at Q4_K_M / NVFP4 on RTX 3090 and M5 Max, and license, support, and update commitments
needs.motivation: the proprietary-frontier-API SaaS model breaks only when local quality, throughput, and price clear the bar in one window; whichever release lands first holds the consumer-GPU coding baseline

actor_locales.en: consumer-GPU coding-model release lead at Alibaba Qwen, DeepSeek, and Apple-Silicon ecosystem teams
actor_locales.ja: Alibaba Qwen、DeepSeek、Apple Siliconエコシステム・チームのコンシューマGPUコーディング・モデル・リリース・リード

actor_locales.fil: consumer-GPU coding-model release lead sa Alibaba Qwen, DeepSeek, at Apple-Silicon ecosystem teams

job_locales.en: ship Qwen 3.6-class flagship coding releases with documented consumer-GPU and Apple-Silicon throughput plus lifecycle governance through Q3 2026
job_locales.ja: Q3 2026までにQwen 3.6クラスのフラグシップ・コーディング・リリースを文書化されたコンシューマGPUとApple Siliconスループットおよびライフサイクル・ガバナンスと共に出荷する
job_locales.es: lanzar releases flagship de codificación clase Qwen 3.6 con throughput documentado en GPU de consumo y Apple Silicon más gobernanza de ciclo de vida hasta Q3 2026
job_locales.fil: magpadala ng Qwen 3.6-class flagship coding releases na may documented consumer-GPU at Apple-Silicon throughput plus lifecycle governance hanggang Q3 2026

outcome_locales.en: GA flagship coding releases with audited SWE-bench Verified scores, throughput at Q4_K_M / NVFP4 on RTX 3090 and M5 Max, and license, support, and update commitments
outcome_locales.ja: 監査済みSWE-bench Verifiedスコア、RTX 3090とM5 Max上のQ4_K_M / NVFP4でのスループット、ライセンス、サポート、更新コミットメントを伴うフラグシップ・コーディング・リリースのGA
outcome_locales.es: releases flagship de codificación GA con scores SWE-bench Verified auditados, throughput a Q4_K_M / NVFP4 en RTX 3090 y M5 Max, y compromisos de licencia, soporte y actualización
outcome_locales.fil: GA flagship coding releases na may audited SWE-bench Verified scores, throughput sa Q4_K_M / NVFP4 sa RTX 3090 at M5 Max, at license, support, at update commitments

motivation_locales.en: the proprietary-frontier-API SaaS model breaks only when local quality, throughput, and price clear the bar in one window; whichever release lands first holds the consumer-GPU coding baseline
motivation_locales.ja: プロプライエタリ・フロンティアAPIのSaaSモデルは、ローカル品質、スループット、価格が1つのウィンドウ内でバーをクリアした時にのみ崩れる;最初に着地したリリースがコンシューマGPUコーディング・ベースラインを保持する
motivation_locales.es: el modelo SaaS de API de frontera propietaria se rompe solo cuando la calidad, throughput y precio locales superan el listón en una sola ventana; el release que aterrice primero retiene la línea base de codificación con GPU de consumo
motivation_locales.fil: ang proprietary-frontier-API SaaS model ay bumabasag lamang kapag ang local quality, throughput, at presyo ay nakapasa sa bar sa isang window; alinmang release ang unang lumalapag ay humahawak sa consumer-GPU coding baseline

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「コンシューマGPUコーディング・エージェント」がQ3 2026までに開発者ワークロードの30%以上でクラウド専用コーディングAPIを置き換える。** 4月22日のQwen3.6-27B(密、SWE-bench Verifiedで397B-A17Bに勝利、**RTX 3090上Q4_K_M ~16.8 GBで40 tok/s**) + 4月23日のOllama MLXプレビュー(M5 Max上でQwen3.5-35B-A3Bが1.57x プリフィル / 1.93x デコード) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%オフAPI(**実質的にClaude Opus 4.7より~28x安い**)が、プロプライエタリ・フロンティアAPIのSaaSモデルに対する**3角圧搾**を構成する。Q3 2026までに、**企業の開発ツールはハイブリッド・ハーネスをデフォルトとする** ― 「コーディング、リファクタ、リント、テスト」にはローカルのQwen 3.6クラスを、「長期計画 / 多ツール推論」にはリモート・フロンティアAPIのみ ― そしてビッグ3 IDE(Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power)はすべて**ローカル・ファースト・トグル**をデフォルトで出荷する。「クラウド専用コーディング・エージェント」は2024年代の遺物となる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **El "agente de codificación con GPU de consumo" desplaza a la API de codificación solo en la nube para ≥30% de las cargas de desarrollo para Q3 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B del 22 de abril (denso, supera a 397B-A17B en SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s en RTX 3090 a Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + el preview de Ollama MLX del 23 de abril (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode en M5 Max para Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro con API 75% de descuento (**efectivamente ~28x más barato que Claude Opus 4.7**) componen un **apretón de 3 esquinas** sobre el modelo SaaS de API de frontera propietaria. Para Q3 2026, **las herramientas de desarrollo empresariales adoptan por defecto un harness híbrido** — Qwen 3.6-class local para "codificación, refactor, lint, test" + API de frontera remota solo para "planificación de largo horizonte / razonamiento multi-herramienta" — y todos los IDE Big-3 (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) lanzan un **conmutador local-first** por defecto. "Agente de codificación solo en la nube" se convierte en un artefacto de la era de 2024. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang "consumer-GPU coding agent" ay magpapalit sa cloud-only coding API para sa ≥30% ng dev workloads pagsapit ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 22 Qwen3.6-27B (dense, lumalampas sa 397B-A17B sa SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s sa RTX 3090 sa Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode sa M5 Max para sa Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x mas mura kaysa Claude Opus 4.7**) ay bumubuo ng **3-corner squeeze** sa proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang **enterprise dev tools ay default na sa hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class para sa "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API lamang para sa "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — at lahat ng Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ay magpapadala ng **local-first toggle** by default. Ang "Cloud-only coding agent" ay nagiging 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave
nodes.short_label: By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave
nodes.title: By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave
nodes.description: By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) publishes per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs as a single comparable disclosure, and at least one non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ships a mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal with parallel SLA disclosure. Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset removed the cloud-exclusivity clause; Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) is the first cross-cloud frontier-model deployment in the post-exclusivity world; Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure is the developer-side primitive; Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview is the orchestration substrate; Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview is the parallel non-Bedrock path. The forcing function is enterprise procurement — once frontier models cross-deploy, the buyer's first comparison stops being "model" and starts being "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". The first SLA-standardization mover is most likely AWS Bedrock (because Bedrock has the broadest model selection and the strongest enterprise compliance posture); the first non-OpenAI mirror is most likely Anthropic given the Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language explicitly applies to "OpenAI products" and creates white-space for parallel deals.

title.en: By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave
title.ja: 2026年下半期までに、OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock+Microsoftライセンス非排他リセットがマルチクラウドのフロンティアモデルSLA標準化の波を引き起こす
title.es: Para H2 2026 el reset OpenAI-en-AWS-Bedrock + licencia-no-exclusiva de Microsoft dispara una ola de estandarización de SLA multi-cloud para modelos frontera
title.fil: Pagsapit ng H2 2026, ang OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset ay magti-trigger ng multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave

description.en: By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) publishes per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs as a single comparable disclosure, and at least one non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ships a mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal with parallel SLA disclosure. Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset removed the cloud-exclusivity clause; Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) is the first cross-cloud frontier-model deployment in the post-exclusivity world; Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure is the developer-side primitive; Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview is the orchestration substrate; Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview is the parallel non-Bedrock path. The forcing function is enterprise procurement — once frontier models cross-deploy, the buyer's first comparison stops being "model" and starts being "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". The first SLA-standardization mover is most likely AWS Bedrock (because Bedrock has the broadest model selection and the strongest enterprise compliance posture); the first non-OpenAI mirror is most likely Anthropic given the Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language explicitly applies to "OpenAI products" and creates white-space for parallel deals.
description.ja: 2026年下半期までに、OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock+Microsoftライセンス非排他リセットがマルチクラウドのフロンティアモデルSLA標準化の波を引き起こす ― 少なくとも1つのBig-3ハイパースケーラー(AWS、Azure、GCP)がモデル別のレイテンシ／スループット／可用性SLAを単一の比較可能な開示として公表し、少なくとも1つの非OpenAIファウンデーションラボ(Anthropic、Google DeepMind、xAI)が並行するSLA開示を伴う「すべてのクラウド上のフロンティア」のミラー契約を出荷する。4月27日のMicrosoft–OpenAIパートナーシップリセットはクラウド排他性条項を取り除き、4月28日のOpenAI-on-Bedrock(限定プレビュー)はポスト排他性世界における最初のクロスクラウドフロンティアモデル展開となり、4月30日のCodex CLI 0.128.0のモデルプロバイダー所有のディスカバリー+AWS Bedrockアカウント状態の公開は開発者側のプリミティブであり、4月28日のAWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js+AgentCore CLI 14リージョンGA+Managed Harness 4リージョンプレビューはオーケストレーション基盤であり、4月30日のMicrosoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA+Toolboxプレビューは並行する非Bedrockのパスである。強制関数は企業調達である ― フロンティアモデルがクロスデプロイされると、買い手の最初の比較は「モデル」ではなく「記録対象クラウド上のモデル+SLA」になる。最初のSLA標準化の動きはAWS Bedrockの可能性が最も高い(Bedrockは最も広範なモデル選択と最強のエンタープライズコンプライアンス姿勢を持つため)。最初の非OpenAIミラーは、4月27日のMicrosoftの非排他言語が明示的に「OpenAI製品」に適用され、並行契約のためのホワイトスペースを作り出していることから、Anthropicの可能性が最も高い。
description.es: Para H2 2026 el reset OpenAI-en-AWS-Bedrock + licencia-no-exclusiva de Microsoft dispara una ola de estandarización de SLA multi-cloud para modelos frontera — al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 (AWS, Azure, GCP) publica SLAs por modelo de latencia / throughput / disponibilidad como una sola disclosure comparable, y al menos un foundation lab no-OpenAI (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) lanza un deal espejo de "frontera en cada cloud" con disclosure paralelo de SLA. El reset de partnership Microsoft–OpenAI del 27 abr removió la cláusula de cloud-exclusivity; OpenAI-en-Bedrock del 28 abr (preview limitado) es el primer despliegue cross-cloud de modelo frontera en el mundo post-exclusividad; el discovery model-provider-owned de Codex CLI 0.128.0 del 30 abr + la exposición de account-state de AWS Bedrock es la primitiva del lado developer; AgentCore Node.js de AWS Bedrock del 28 abr + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview es el sustrato de orquestación; Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA del 30 abr + Toolbox preview es la ruta paralela no-Bedrock. La función forzante es la procurement empresarial — una vez que los modelos frontera cross-deploy, la primera comparación del comprador deja de ser "modelo" y empieza a ser "modelo+SLA en cloud-of-record". El primer mover de estandarización de SLA es muy probablemente AWS Bedrock (porque Bedrock tiene la selección de modelos más amplia y la postura de compliance empresarial más fuerte); el primer espejo no-OpenAI es muy probablemente Anthropic dado que el lenguaje no-exclusivo de Microsoft del 27 abr aplica explícitamente a "productos OpenAI" y crea white-space para deals paralelos.
description.fil: Pagsapit ng H2 2026, ang OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset ay magti-trigger ng multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) ang maglalathala ng per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs bilang single comparable disclosure, at hindi bababa sa isang non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ang maglulunsad ng mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal na may parallel SLA disclosure. Ang Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset ang nag-alis ng cloud-exclusivity clause; ang Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) ang unang cross-cloud frontier-model deployment sa post-exclusivity world; ang Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure ang developer-side primitive; ang Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview ang orchestration substrate; ang Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview ang parallel non-Bedrock path. Ang forcing function ay ang enterprise procurement — kapag nag-cross-deploy na ang frontier models, ang unang paghahambing ng buyer ay hindi na "model" lang kundi "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". Ang unang SLA-standardization mover ay malamang AWS Bedrock (dahil ang Bedrock ang may pinakamalawak na model selection at pinakamalakas na enterprise compliance posture); ang unang non-OpenAI mirror ay malamang Anthropic dahil ang Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language ay explicit na nag-aapply sa "OpenAI products" at lumilikha ng white-space para sa parallel deals.

Ang unang SLA-standardization mover ay malamang AWS Bedrock (dahil ang Bedrock ang may pinakamalawak na model selection at pinakamalakas na enterprise compliance posture); ang unang non-OpenAI mirror ay malamang Anthropic dahil ang Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language ay explicit na nag-aapply sa "OpenAI products" at lumilikha ng white-space para sa parallel deals.

detail.summary_short: The Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI exclusivity unwind plus the Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock launch and parallel orchestration substrate at AWS AgentCore and Microsoft Foundry trigger a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave by H2 2026, with one Big-3 hyperscaler publishing comparable per-model SLAs and one non-OpenAI lab shipping a mirror frontier-on-every-cloud deal.

summary_short_locales.en: The Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI exclusivity unwind plus the Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock launch and parallel orchestration substrate at AWS AgentCore and Microsoft Foundry trigger a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave by H2 2026, with one Big-3 hyperscaler publishing comparable per-model SLAs and one non-OpenAI lab shipping a mirror frontier-on-every-cloud deal.
summary_short_locales.ja: 4月27日のMicrosoft–OpenAI排他性解消に加え、4月28日のOpenAI-on-Bedrockローンチ、AWS AgentCoreとMicrosoft Foundryでの並行するオーケストレーション基盤は、2026年下半期までにマルチクラウドのフロンティアモデルSLA標準化の波を引き起こし、1つのBig-3ハイパースケーラーが比較可能なモデル別SLAを公表し、1つの非OpenAIラボがミラーのフロンティア・オン・エブリ・クラウド契約を出荷する。
summary_short_locales.es: El desenredo de exclusividad Microsoft–OpenAI del 27 abr más el lanzamiento OpenAI-en-Bedrock del 28 abr y el sustrato de orquestación paralelo en AWS AgentCore y Microsoft Foundry disparan una ola de estandarización de SLA multi-cloud para modelos frontera para H2 2026, con un hyperscaler Big-3 publicando SLAs comparables por modelo y un lab no-OpenAI lanzando un deal espejo frontier-on-every-cloud.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI exclusivity unwind plus ang Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock launch at parallel orchestration substrate sa AWS AgentCore at Microsoft Foundry ay magti-trigger ng multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave pagsapit ng H2 2026, na may isang Big-3 hyperscaler na maglalathala ng comparable per-model SLAs at isang non-OpenAI lab na maglulunsad ng mirror frontier-on-every-cloud deal.

bridges.text: Anthropic's May 4 JV plus the Microsoft Agent 365 + Cisco DefenseClaw RSAC stack reinforce the consequence the prediction names: Anthropic now mirrors OpenAI's structured-equity + non-exclusive distribution shape, and the Microsoft + AWS + Google control-plane convergence pressures comparable per-model SLA disclosure across the buyside-of-record cloud surface.

text_locales.en: Anthropic's May 4 JV plus the Microsoft Agent 365 + Cisco DefenseClaw RSAC stack reinforce the consequence the prediction names: Anthropic now mirrors OpenAI's structured-equity + non-exclusive distribution shape, and the Microsoft + AWS + Google control-plane convergence pressures comparable per-model SLA disclosure across the buyside-of-record cloud surface.
text_locales.ja: Anthropicの5月4日 JV + Microsoft Agent 365 + Cisco DefenseClaw RSACスタックが予測が指摘する帰結を強化する: AnthropicはOpenAIの構造化エクイティ + 非独占的配布形状をミラーするようになり、Microsoft + AWS + Googleコントロールプレーン収斂が、バイサイド記録のクラウド・サーフェスにわたって比較可能なモデル単位SLA開示にプレッシャーをかける。
text_locales.es: La JV del 4 de mayo de Anthropic más la pila Microsoft Agent 365 + Cisco DefenseClaw RSAC refuerzan la consecuencia que la predicción nombra: Anthropic ahora refleja la forma de distribución no exclusiva + capital estructurado de OpenAI, y la convergencia de plano de control de Microsoft + AWS + Google presiona divulgación comparable de SLA por modelo a través de la superficie de nube de comprador-de-registro.
text_locales.fil: Ang May 4 JV ng Anthropic plus ang Microsoft Agent 365 + Cisco DefenseClaw RSAC stack ay nagpapatibay sa consequence na pinangalanan ng prediction: pinapares na ngayon ng Anthropic ang structured-equity + non-exclusive distribution shape ng OpenAI, at ang Microsoft + AWS + Google control-plane convergence ay nagpapapilit ng comparable per-model SLA disclosure sa buong buyside-of-record cloud surface.

bridges.text: OpenAI on Bedrock under the post-exclusivity reset is the first cross-cloud frontier deployment, and the AWS Bedrock Mythos gated SKU shows Anthropic's parallel cross-cloud lane already running. Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync with Bedrock and Vertex extends the cross-cloud orchestration substrate the SLA-standardization wave needs.

text_locales.en: OpenAI on Bedrock under the post-exclusivity reset is the first cross-cloud frontier deployment, and the AWS Bedrock Mythos gated SKU shows Anthropic's parallel cross-cloud lane already running. Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync with Bedrock and Vertex extends the cross-cloud orchestration substrate the SLA-standardization wave needs.
text_locales.ja: ポスト独占性リセット下のBedrock上のOpenAIは最初のクラウド横断フロンティア展開だ。AWS Bedrock MythosのゲートSKUは、Anthropicの並行クラウド横断レーンが既に走っていることを示す。Microsoft Agent 365のBedrockおよびVertexとのレジストリ同期が、SLA標準化ウェーブが必要とするクラウド横断オーケストレーション基盤を拡張する。
text_locales.es: OpenAI en Bedrock bajo el reset post-exclusividad es el primer despliegue frontera multi-nube, y el SKU gated de AWS Bedrock Mythos muestra el carril paralelo multi-nube de Anthropic ya en funcionamiento. Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync con Bedrock y Vertex extiende el sustrato de orquestación multi-nube que la ola de estandarización de SLA necesita.
text_locales.fil: Ang OpenAI sa Bedrock sa ilalim ng post-exclusivity reset ang unang cross-cloud frontier deployment, at ipinapakita ng AWS Bedrock Mythos gated SKU na ang parallel cross-cloud lane ng Anthropic ay tumatakbo na. Pinapalawak ng Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync sa Bedrock at Vertex ang cross-cloud orchestration substrate na kailangan ng SLA-standardization wave.

bridges.text: OpenAI on Bedrock plus AgentCore's Node.js / multi-region runtime plus Codex CLI's account-state exposure plus Anthropic Opus 4.7 on Trainium all line up exactly with the cross-cloud substrate the prediction expects an SLA standardization wave to grow on top of.

text_locales.en: OpenAI on Bedrock plus AgentCore's Node.js / multi-region runtime plus Codex CLI's account-state exposure plus Anthropic Opus 4.7 on Trainium all line up exactly with the cross-cloud substrate the prediction expects an SLA standardization wave to grow on top of.
text_locales.ja: OpenAI on Bedrock、AgentCoreのNode.js / マルチリージョンランタイム、Codex CLIのアカウント状態露出、TrainiumのAnthropic Opus 4.7はすべて、予測がSLA標準化波がその上に成長すると期待するクロスクラウド基盤と正に整合している。
text_locales.es: OpenAI en Bedrock más el runtime Node.js / multi-región de AgentCore más la exposición de estado-de-cuenta de Codex CLI más Anthropic Opus 4.7 en Trainium se alinean exactamente con el sustrato cross-cloud sobre el que la predicción espera que crezca una ola de estandarización de SLAs.
text_locales.fil: Ang OpenAI sa Bedrock kasama ang Node.js / multi-region runtime ng AgentCore kasama ang account-state exposure ng Codex CLI kasama ang Anthropic Opus 4.7 sa Trainium ay magkakahanay nang eksakto sa cross-cloud substrate na inaasahan ng prediction na pagtutubuan ng SLA standardization wave.

job_locales.en: Establish the model+SLA-on-cloud-of-record comparison framework that turns hyperscaler SLA disclosure into a procurement-decision input.
job_locales.ja: ハイパースケーラーSLA開示を調達決定インプットに変換するモデル+SLA・オン・記録対象クラウド比較フレームワークを確立する。
job_locales.es: Establecer el framework de comparación model+SLA-on-cloud-of-record que convierte la disclosure de SLA del hyperscaler en un input de decisión de procurement.
job_locales.fil: Itatag ang model+SLA-on-cloud-of-record comparison framework na nagbabaling sa hyperscaler SLA disclosure bilang procurement-decision input.

outcome_locales.en: Internal procurement standard + RFP template that requires per-model latency / throughput / availability SLA as a scoring axis alongside model capability.
outcome_locales.ja: モデル別レイテンシ / スループット / 可用性SLAをモデル能力と並ぶスコアリング軸として要求する内部調達標準+RFPテンプレート。
outcome_locales.es: Estándar interno de procurement + template de RFP que requiere SLA de latencia / throughput / disponibilidad por modelo como un eje de scoring junto a la capability del modelo.
outcome_locales.fil: Internal procurement standard + RFP template na nangangailangan ng per-model latency / throughput / availability SLA bilang scoring axis kasama ang model capability.

motivation_locales.en: Cross-cloud frontier deployment changes the buyer's first comparison from "model" to "model+SLA on cloud-of-record"; the buyer that publishes the framework first signals demand to hyperscalers and accelerates the disclosure wave.
motivation_locales.ja: クロスクラウドフロンティア展開は買い手の最初の比較を「モデル」から「記録対象クラウド上のモデル+SLA」に変える。最初にフレームワークを公表する買い手はハイパースケーラーへの需要をシグナルし、開示の波を加速する。
motivation_locales.es: El despliegue cross-cloud de frontera cambia la primera comparación del comprador de "modelo" a "modelo+SLA en cloud-of-record"; el comprador que publica el framework primero señala demanda a los hyperscalers y acelera la ola de disclosure.
motivation_locales.fil: Ang cross-cloud frontier deployment ay nagbabago ng unang paghahambing ng buyer mula "model" sa "model+SLA on cloud-of-record"; ang buyer na maglathala ng framework muna ay nagse-signal ng demand sa mga hyperscaler at nag-a-accelerate ng disclosure wave.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) publishes per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs as a single comparable disclosure, and at least one non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ships a mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal with parallel SLA disclosure. Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset removed the cloud-exclusivity clause; Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) is the first cross-cloud frontier-model deployment in the post-exclusivity world; Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure is the developer-side primitive; Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview is the orchestration substrate; Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview is the parallel non-Bedrock path. The forcing function is enterprise procurement — once frontier models cross-deploy, the buyer's first comparison stops being "model" and starts being "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". The first SLA-standardization mover is most likely AWS Bedrock (because Bedrock has the broadest model selection and the strongest enterprise compliance posture); the first non-OpenAI mirror is most likely Anthropic given the Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language explicitly applies to "OpenAI products" and creates white-space for parallel deals.
detail.prediction_summary: By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) publishes per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs as a single comparable disclosure, and at least one non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ships a mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal with parallel SLA disclosure. Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset removed the cloud-exclusivity clause; Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) is the first cross-cloud frontier-model deployment in the post-exclusivity world; Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure is the developer-side primitive; Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview is the orchestration substrate; Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview is the parallel non-Bedrock path. The forcing function is enterprise procurement — once frontier models cross-deploy, the buyer's first comparison stops being "model" and starts being "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". The first SLA-standardization mover is most likely AWS Bedrock (because Bedrock has the broadest model selection and the strongest enterprise compliance posture); the first non-OpenAI mirror is most likely Anthropic given the Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language explicitly applies to "OpenAI products" and creates white-space for parallel deals.

prediction_summary_locales.en: By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) publishes per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs as a single comparable disclosure, and at least one non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ships a mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal with parallel SLA disclosure. Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset removed the cloud-exclusivity clause; Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) is the first cross-cloud frontier-model deployment in the post-exclusivity world; Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure is the developer-side primitive; Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview is the orchestration substrate; Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview is the parallel non-Bedrock path. The forcing function is enterprise procurement — once frontier models cross-deploy, the buyer's first comparison stops being "model" and starts being "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". The first SLA-standardization mover is most likely AWS Bedrock (because Bedrock has the broadest model selection and the strongest enterprise compliance posture); the first non-OpenAI mirror is most likely Anthropic given the Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language explicitly applies to "OpenAI products" and creates white-space for parallel deals.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: 2026年下半期までに、OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock+Microsoftライセンス非排他リセットがマルチクラウドのフロンティアモデルSLA標準化の波を引き起こす ― 少なくとも1つのBig-3ハイパースケーラー(AWS、Azure、GCP)がモデル別のレイテンシ／スループット／可用性SLAを単一の比較可能な開示として公表し、少なくとも1つの非OpenAIファウンデーションラボ(Anthropic、Google DeepMind、xAI)が並行するSLA開示を伴う「すべてのクラウド上のフロンティア」のミラー契約を出荷する。4月27日のMicrosoft–OpenAIパートナーシップリセットはクラウド排他性条項を取り除き、4月28日のOpenAI-on-Bedrock(限定プレビュー)はポスト排他性世界における最初のクロスクラウドフロンティアモデル展開となり、4月30日のCodex CLI 0.128.0のモデルプロバイダー所有のディスカバリー+AWS Bedrockアカウント状態の公開は開発者側のプリミティブであり、4月28日のAWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js+AgentCore CLI 14リージョンGA+Managed Harness 4リージョンプレビューはオーケストレーション基盤であり、4月30日のMicrosoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA+Toolboxプレビューは並行する非Bedrockのパスである。強制関数は企業調達である ― フロンティアモデルがクロスデプロイされると、買い手の最初の比較は「モデル」ではなく「記録対象クラウド上のモデル+SLA」になる。最初のSLA標準化の動きはAWS Bedrockの可能性が最も高い(Bedrockは最も広範なモデル選択と最強のエンタープライズコンプライアンス姿勢を持つため)。最初の非OpenAIミラーは、4月27日のMicrosoftの非排他言語が明示的に「OpenAI製品」に適用され、並行契約のためのホワイトスペースを作り出していることから、Anthropicの可能性が最も高い。
prediction_summary_locales.es: Para H2 2026 el reset OpenAI-en-AWS-Bedrock + licencia-no-exclusiva de Microsoft dispara una ola de estandarización de SLA multi-cloud para modelos frontera — al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 (AWS, Azure, GCP) publica SLAs por modelo de latencia / throughput / disponibilidad como una sola disclosure comparable, y al menos un foundation lab no-OpenAI (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) lanza un deal espejo de "frontera en cada cloud" con disclosure paralelo de SLA. El reset de partnership Microsoft–OpenAI del 27 abr removió la cláusula de cloud-exclusivity; OpenAI-en-Bedrock del 28 abr (preview limitado) es el primer despliegue cross-cloud de modelo frontera en el mundo post-exclusividad; el discovery model-provider-owned de Codex CLI 0.128.0 del 30 abr + la exposición de account-state de AWS Bedrock es la primitiva del lado developer; AgentCore Node.js de AWS Bedrock del 28 abr + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview es el sustrato de orquestación; Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA del 30 abr + Toolbox preview es la ruta paralela no-Bedrock. La función forzante es la procurement empresarial — una vez que los modelos frontera cross-deploy, la primera comparación del comprador deja de ser "modelo" y empieza a ser "modelo+SLA en cloud-of-record". El primer mover de estandarización de SLA es muy probablemente AWS Bedrock (porque Bedrock tiene la selección de modelos más amplia y la postura de compliance empresarial más fuerte); el primer espejo no-OpenAI es muy probablemente Anthropic dado que el lenguaje no-exclusivo de Microsoft del 27 abr aplica explícitamente a "productos OpenAI" y crea white-space para deals paralelos.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: Pagsapit ng H2 2026, ang OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset ay magti-trigger ng multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) ang maglalathala ng per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs bilang single comparable disclosure, at hindi bababa sa isang non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ang maglulunsad ng mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal na may parallel SLA disclosure. Ang Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset ang nag-alis ng cloud-exclusivity clause; ang Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) ang unang cross-cloud frontier-model deployment sa post-exclusivity world; ang Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure ang developer-side primitive; ang Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview ang orchestration substrate; ang Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview ang parallel non-Bedrock path. Ang forcing function ay ang enterprise procurement — kapag nag-cross-deploy na ang frontier models, ang unang paghahambing ng buyer ay hindi na "model" lang kundi "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". Ang unang SLA-standardization mover ay malamang AWS Bedrock (dahil ang Bedrock ang may pinakamalawak na model selection at pinakamalakas na enterprise compliance posture); ang unang non-OpenAI mirror ay malamang Anthropic dahil ang Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language ay explicit na nag-aapply sa "OpenAI products" at lumilikha ng white-space para sa parallel deals.

nodes.short_label: Cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP registry RFC draft ships by Q3 2026
nodes.title: Cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP registry RFC draft ships by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. title.en: Cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP registry RFC draft ships by Q3 2026
title.ja: クラウド横断のエージェントID + MCPレジストリのRFCドラフトが2026年Q3までに公開される
title.es: Borrador de RFC sobre identidad de agentes multi-nube + registro MCP se publica para Q3 2026

description.en: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds — soon a public spec will lock that in. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年Q3までに、Microsoft Agent 365の5月1日GAでのAWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platformとのレジストリ同期、Anthropic MCP SDKの月間~97Mダウンロード、並行する4月30日のOpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCoreスタックが、クラウド横断のエージェントID + MCPサーバーインベントリ + ツール呼び出しログスキーマを標準的な相互運用層として形式化する公開ドラフトRFC(IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation作業部会)へと収斂する。** 強制力はエンタープライズ調達である。Microsoftが$15/user/moでM365管理画面統合を伴うレジストリ同期プリミティブを出荷すれば、AWS + Googleは並行する画面を露出するか、Microsoftスキーマに吸収されるかを迫られる。CSAIの4月29日のMITRE-CNA権限 + ATT&CK v19の命名済み手法(MCPサーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェント配備)が脅威側の標準化圧力を提供する。4月30日のOpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GAは既にビルド/ランタイム層を標準化しているため、欠けているのはレジストリ同期が機能することを証明している相互運用プロトコル層だけだ。Microsoft + AWS + Googleが公開ドラフトRFCで三角測量することが期待される。なぜならベンダー固有のスキーマではM365 + Bedrock + Vertexのインストールベース錨点優位を失うからだ。平易な言葉で言えば: MicrosoftがAIエージェントIDをMicrosoft、Amazon、Googleクラウド間で動作させた — まもなく公開仕様がそれを固定化する。
description.es: **Para Q3 2026, la GA del 1 de mayo de Microsoft Agent 365 con Registry Sync hacia AWS Bedrock + la Plataforma de Agentes Empresariales Gemini de Google Cloud Vertex + el SDK MCP de Anthropic con ~97M de descargas mensuales + la convergencia paralela del 30 de abril del OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore se traduce en un borrador de RFC publicado (grupo de trabajo de IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation) que formaliza el esquema de identidad de agentes multi-nube + inventario de servidores MCP + registro de invocaciones de herramientas como una capa estándar de interoperabilidad.** La función forzante es la contratación empresarial: una vez que Microsoft entrega la primitiva de registry-sync a $15/usuario/mes con integración en la superficie de administración de M365, AWS + Google deben exponer superficies paralelas o ser absorbidos en el esquema de Microsoft; la autoridad MITRE-CNA del 29 de abril de CSAI + las técnicas nombradas de ATT&CK v19 (compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue malicioso de agente) aportan la presión estandarizadora del lado de las amenazas; el OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA del 30 de abril ya estandarizan la capa de build/runtime, así que la pieza faltante es la capa de protocolo de interoperabilidad que el registry-sync demuestra que funciona; se espera que Microsoft + AWS + Google triangulen sobre un borrador público de RFC porque los esquemas vendor-específicos perderían la ventaja del ancla de base instalada de M365 + Bedrock + Vertex. En lenguaje sencillo: Microsoft acaba de hacer que los IDs de agentes de IA funcionen entre las nubes de Microsoft, Amazon y Google — pronto una especificación pública lo afianzará.
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK na may ~97M monthly downloads + ang parallel na Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack ay magsasama-sama sa isang inilathalang draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) na nagbibigay ng pormal na anyo sa cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema bilang standard interop layer.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: kapag inilabas na ng Microsoft ang registry-sync primitive sa $15/user/mo na may M365 admin-surface integration, kailangang ilabas ng AWS + Google ang katumbas na surfaces o masisipsip sila sa Microsoft schema; ang Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority ng CSAI + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) ang nagbibigay ng threat-side standardization pressure; ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ay nagsa-standardize na sa build/runtime layer kaya ang nawawalang piraso ay ang interop-protocol layer na pinatunayan ng registry-sync na gumagana; inaasahang magta-triangulate ang Microsoft + AWS + Google sa isang pampublikong draft RFC dahil ang vendor-specific schemas ay mawawalan ng M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. Sa madaling salita: pinagana lang ng Microsoft ang AI agent IDs sa kabuuan ng Microsoft, Amazon, at Google clouds — malapit nang lumabas ang isang public spec na maglo-lock niyan.

reasoning.because: Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA ships Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Vertex Gemini Enterprise as a working cross-cloud primitive.
reasoning.given: OpenAI Agents SDK + Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 + AgentCore standardize build / runtime, and CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 add the threat-side pressure.
reasoning.so_that: AWS, Azure, and Google triangulate on a published draft RFC for agent identity + MCP inventory + tool-invocation logs rather than ceding the schema to one vendor.
reasoning.landing: By Q3 2026; IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI working-group draft RFC.
reasoning.plain_language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds; the three of them will soon publish a shared spec instead of fighting over it.

so_that.en: AWS, Azure, and Google triangulate on a published draft RFC for agent identity + MCP inventory + tool-invocation logs rather than ceding the schema to one vendor.

so_that.fil: Magta-triangulate ang AWS, Azure, at Google sa isang inilathalang draft RFC para sa agent identity + MCP inventory + tool-invocation logs sa halip na ibigay ang schema sa isang vendor.

detail.summary_short: Microsoft Agent 365 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Vertex, the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Foundry Agent Framework 1.0, and CSAI MITRE-CNA pressure converge on a published interop layer. By Q3 2026 an IETF / OpenID / CSAI draft RFC for cross-cloud agent identity + MCP inventory + tool-invocation logs is expected to ship.

summary_short_locales.en: Microsoft Agent 365 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Vertex, the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Foundry Agent Framework 1.0, and CSAI MITRE-CNA pressure converge on a published interop layer. By Q3 2026 an IETF / OpenID / CSAI draft RFC for cross-cloud agent identity + MCP inventory + tool-invocation logs is expected to ship.
summary_short_locales.ja: Microsoft Agent 365 GAのAWS Bedrock + Google Vertexとのレジストリ同期、4月30日のOpenAI Agents SDK + Foundry Agent Framework 1.0、CSAI MITRE-CNA圧力が、公開された相互運用層へと収斂する。2026年Q3までに、クラウド横断のエージェントID + MCPインベントリ + ツール呼び出しログのためのIETF / OpenID / CSAIドラフトRFCの出荷が見込まれる。
summary_short_locales.es: La GA de Microsoft Agent 365 con Registry Sync hacia AWS Bedrock + Google Vertex, el OpenAI Agents SDK + Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 del 30 de abril, y la presión de CSAI MITRE-CNA convergen en una capa de interoperabilidad publicada. Para Q3 2026 se espera un borrador de RFC de IETF / OpenID / CSAI sobre identidad de agentes multi-nube + inventario MCP + registros de invocación de herramientas.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Microsoft Agent 365 GA Registry Sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Vertex, ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Foundry Agent Framework 1.0, at ang CSAI MITRE-CNA pressure ay nagsasama-sama tungo sa isang inilathalang interop layer. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, inaasahang ilalabas ang isang IETF / OpenID / CSAI draft RFC para sa cross-cloud agent identity + MCP inventory + tool-invocation logs.

bridges.text: The RSAC-week Microsoft + Cisco + CSA convergence on agent-as-first-class-identity reinforces the structural force the prediction names: the platform-side schema-lock pressure on AWS + Google is now operative, but no working group publishes a public draft RFC in the window.

text_locales.en: The RSAC-week Microsoft + Cisco + CSA convergence on agent-as-first-class-identity reinforces the structural force the prediction names: the platform-side schema-lock pressure on AWS + Google is now operative, but no working group publishes a public draft RFC in the window.
text_locales.ja: RSACウィークのMicrosoft + Cisco + CSAのエージェントをファーストクラス・アイデンティティとして扱うことへの収斂は、予測が指摘する構造的な強制力を強化する: AWS + Googleに対するプラットフォーム側のスキーマロック・プレッシャーは現在運用されているが、ワーキンググループはウィンドウ内で公開草案RFCを公表しない。
text_locales.es: La convergencia de Microsoft + Cisco + CSA durante la semana RSAC sobre agente-como-identidad-de-primera-clase refuerza la fuerza estructural que la predicción nombra: la presión de bloqueo de esquema del lado plataforma sobre AWS + Google ahora es operativa, pero ningún grupo de trabajo publica un borrador RFC público en la ventana.
text_locales.fil: Ang RSAC-week Microsoft + Cisco + CSA convergence sa agent-as-first-class-identity ay nagpapatibay sa structural force na pinangalanan ng prediction: ang platform-side schema-lock pressure sa AWS + Google ay aktibo na ngayon, ngunit walang working group na naglalathala ng public draft RFC sa window.

needs.actor: CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA working-group lead
needs.job: publish ATT&CK v19 alignment guidance plus a CVE-disclosure cadence that maps cross-cloud MCP-server compromise and malicious agent deployment onto the draft RFC's schema before Q3 2026
needs.outcome: a CSAI Foundation document tying ATT&CK v19 named techniques to the cross-cloud agent-identity + tool-invocation log schema with a quarterly disclosure cadence
needs.motivation: without a threat-side anchor that maps to the same schema, the RFC reads as a commercial accord rather than a security-grade interop layer

readings.cluster_narrative: Broad support across 2 clusters. Largest is 'Developer Toolchain Platformization' (2 of 2 items, accelerating). Multi-thread support is more robust than single-cluster concentration.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds — soon a public spec will lock that in. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds — soon a public spec will lock that in. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds — soon a public spec will lock that in. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年Q3までに、Microsoft Agent 365の5月1日GAでのAWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platformとのレジストリ同期、Anthropic MCP SDKの月間~97Mダウンロード、並行する4月30日のOpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCoreスタックが、クラウド横断のエージェントID + MCPサーバーインベントリ + ツール呼び出しログスキーマを標準的な相互運用層として形式化する公開ドラフトRFC(IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation作業部会)へと収斂する。** 強制力はエンタープライズ調達である。Microsoftが$15/user/moでM365管理画面統合を伴うレジストリ同期プリミティブを出荷すれば、AWS + Googleは並行する画面を露出するか、Microsoftスキーマに吸収されるかを迫られる。CSAIの4月29日のMITRE-CNA権限 + ATT&CK v19の命名済み手法(MCPサーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェント配備)が脅威側の標準化圧力を提供する。4月30日のOpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GAは既にビルド/ランタイム層を標準化しているため、欠けているのはレジストリ同期が機能することを証明している相互運用プロトコル層だけだ。Microsoft + AWS + Googleが公開ドラフトRFCで三角測量することが期待される。なぜならベンダー固有のスキーマではM365 + Bedrock + Vertexのインストールベース錨点優位を失うからだ。平易な言葉で言えば: MicrosoftがAIエージェントIDをMicrosoft、Amazon、Googleクラウド間で動作させた — まもなく公開仕様がそれを固定化する。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para Q3 2026, la GA del 1 de mayo de Microsoft Agent 365 con Registry Sync hacia AWS Bedrock + la Plataforma de Agentes Empresariales Gemini de Google Cloud Vertex + el SDK MCP de Anthropic con ~97M de descargas mensuales + la convergencia paralela del 30 de abril del OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore se traduce en un borrador de RFC publicado (grupo de trabajo de IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation) que formaliza el esquema de identidad de agentes multi-nube + inventario de servidores MCP + registro de invocaciones de herramientas como una capa estándar de interoperabilidad.** La función forzante es la contratación empresarial: una vez que Microsoft entrega la primitiva de registry-sync a $15/usuario/mes con integración en la superficie de administración de M365, AWS + Google deben exponer superficies paralelas o ser absorbidos en el esquema de Microsoft; la autoridad MITRE-CNA del 29 de abril de CSAI + las técnicas nombradas de ATT&CK v19 (compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue malicioso de agente) aportan la presión estandarizadora del lado de las amenazas; el OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA del 30 de abril ya estandarizan la capa de build/runtime, así que la pieza faltante es la capa de protocolo de interoperabilidad que el registry-sync demuestra que funciona; se espera que Microsoft + AWS + Google triangulen sobre un borrador público de RFC porque los esquemas vendor-específicos perderían la ventaja del ancla de base instalada de M365 + Bedrock + Vertex. En lenguaje sencillo: Microsoft acaba de hacer que los IDs de agentes de IA funcionen entre las nubes de Microsoft, Amazon y Google — pronto una especificación pública lo afianzará.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK na may ~97M monthly downloads + ang parallel na Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack ay magsasama-sama sa isang inilathalang draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) na nagbibigay ng pormal na anyo sa cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema bilang standard interop layer.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: kapag inilabas na ng Microsoft ang registry-sync primitive sa $15/user/mo na may M365 admin-surface integration, kailangang ilabas ng AWS + Google ang katumbas na surfaces o masisipsip sila sa Microsoft schema; ang Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority ng CSAI + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) ang nagbibigay ng threat-side standardization pressure; ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ay nagsa-standardize na sa build/runtime layer kaya ang nawawalang piraso ay ang interop-protocol layer na pinatunayan ng registry-sync na gumagana; inaasahang magta-triangulate ang Microsoft + AWS + Google sa isang pampublikong draft RFC dahil ang vendor-specific schemas ay mawawalan ng M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. Sa madaling salita: pinagana lang ng Microsoft ang AI agent IDs sa kabuuan ng Microsoft, Amazon, at Google clouds — malapit nang lumabas ang isang public spec na maglo-lock niyan.

nodes.description: **The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab"** is here. Amazon-Anthropic's 10-year $100B commit becomes the second "hardware-codesigned + platform-exclusive" contract after MS-OpenAI. Through H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect the **5-pole regime** — Google–(in-house Gemini), Anthropic–AWS, OpenAI–MS, Meta–internal (Llama), xAI–Oracle/NVDA — to lock in. Trainium / TPU / MAIA / MI300X design differences will translate directly into model-behavior differences, and developers will reassess **backend portability** (a runtime-agnostic layer like MCP) as a hard requirement. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab"** is here. Amazon-Anthropic's 10-year $100B commit becomes the second "hardware-codesigned + platform-exclusive" contract after MS-OpenAI. Through H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect the **5-pole regime** — Google–(in-house Gemini), Anthropic–AWS, OpenAI–MS, Meta–internal (Llama), xAI–Oracle/NVDA — to lock in. Trainium / TPU / MAIA / MI300X design differences will translate directly into model-behavior differences, and developers will reassess **backend portability** (a runtime-agnostic layer like MCP) as a hard requirement. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「ハイパースケーラとフロンティアラボの排他的提携」時代**が到来した。Amazon-Anthropicの10年間 $100B コミットメントは、MS-OpenAIに続く2件目の「ハードウェア協調設計 + プラットフォーム排他」契約となる。2026年H2 / 2027年H1にかけて、**5極体制** — Google–(自社製Gemini)、Anthropic–AWS、OpenAI–MS、Meta–社内(Llama)、xAI–Oracle/NVDA — が固定化される見込みだ。Trainium / TPU / MAIA / MI300Xの設計差異はそのままモデル挙動の差異につながり、開発者は**バックエンドの可搬性**(MCPのようなランタイム非依存層)を必須要件として再評価することになる。In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Ha llegado la era de la "alianza exclusiva entre hyperscaler y laboratorio de frontera"**. El compromiso de 100.000 millones de dólares a 10 años entre Amazon y Anthropic se convierte en el segundo contrato "co-diseñado en hardware + exclusivo de plataforma" tras MS-OpenAI. A lo largo del H2 2026 / H1 2027, se espera que se afiance el **régimen de 5 polos** — Google–(Gemini interno), Anthropic–AWS, OpenAI–MS, Meta–interno (Llama), xAI–Oracle/NVDA. Las diferencias de diseño entre Trainium / TPU / MAIA / MI300X se traducirán directamente en diferencias de comportamiento de modelo, y los desarrolladores reevaluarán la **portabilidad de backend** (una capa agnóstica al runtime como MCP) como un requisito imprescindible. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang panahon ng "exclusive alliance sa pagitan ng hyperscaler at frontier lab"** ay narito na. Ang 10-year $100B commit ng Amazon-Anthropic ay nagiging pangalawang "hardware-codesigned + platform-exclusive" na kontrata pagkatapos ng MS-OpenAI. Sa pamamagitan ng H2 2026 / H1 2027, asahan ang **5-pole regime** — Google–(in-house Gemini), Anthropic–AWS, OpenAI–MS, Meta–internal (Llama), xAI–Oracle/NVDA — na mag-lock in. Ang Trainium / TPU / MAIA / MI300X design differences ay direktang isasalin sa model-behavior differences, at muling tatasa ng developers ang **backend portability** (isang runtime-agnostic layer tulad ng MCP) bilang isang hard requirement. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
